body:
Every special election marks a chance to protect or expand Democratic power in statehouses nationwide – $7 helps our party make the most of every opportunity to build power. | | |
---
| |
---|---
$7. That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** _Seven_ special elections are on the horizon in states like Delaware, Louisiana, and Virginia – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** Every special election marks a chance to protect or gain Democratic seats in statehouses nationwide – $7 helps our party make the most of every opportunity to build power. **Reason #3:** State legislatures have an important role to play in protecting access to the ballot box, abortion rights, and more – $7 helps elect leaders who will stand up to the ultra-extreme MAGA agenda in our statehouses. [So what do you say? Will you donate $7 today to help elect state Democrats nationwide?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPfr0A4dBpd_CC4Uqnpn8KTZszWXjDhgxMbwZIuJR4LBDk3WQfW1hBPI593bPjA4c5g0vFagIY2YqbsBRIP-Z_QW7AvJK-LCFXnSbc48LKS-A2yOMeZUS0tDA-DZaFRyGJ6jw_Ilhcmf7Y7fhlB-WSjdOMX2HZQvjyApKJBvGmSs5MlZZpM9k9rhO4N0GtoMuiyM4KyANey07pzrr3auVkJhxSONbSI2lF46GWfNYyxWtCLCoHjP_t_UQJxfYUwX5CgIu_NuXrtHr_YG19oI4HCIk_XWV1XswKo0DtvugxgpV0iymqBNKkZcTAU9qKkleXbXFxWgt1eWDJucbcjGC9bXQ/4cw/020S1bAwRLKB0vILHcPjBw/h0/h001.HGAIAVdGOOwBeagHfdeePIsZmXCJ1xqMmuQlSmmi9fw) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

With Republican Elise Stefanik packing her bags to move into the United Nations Ambassador's penthouse (known as the "palace") in Manhattan, a Special Election is anticipated in NY's 21st Congressional District.
The process in New York is that the "local party leaders" meet to nominate a candidate for the ballot. There is no primary. The governor does not appoint someone to the House of Representatives, even in the event of a vacancy.
Kudos to each of you on this list who supported my campaign in November 2024. Together, we got more votes than any other Democrat has gotten in recent memory.
### Raw Data
**In raw numbers, my campaign received more votes than any other Democrat on the NY-21 ballot, going back to the last Democrat to hold this seat, Bill Owens.***
> • Bill Owens 2012 - 50.1% with 126,631 votes
> • Woolf 2014 - 33.5% with 54,796 votes
> • Derek 2016 - 30% with 82,161 votes
> • Cobb 2018 - 42.4% with 99,791 votes
> • Cobb 2020 - 41.1% with 131,992 votes
> • Castelli 2022 - 40.8% with 116,421 votes
> • **Collins 2024 - 38.0% with 132,447 votes**
*NYTimes data, except for data on Bill Owens, which was from Ballotpedia.
That means more people took time out of their day to show up at the polls and cast a vote for me than they had for any other Democratic candidate.
### **Whoa! But what 's with those percentage drops?**
Well, they are disturbing. They point to a problem that is bigger than any one person or any one problem.
Since November, I've spent a lot of time asking myself how we could have lost 2.8 percentage points, while gaining 16,025 votes.
Since Trump entered politics, we have seen the steady slide of Democrats' margins in rural areas.
What becomes apparent is that the MAGAs have done an incredible job of registering voters and getting them to show up at the polls. Big time.
Meanwhile, Democrats have also stepped up their GOTV game. But obviously we have room for improvement.
It takes not only good candidates, but a strong effort across multiple levels of the party.
### It takes a village to raise those percentages
We need to work together. Superman could literally fly in to NY-21 with a $2 billion campaign budget, and it would not make a bit of difference if he couldn't register more voters and then actually get them to the polls. Even a Wealthy Superman needs a team to get elected.
### **In rural counties, Democrats need to be willing to call or knock on doors of unlikely voters. The MAGAs certainly do.**
How many of my true blue Democrat friends in NY-21 have gotten literature, email, texts, or phone calls from Republican candidates? I sure have.
Dems are shy about outreach in potentially unfriendly waters. I get it - there have been a few high-profile and tragic incidents, such as what happened in one of the 15 counties in NY-21 when a young driver pulled up in a stranger's driveway to turn around and was shot by a zealous and suspicious homeowner.
There are also incidents in which you knock on a door and people scream at you for saying the word "Democrat". (Usually they start with "What are you?" I always want to respond something like "Um. I'm human - that's what I am.")
In the 2024 campaign, I knocked on doors randomly - just picking a street and going door to door. Of course I had a few people close the door quickly. "Nope. Nope. Nope," one woman said.
But I also had the experience of talking to voters who seemed, by outward appearances, to look as rural-red-Republican as possible and yet they thanked me and said they planned to vote for me.
If we don't knock, we will never know.
And if we don't knock, the voters will continue to feel disconnected, forgotten, and unheard. And then we lose more percentage points.
### Sounds logical. So why am I saying this?
I'm saying all of this because I've had heated discussions with people who are active in local Democratic politics (some of them even town chairs!) who say that they will canvass, but they will NOT knock on doors of Republicans.
I've had people who are active in local Democratic politics say they won't even send a postcard to a Republican. And I was the one supplying the cards, the labels, and the postage.
Truthfully, a lot of the 132,447 votes that were cast for me were from people who are registered Republicans. In one county, Republicans (usually spouses of Democrats) even showed up for the Democratic county committee dinner at the VFW!
### Once we have a candidate, you need to temporarily lose your inner pundit if you are active in local politics
Party unity is vitally important. Yes, we had joy and good vibes in the Harris campaign. But we also had pundits who persisted in grumbling that Joe should have exited sooner, and we should have had a primary.
In my race, I had Democrats who were very active in county committee work who wrote email messages or on social media that the NY-21 race was un-winnable.
**With friends like this, who needs enemies?**
**Put another way: with Democrats like this, who needs Republicans? We will simply do ourselves in.**
When we publicly throw shade on our party's candidates who are already on the ballot, we are doing that which progressives accuse the rural MAGAs of doing: acting against their best interests.
I have had the task of campaigning for a candidate I was not thrilled about. But this is the nature of political party work. We pull together to advance the work of the party.
Go have coffee with a friend and talk about your wish for a different candidate. Tell it to a spouse. Write it in your diary. But for the sake of party unity -- for the sake of winning the race -- if you are active in local Democratic activities, don't fuel the flames of doubt in public once a candidate is actually on the ballot.
Don't worry -- after Election Day you can email, blog and post to your heart's content. You can even do the all caps thing, "I TOLD YOU SO." But hold off while the campaign season is in full swing.
### It's all about branding, which Democrats struggle with
I'm not saying you can't have an opinion that diverges from the party's choice. Just do so privately if you are active in local party politics. Once you put something in an email to one person, it can go to dozens or hundreds of people faster than you can say the words, "party unity."
Speaking or writing publicly or on social media about your hesitancy about a nominated candidate would be like a hired sales representative for Coca Cola going on social media and saying, "I'm out here selling Coca Cola, but of course, Pepsi is going to beat us in annual sales." If y ou did so, I'm sure your sales manager would have a few choice words for you before showing you out the door, and for good cause.
It's about brand loyalty. In this case, the "brand" is the candidate. And once the party has a candidate, we need to pull together.
The other party seems to get it. After all, they managed to get behind George Santos. Surely someone in that district grumbled about that choice. But they didn't do it publicly, that I know of.
### **Looking ahead in NY-21**
We're coming up on a Special Election in NY-21. The snow is piled high in many parts of the district. It's cold. And of course, it's tough to get voters out when there is only one race on the ticket.
I have hired a nationally-proven team to spearhead fundraising, messaging, and compliance.
As soon as I get the nod from the party, I'm rolling out print and digital ads.And as soon as I get the nod from the party leaders, I'm launching a solid ground game.
Together we can -- and we will -- get not only those raw voter numbers up, but the percentages as well.
### **We need to do things differently if we expect to get different results.**
Our percentage slide since 2018 is due to aggressive gains by MAGA voters in rural areas. Democrats can flip NY-21 by fearlessly reaching out to Democrats, Independents, and Moderate Republicans to ask for their votes. Help register more voters and then get them to show up at the polls.
Unify behind a candidate.
Bottom line: those slumping percentages won't change a bit if we don't do something notably different in the upcoming Special Election to fight back against MAGA.
We need help from many hands. Team work makes the dream work.
I hope that you will help by donating (see link below), phonebanking, and, if you are in the district, knocking on doors.
Stay tuned. We've got our own project 2025 in upstate New York.
The best is yet to come.
_You can donate to Paula Collins for Congress at[ActBlue](https://substack.com/redirect/9f324cb8-a8b6-49c9-8528-09a3250de54b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or by sending a check to: Paula Collins for Congress; 441 Old State Road; DeKalb Junction, NY 13630_
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _

name: Congressman Mark Takano
subject: hard truths
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
The American people are pissed off.

| Yesterday was the first day of the new Congress, Peter. **And I want to make one thing clear:**

In 2025, the fights we have to take on won’t just be about Trump. Our most important fights will be over redefining the core values and principles of our two parties, and demonstrating to the American people that Democrats are still far and away the better option for working families in the country.

**The American people are pissed off.** The economy doesn’t work for most folks. The top 1% of Americans own more wealth than the bottom 50%; homelessness skyrocketed 18% in 2024 alone; the cost of groceries, gas, and everyday items have ballooned; meanwhile, wages stagnated and jobs were cut.

**It’s exactly why** I just had the closest re-election of my career and Riverside County flipped to the GOP and Trump for the first time since 2008.

**If other Democrats can’t square those truths with the election results, then we’re doomed.**

Trump and his MAGA cronies will own a trifecta in just over two weeks, _but that doesn’t mean we should throw up our hands for the next two years_.

I’m not wasting time to get back to start building back trust with working families in Riverside county and across the country. If you’re sick of getting emails with empty words linked to an ActBlue page, I won’t blame you. [**But I'm hoping you'll see that this isn't one of those emails. If you’re not willing to roll over and hand the most anti-worker president full control of the government, then I’m asking for your help today »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99850921/521083291/312147918?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20250104_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYxZTQ3ZS1mZGNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=id5IcGwi-sFOZgCGOQneWGIQV-9hmS6tbdMHa_7vXIQ=)

Enough with the platitudes. Let’s roll up our sleeves and really get to work. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99850927/521083297/312147918?amount=7&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20250104_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYxZTQ3ZS1mZGNhLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTliNDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=id5IcGwi-sFOZgCGOQneWGIQV-9hmS6tbdMHa_7vXIQ=)

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time.

clean_body: The American people are pissed off. | Yesterday was the first day of the new Congress, Peter. And I want to make one thing clear: In 2025, the fights we have to take on won’t just be about Trump. Our most important fights will be over redefining the core values and principles of our two parties, and demonstrating to the American people that Democrats are still far and away the better option for working families in the country. The American people are pissed off. The economy doesn’t work for most folks. The top 1% of Americans own more wealth than the bottom 50%; homelessness skyrocketed 18% in 2024 alone; the cost of groceries, gas, and everyday items have ballooned; meanwhile, wages stagnated and jobs were cut. It’s exactly why I just had the closest re-election of my career and Riverside County flipped to the GOP and Trump for the first time since 2008. If other Democrats can’t square those truths with the election results, then we’re doomed. Trump and his MAGA cronies will own a trifecta in just over two weeks, but that doesn’t mean we should throw up our hands for the next two years. I’m not wasting time to get back to start building back trust with working families in Riverside county and across the country. If you’re sick of getting emails with empty words linked to an ActBlue page, I won’t blame you. = Enough with the platitudes. Let’s roll up our sleeves and really get to work. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmf5jk22sn4s134mchcj65t4sfnmgm9okgjklnvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hmeor2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zliim4m648itout07e01kpmji2mnd31024gc0td8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hmeor2c1h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z19ti18v87ds7lts1cv3tc8mjepu7im4f59bkhmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hmeor2c1h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl258rdclgmum5tliddcghtao7tid40s06j21b3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hmeor2c1h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze5p6mk9fqneakv98l2aa5etmfldcr8ksrij980g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hmeor2c1h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4uqepht5ilakcuqk081d100k4m98uv8uncjnvco_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hmeor2c1h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9u8gscm7c085vdu5c6m6hsbieseqrsgufd3vkt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hmeor2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpge2pj7cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z21sd6irioci2irosttbduttrb3rcbgjgdh369no_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hmeor2c1h2bs)_

name: Your Voice Matters
subject: Should We END Daylight Savings Time?
body:
Take Our Poll.

Take Our Poll.

| | |
* * *
---
|
* * *
---
| | Friend, The debate over Daylight Savings Time has continued for years, with many questioning if it’s time to eliminate this outdated practice. _Even President Trump has spoken out in favor of ending it, saying it’s time to bring commonsense solutions to an issue that affects so many Americans._ Polls consistently show that around **60% of Americans support eliminating Daylight Savings Time** – but we want to hear directly from **YOU:** [**_Do you support eliminating Daylight Savings Time? >>>_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu59vngsvk78m0kr6oaqvk299ch4vmo10p4tncqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hmeor4cph2bs)

Polls consistently show that around 60% of Americans support eliminating Daylight Savings Time – but we want to hear directly from YOU: | | | | | While national polls give us a broad perspective, your personal feedback helps shape the decisions we fight for in Washington - your input matters most. President Trump is leading the charge on issues that affect everyday Americans, and we are ready to take action – but first, we need your voice in the conversation. | | | | | | | | * | | Texans For Jodey Arrington - 1312 Texas Avenue Suite 103 - Lubbock, TX 79401 U.S. | | Update For America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via American Defense News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlkq351b0spleqo96ag96fmd6vlhdfvqhsc9jsqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hm1pb2cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbqfumgqogmq039t50a7rg7ak8udq8k4nro1rh6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hm1pb2cdh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu3n3elfud1mn9vund0rqd017vfai700kt1luvh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hm1pb2cdh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8grelvijeujjp58dpr9squuip9fs6ne9mo424k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hm1pb2cdh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk44la39jngv8fld443jt84deh3trlh8i83gpodo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hm1pb2cdh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn3n4mqucqtt6rvjkd3lohh74quq3cr5e17aaieo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1hm1pb2cdh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Mark Trammell
subject: Radicals cancel grandmother for protecting little girls
body:
The radical left is rallying to cancel an 82-year-old grandmother for protecting two little girls from a man

| |
---
| | The radical left is rallying to cancel an 82-year-old grandmother
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7nqep3je47rbht64vnfdaek8ogkf32k0fjgb1vg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm2o76c5h2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,The radical left is rallying to cancel an 82-year-old grandmother for protecting two little girls from a man--who was pretending to be a woman--in the women's locker room. **[**Will you help defend this courageous grandmother today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zakv784t8chv3m1ogms4ha0f8m6ilsuc7g7tmfs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm2o76c5h2bs)** Julie Jaman is an 82-year-old grandmother who's lived in Port Townsend, Washington, for almost forty years. Julie regularly used her local swimming pool that is owned by the City of Port Townsend and operated by the YMCA.After a typical swim at the YMCA pool, Julie went to the women's locker room to shower like she always does.But Julie was surprised to hear a male's voice while she was showering.To her shock, she saw a fully grown man wearing a woman's bathing suit and watching two little girls undress! | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z32s9duisupa20729vqr0gophoeqnd3kijdmc088_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm2o76c5h2bs)
---

**Now the radical left is trying to ruin Julie's future because she stood up for those two little girls -- and Julie is relying on your help.**
The two little girls appeared to be about 4 and 6 years old. Julie believed she was witnessing a predator take advantage of these innocent girls!
So Julie did what any grandmother in that situation would do -- she confronted the man and asked him to leave the bathroom!
But instead of thanking Julie for looking out for those innocent girls, the staff at the YMCA rushed in and began berating Julie for her "_discriminatory"_ response to the predator.
_It gets worse . . ._
Not only did the YMCA attack Julie for protecting two innocent children, it also permanently banned Julie from swimming at that pool!
_. . . then they launched a sophisticated smear campaign to paint Julie as a bigot and a transphobe in her community._
And without your help, Julie will live the rest of her life banned from the pool she used almost daily to stay active. **[**Will you help Julie today by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $25 or more to help us fight Julie's legal battle against the YMCA and the City of Port Townsend in court?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvhcc9qqahm9gbkaj02dbqhfngr0r53511i4al3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm2o76c5h2bs)**
If Americans like you don't stand with Julie today, truth and justice in our country will be gone forever.
That's why the Center for American Liberty is doing everything it can to fight for justice for Julie!
Together with patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty helps everyday citizens beat the radical Left in court!
And now we are taking on the radicals at the YMCA and the City of Port Townsend.
[**Will you help us send a message to the radical YMCA and City of Port Townsend that they can't get away with punishing Julie for speaking out against a man being allowed in the ladies' locker room?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4r0an13tolnketstsf99ua5g585lhjfh4e89ks8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm2o76c5h2bs)
**Your donation today will send a strong message that we will not be silenced. . . we will not allow the left to erase women and endanger children!** **[**Will you give a donation for Julie's defense today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2kldub3mqr6avi5ukcr94aelcgt5slgla3gv870_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm2o76c5h2bs)**
Sadly, the well-funded ACLU and other dark left money groups will join the YMCA's side, undoubtedly. With their deep pockets, they can threaten to ruin Julie's life . . . and bully others into silence.
But today, you can **[help Julie Jaman](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrfjrc09m6cmggc5klm8eshanfutivmrljkn84eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm2o76c5h2bs) **inspire others to continue sticking up for the most vulnerable and fighting back against the left's derangement.
Too many children have been victims of the left's evil and radical ideology. Enough is enough. **[**Will you stand with Julie today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhv9lqeq0ag5voshascq97fg1e1sl2016hvqs22g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm2o76c5h2bs)**
Thank you for your support. With your help, I know the Center for American Liberty can win this case.
|

---
| | Sincerely,Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel
---

subject: We’ve never offered this before...
body:
On January 20, President DONALD TRUMP will take the oath of office...

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z272v6d2g1o9o7v6oshh03i2css678fkt3jnop28_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or4chh2bs)

Friend, On January 20, President DONALD TRUMP will take the oath of office... **_...and Friend, YOU could be there!_**
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk6l24cmpvqelllocipo9gp8aremj56gdhbgp86g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or4chh2bs)
---
**Turning Point USA is offering one special supporter (and their guest) an ALL-EXPENSES-PAID trip for inauguration weekend** - a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME opportunity to be part of one of the most significant moments in modern American history. **[Friend, will you make a generous gift of $25, $50, $100, or more to support Turning Point USA before January 10th? We'll choose the supporter for this special giveaway on January 11th!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zn5st4j3gfpj1lqd9006jk0vjcfbiooj8jgf84uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or4chh2bs)**

[ **Support Turning Point USA now**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0q1n35a7vo7tbh595rprho5pnurlv2iecmh2k80_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or4chh2bs)

---
At Turning Point's AMERICAFEST in December, President Trump stood before thousands of young patriots and declared that a new era of AMERICAN GREATNESS was beginning. **[**Now YOU and your guest have the opportunity to potentially join Turning Point USA to celebrate INAUGURATION WEEKEND:**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zad9n3hqoht5hnnte1s0bt30mrs2nmq9er22clv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or4chh2bs)**
* On SUNDAY midday, join President Trump's pre-inauguration event,

* On SUNDAY evening, enjoy VIP tickets to the Turning Point Inaugural Ball, and

* On MONDAY midday, attend the INAUGURATION of the 47th President in Washington, DC!

Plus, you'll receive round-trip flights to Washington, DC and luxury hotel accommodations for inauguration weekend. **Don't miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to be part of history, Friend.** **[Make your gift of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more by 11:59 PM ET on January 10th-- and you could be the special Turning Point USA supporter who wins this inauguration weekend celebration!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zts4qp5j486patt0l7avknjej6r59orbhbvfdmk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or4chh2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA now**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zisaa1nf8nb4qhbcbbdqse0lk0pmbecjb0r5evf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or4chh2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism and your generous support. In 2024, we worked together to inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again -- and won back an ENTIRE GENERATION in favor of FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM. Now, in 2025, you can help Turning Point USA do more than ever before, starting with this massive celebration of AMERICA'S GOLDEN AGE. **[Please, Friend, don't miss your chance: make your gift right away to secure your chance to join me and Turning Point USA for inauguration weekend.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdjc4et1tpe5vmu778c40ac72ktjqjimll6sdb5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or4chh2bs)**

For America, Charlie Kirk

name: Your Voice Matters
subject: Should We END Daylight Savings Time?
body:
Take Our Poll.

Take Our Poll.

| | |
* * *
---
|
* * *
---
| | Friend, The debate over Daylight Savings Time has continued for years, with many questioning if it’s time to eliminate this outdated practice. _Even President Trump has spoken out in favor of ending it, saying it’s time to bring commonsense solutions to an issue that affects so many Americans._ Polls consistently show that around **60% of Americans support eliminating Daylight Savings Time** – but we want to hear directly from **YOU:** [**_Do you support eliminating Daylight Savings Time? >>>_**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpap4s4ddebdgo79jnov32kar39rnpra05l979m0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0c3h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkc5c5516nicpg39d3u3t4rv9ubnvfeotnk642to_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbdodei0ro7v72ouoa7kgo36vpgboe8mgpoue3d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0cjh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z08h63ium67gq7prp57bdt4dqc7isd8b47s6in70_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0cjh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zogavc6k0q2rttqhmk3k0asvgldou0hguad78alg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0cjh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfvlstchg8ibec6h4upsqama3g0lgtfp4p2kbemg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0cjh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z17s482ilheqcjhpvkbqe0fv92emfaeldjnmj8qg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0cjh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

name: Mark Trammell
subject: Radicals cancel grandmother for protecting little girls
body:
The radical left is rallying to cancel an 82-year-old grandmother for protecting two little girls from a man

| |
---
| | The radical left is rallying to cancel an 82-year-old grandmother
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqd3p18aktc7mbma4vnf4knvfgbq8r4t3itc9o7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0clh2bs)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,The radical left is rallying to cancel an 82-year-old grandmother for protecting two little girls from a man--who was pretending to be a woman--in the women's locker room. **[**Will you help defend this courageous grandmother today?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrstf5sil6ou5copu94r14p7d7n18bv0gtab647o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0clh2bs)** Julie Jaman is an 82-year-old grandmother who's lived in Port Townsend, Washington, for almost forty years. Julie regularly used her local swimming pool that is owned by the City of Port Townsend and operated by the YMCA.After a typical swim at the YMCA pool, Julie went to the women's locker room to shower like she always does.But Julie was surprised to hear a male's voice while she was showering.To her shock, she saw a fully grown man wearing a woman's bathing suit and watching two little girls undress! | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3girsstl3b7en9lf58tht7dtbh60lfns0upho50_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0clh2bs)
---

**Now the radical left is trying to ruin Julie's future because she stood up for those two little girls -- and Julie is relying on your help.**
The two little girls appeared to be about 4 and 6 years old. Julie believed she was witnessing a predator take advantage of these innocent girls!
So Julie did what any grandmother in that situation would do -- she confronted the man and asked him to leave the bathroom!
But instead of thanking Julie for looking out for those innocent girls, the staff at the YMCA rushed in and began berating Julie for her "_discriminatory"_ response to the predator.
_It gets worse . . ._
Not only did the YMCA attack Julie for protecting two innocent children, it also permanently banned Julie from swimming at that pool!
_. . . then they launched a sophisticated smear campaign to paint Julie as a bigot and a transphobe in her community._
And without your help, Julie will live the rest of her life banned from the pool she used almost daily to stay active. **[**Will you help Julie today by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $25 or more to help us fight Julie's legal battle against the YMCA and the City of Port Townsend in court?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjdi189qotjgvpqplhahavehfnqnamh1b30sg8sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0clh2bs)**
If Americans like you don't stand with Julie today, truth and justice in our country will be gone forever.
That's why the Center for American Liberty is doing everything it can to fight for justice for Julie!
Together with patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty helps everyday citizens beat the radical Left in court!
And now we are taking on the radicals at the YMCA and the City of Port Townsend.
[**Will you help us send a message to the radical YMCA and City of Port Townsend that they can't get away with punishing Julie for speaking out against a man being allowed in the ladies' locker room?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9rsb7mctnmui9dcivr3jtk4ob8vm26fb2ou6u9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0clh2bs)
**Your donation today will send a strong message that we will not be silenced. . . we will not allow the left to erase women and endanger children!** **[**Will you give a donation for Julie's defense today?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvk8vk1s4jn6iid8r0qnlf3kv6f8t10rdbm9h2ng_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0clh2bs)**
Sadly, the well-funded ACLU and other dark left money groups will join the YMCA's side, undoubtedly. With their deep pockets, they can threaten to ruin Julie's life . . . and bully others into silence.
But today, you can **[help Julie Jaman](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1698p68fotqnmrp03u4iq5uooqnetlfviaho1ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0clh2bs) **inspire others to continue sticking up for the most vulnerable and fighting back against the left's derangement.
Too many children have been victims of the left's evil and radical ideology. Enough is enough. **[**Will you stand with Julie today?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z117tmpt7o972p03inti72k23jflsjdl4mskkql0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0clh2bs)**
Thank you for your support. With your help, I know the Center for American Liberty can win this case.
|

---
| | Sincerely,Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zghk6mao3it4rc0eeqfssji9v40m7up36c1hndso_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm6or0clh2bs)

body:
Your response is missing

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvipa9kb4luf0aqtu4pt2vtgcbv9kmrms9hfqsv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm1ob2c3h2bs)

A gunshot is an impulse high decibel noise, which can be harmful to the human ear, so much so that even a single shot can cause permanent damage without the right [hearing protection.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19613/6374453/d78e8239682a27a376b3c607aedb93bf6cb890f0/10274002a3f166db1f25b1f73515ddb8818609c9) **Depending on the caliber of the firearm, every gunshot registers above the safe hearing DB levels, at which hearing damage can occur quickly.**
EarArmor.com's Earmuffs Rated with a Noise Reduction Rating (NRR) of 21, EarArmor offers best-in-class hearing protection from noise levels across all firearm calibers.

**[Order Your Pair of EarArmor.com Earmuffs& Save 50% Off Today!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19613/6374453/d78e8239682a27a376b3c607aedb93bf6cb890f0/10274002a3f166db1f25b1f73515ddb8818609c9)** On Your 6,

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final chance to save my home...

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z798bfv3lc7lvsiqs4ib400pk80kv00spq7cjjh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm9pj6c1h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjggpllj1snsal3o6fn2ob9ac9ckivdmjg60ahp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1jm9pj6c1h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: C.S. Lewis Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Great American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zc780o56v7tjum6qu3t90ocoun1ruehc1sknr868_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1ge0oj6c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zq2v4lefp2ismuovs2nrckapn7d349uur08l1p3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1ge0oj6c5h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zba7a4pi1sqfdfmaksefcsc46dq7e3pungjpdeg8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1ge0oj6c5h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3coonufo8r1sadr03sdug1t4kp42ruas5kkbbvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1ge0oj6c5h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1dm573o3rmcs19u1v9vrov1r097km3ed5ujpuq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1ge0oj6c5h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjprggkmgpsqvt31tq1uj5pdh6fogsovd1si0lco_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1ge0oj6c5h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m going to trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final chance to save my home...

They want “SEVERE” sanctions against me.
| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1grlf4mfg8jtn2a49atfhbqefi4he9qn3an2n08_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1ge8p34cph2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I didn’t want to bother you over the Christmas holiday, but I now have something very important to share with you.
---
Reports indicate that my trial is set to begin on January 16 – just days before President Trump’s inauguration.
---
**_This trial will determine whether the Left can seize my home in Florida and truly leave me with NOTHING. This is my _final_ chance to save my home._**
---
Since there’s no way I can pay the outrageous $148 MILLION judgment against me, they want to rob me of everything I own.
---
They want irreplaceable mementos I gave to my only son. They want personal gifts that I was given by allies abroad to show solidarity with America after the tragedy of September 11th.
---
During these difficult times, Christmas reminded me of what’s _truly_ important in life. Earthly possessions come and go – homes, cars, money all come to an end. But the Bible reminds us that _eternal_ “heavenly treasures” await us.
---
The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than any earthly possession.
---
**I’d rather lose everything than betray what I know to be true. I could never lie and say what I'm going through is a fair and honest process just to hang on to my possessions.**
---
_"_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)_
---
**As I prepare for my January trial, I’m asking patriots like you to make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust so that I can keep fighting for my freedom and justice against a rigged and weaponized legal system.**
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in.**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z6h2fq8nfpkp5s3998o5lddah71lpb78r4so7jv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3c1ge8p34cph2bs)

body:

_January 5th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
I’ve got something here you’re gonna want to see:

In fact, you’ll never see the world the same way again...

Because these new goggles will let you peer through the darkest, moonless night like it’s high noon!

In fact, these night vision binoculars are so powerful, we’ve dubbed them...

**[Claim Your 7-Level Infrared Night Vision Binoculars - 50% OFF!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19614/6374453/2f91de47b3c54526da32020b52053bf50698c9e2/1d5dc17bca125d7102d383f5ecaa7d5180becb30) **

Once reserved for the SEALs and Special Ops, this battlefield technology is now available to civilians.

**[Check it out](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19614/6374453/2f91de47b3c54526da32020b52053bf50698c9e2/1d5dc17bca125d7102d383f5ecaa7d5180becb30)** : These bad boys have real-time IR night vision with 5X magnification, video recording and playback.

Plus they’re IP54 water resistant.

Thanks to an exclusive distribution agreement, I’m able to offer these DarkForce binos to you at an insane 50% OFF discount...

While supplies last, I’m throwing in a free neck strap, charging cable and **free shipping!** **[Grab your Night Vision Binoculars before we run out](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19614/6374453/2f91de47b3c54526da32020b52053bf50698c9e2/1d5dc17bca125d7102d383f5ecaa7d5180becb30)**

P.S. These bad boys have 7 levels of IR intensity, are USB rechargeable (no batteries needed), and they’re super compact.

One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02c461181ada4a69800c01f4877cf41d&_e=U1eQYK06vqiL5wzJpUSSnHSXW7QB4UyfW9ceDfzAGGjdC1J4IIpBsiFLPjM9FxNL7XiPQe3um_fLTvfkh-7nW397IUco24Zig-Q5hrVEMW83Lwpq8H_1hX9AZ-o5XPjF4lMq-0ogqS7UcwmJFqE10m7zG6mAQJoC6H2D8aEmskd_0CG79EVaBFfFomKe5z5Pdh8lXP94Ur2A9mB41-c7TTlTlaGF3dAeqca1ZmDgLbTO9yXZNn1JK84Su6Lv05v0uCKHvsOVD4BpcPbRXLIaPf1vwWWqEwcSb8wc6maAquN9NJRDPHPYv80ogRUF1EHHlDB2ObGhdvd8UEtjU-kDIBPIYFnZ05f1I1NNC2tE6I0PqfFO3cTpNyy-XQ3RC4VncAENgtYI7CkPHZAYwsAkv-i2v-UeYOnebDMyFA5sadiAt-DjgxYh27mfHZCNO2Jv) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02c461181ada4a69800c01f4877cf41d&_e=U1eQYK06vqiL5wzJpUSSnHSXW7QB4UyfW9ceDfzAGGjdC1J4IIpBsiFLPjM9FxNL7XiPQe3um_fLTvfkh-7nW397IUco24Zig-Q5hrVEMW83Lwpq8H_1hX9AZ-o5XPjF4lMq-0ogqS7UcwmJFqE10m7zG6mAQJoC6H2D8aEmskd_0CG79EVaBFfFomKe5z5Pdh8lXP94Ur2A9mB41-c7TTlTlaGF3dAeqca1ZmDgLbTO9yXZNn1JK84Su6Lv05v0uCKHvsOVD4BpcPbRXLIaPf1vwWWqEwcSb8wc6maAquMvQd54doVuRCYJDYe75DdXK0WJF9POyk14pRPZ330ugniRM50mNdw2K2ZGnxFpvnHzqnRD2JFB__X4Lhc8zGin5Hr6H2cbUepYdDLZYjNmhpjM28FZS3dtUkBcwxRd8bV7Kva-PPAaJxu7F_7YR0GM)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02c461181ada4a69800c01f4877cf41d&_e=U1eQYK06vqiL5wzJpUSSnHSXW7QB4UyfW9ceDfzAGGjdC1J4IIpBsiFLPjM9FxNL7XiPQe3um_fLTvfkh-7nW397IUco24Zig-Q5hrVEMW83Lwpq8H_1hX9AZ-o5XPjF4lMq-0ogqS7UcwmJFqE10m7zG6mAQJoC6H2D8aEmskd_0CG79EVaBFfFomKe5z5Pdh8lXP94Ur2A9mB41-c7TTlTlaGF3dAeqca1ZmDgLbTO9yXZNn1JK84Su6Lv05v0uCKHvsOVD4BpcPbRXLIaPf1vwWWqEwcSb8wc6maAquP1Kwb2fCaRmk2wnWE6WrcOo-t5MmVSgDAbONZV4EkGH9KG42r3PHtrVrBI8g_XzsgIuj3zEI1VyKTIo_BzlDux_C0JvIVv4WZqUHxLNwfAFpcCWkXRniwY51q0yl6CAro0fx5Nle2UlLegcRrb6MzH),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02c461181ada4a69800c01f4877cf41d&_e=U1eQYK06vqiL5wzJpUSSnHSXW7QB4UyfW9ceDfzAGGjdC1J4IIpBsiFLPjM9FxNL7XiPQe3um_fLTvfkh-7nW397IUco24Zig-Q5hrVEMW83Lwpq8H_1hX9AZ-o5XPjF4lMq-0ogqS7UcwmJFqE10m7zG6mAQJoC6H2D8aEmskd_0CG79EVaBFfFomKe5z5Pdh8lXP94Ur2A9mB41-c7TTlTlaGF3dAeqca1ZmDgLbTO9yXZNn1JK84Su6Lv05v0uCKHvsOVD4BpcPbRXLIaPf1vwWWqEwcSb8wc6maAquMnNb7U0KL0w1bQuPbaZc2oQWVy98Mk28E22q-VUKkDuhC_ZENKDYxg-UHp2qSZwJzXLY3pXgJ4OOw4MCq8Wm4vxSe-8am7oDS7eiK99eIi5I6HBxdWazCtAeCuOSCP8CrwSAkQ0A_OsvfcodgJjB__) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02c461181ada4a69800c01f4877cf41d&_e=U1eQYK06vqiL5wzJpUSSnHSXW7QB4UyfW9ceDfzAGGjdC1J4IIpBsiFLPjM9FxNL7XiPQe3um_fLTvfkh-7nW397IUco24Zig-Q5hrVEMW83Lwpq8H_1hX9AZ-o5XPjF4lMq-0ogqS7UcwmJFqE10m7zG6mAQJoC6H2D8aEmskd_0CG79EVaBFfFomKe5z5Pdh8lXP94Ur2A9mB41-c7TTlTlaGF3dAeqca1ZmDgLbTO9yXZNn1JK84Su6Lv05v0uCKHvsOVD4BpcPbRXLIaPf1vwWWqEwcSb8wc6maAquPdi7pLAyN5vCEBJh_e6ss85FudcxL86-2mtIiAi2P5fV1a5SytNIvFdWlc7VnJkMtV2DINmIJqJ924YPLyt8DDldcX1ayjWYuI6xyFcOLm3h8nfk2z81RzxJ1WoK7qncspXfzIOKSkisSuwPu5RAFJ)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02c461181ada4a69800c01f4877cf41d&_e=U1eQYK06vqiL5wzJpUSSnHSXW7QB4UyfW9ceDfzAGGjdC1J4IIpBsiFLPjM9FxNL7XiPQe3um_fLTvfkh-7nW397IUco24Zig-Q5hrVEMW83Lwpq8H_1hX9AZ-o5XPjF4lMq-0ogqS7UcwmJFqE10m7zG6mAQJoC6H2D8aEmskd_0CG79EVaBFfFomKe5z5Pdh8lXP94Ur2A9mB41-c7TTlTlaGF3dAeqca1ZmDgLbTO9yXZNn1JK84Su6Lv05v0uCKHvsOVD4BpcPbRXLIaPf1vwWWqEwcSb8wc6maAquMwVdd1HA0_jrgus_Yl07fUc1qraYgASUBkDByb7vFa6255Ir48_h-5vZmwrVd4cMpZwBHzwOAzN0s-zFAB9xehMDwn2P_NXrL8czb_7Ft6laCK3WbXXfS6gZlW06h5f22qyF3xR1saKlDAbKdrwbll) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d7ba16b284474170afd88149cb754a37&_e=2y6Z3gCylJxV9RG51LM4mOZ5Fsi0H1cUXggBlusTkLq70EDX-Ik7otPJdEjcpnkiE608RjdKOyc1isDS6pL7T5qieyeIWUtB7KhkKbCRBgpJtEcaKVEqA2zDTCsmu7SIWl1M3bJcIcbCLIAgt_V5IC7Zh20BRPVXHA13i_7nauSBEcd7MT-5wgI_B4wGL_4Y0h-BWl3_lA6FQGdwyNwUH-uFj6Tht-eAANN7-IvkkqRlwaXJi8ouQqIbXZnNqyBiw4l6f0j80Vr9o7tT1Wl9SVmX8CZUXZBlktb7kN2H_8WiYBepDlkipAYovMWb-DMg6m2anil2oK0x4uF_bRVO3iisEpxwirStX6hoXFYFnULQpMrs_ytLjynFDVaE0ol3q5tX4nkluSAl2-kfZUi7YQ%3D%3D) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." clean_body: Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN! Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN! With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you , you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc8fc4ccab1f42e397ad24b1ac215a91&_e=Ly67bV_Go0XB9FDPIoMLMhcB_yZI__ESkaUtJiPR1h7OLbLDxTPXqWz1JVi0OG6_Yg3No03v7z87BgB_vMv_dtCjLSKeDW6RX0aGCmSNCbuIl5niwNkf8nffMAny2M6sU-Rn2KYddajr0rPmxsQuOT8CmelqEUQzJZO5-hiUsThQvqzjEy1LrNwMn_t0kRjqG6upomN_WRes2iSZRhZ-psVA8mHKO4S7S8UEo7HMqz66FiniaequPamHel1asc3gCiotMhvDXaqg90FO5dq2e_dQE5-qW72xIbiKqHiTrOsV-ur8YXtCaPT1Jfi0iy4uubBW0dt3qvqNtm1uqFov6YrXQSya1Kpqbn543I4hgYDZDOuCUJqGj3rjNubpy5I_F3kPTRy74akc9FDan0FYOlQjTy7iMo5-GhvOnhtstB6hxl8IZjUy54vNVKhDuL7k) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc8fc4ccab1f42e397ad24b1ac215a91&_e=Ly67bV_Go0XB9FDPIoMLMhcB_yZI__ESkaUtJiPR1h7OLbLDxTPXqWz1JVi0OG6_Yg3No03v7z87BgB_vMv_dtCjLSKeDW6RX0aGCmSNCbuIl5niwNkf8nffMAny2M6sU-Rn2KYddajr0rPmxsQuOT8CmelqEUQzJZO5-hiUsThQvqzjEy1LrNwMn_t0kRjqG6upomN_WRes2iSZRhZ-psVA8mHKO4S7S8UEo7HMqz66FiniaequPamHel1asc3gCiotMhvDXaqg90FO5dq2e_dQE5-qW72xIbiKqHiTrOsRazi_w8YpVVlIru_hgnmUcGVLQYCyJD0Di2zsYY-pWDXzrgPRapZrsTBhVdSGsVZZQKHiKVaO2XP76IkNHXGh141FBaHWCM49UZ22wJP_DmOg49vuKAHkNl1SkHwL8K7ULALhODesNXTXI5pffpF3)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc8fc4ccab1f42e397ad24b1ac215a91&_e=Ly67bV_Go0XB9FDPIoMLMhcB_yZI__ESkaUtJiPR1h7OLbLDxTPXqWz1JVi0OG6_Yg3No03v7z87BgB_vMv_dtCjLSKeDW6RX0aGCmSNCbuIl5niwNkf8nffMAny2M6sU-Rn2KYddajr0rPmxsQuOT8CmelqEUQzJZO5-hiUsThQvqzjEy1LrNwMn_t0kRjqG6upomN_WRes2iSZRhZ-psVA8mHKO4S7S8UEo7HMqz66FiniaequPamHel1asc3gCiotMhvDXaqg90FO5dq2e_dQE5-qW72xIbiKqHiTrOvaXEDNV3zWGJuOLIaMKKbvAtMxjz93AIWXhhzHooj6hQ9xf42fy7nTecg98HCP_O3mbyLoTttWXICSl0S1UE3cnZCDwt8GrEZf6UG5GhbT2QFBVidE05BAgFG1qOSXKcTLaweb66Gw4YwklaYd25Fr),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc8fc4ccab1f42e397ad24b1ac215a91&_e=Ly67bV_Go0XB9FDPIoMLMhcB_yZI__ESkaUtJiPR1h7OLbLDxTPXqWz1JVi0OG6_Yg3No03v7z87BgB_vMv_dtCjLSKeDW6RX0aGCmSNCbuIl5niwNkf8nffMAny2M6sU-Rn2KYddajr0rPmxsQuOT8CmelqEUQzJZO5-hiUsThQvqzjEy1LrNwMn_t0kRjqG6upomN_WRes2iSZRhZ-psVA8mHKO4S7S8UEo7HMqz66FiniaequPamHel1asc3gCiotMhvDXaqg90FO5dq2e_dQE5-qW72xIbiKqHiTrOveR1aTNm-nlSKbL45MV4ZBkazFuD7AimWJf-9UfcEf3H_GQ90V5CpScq7pmZPKXL7l-PfEZ0bYSImjRf6QFtXeb4CYdW6rALwW-ERfBy_Kf-KVMK9cVezbts_5gD9VW254_9Y4h_O5AABTSb35EJYl) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc8fc4ccab1f42e397ad24b1ac215a91&_e=Ly67bV_Go0XB9FDPIoMLMhcB_yZI__ESkaUtJiPR1h7OLbLDxTPXqWz1JVi0OG6_Yg3No03v7z87BgB_vMv_dtCjLSKeDW6RX0aGCmSNCbuIl5niwNkf8nffMAny2M6sU-Rn2KYddajr0rPmxsQuOT8CmelqEUQzJZO5-hiUsThQvqzjEy1LrNwMn_t0kRjqG6upomN_WRes2iSZRhZ-psVA8mHKO4S7S8UEo7HMqz66FiniaequPamHel1asc3gCiotMhvDXaqg90FO5dq2e_dQE5-qW72xIbiKqHiTrOtVntOJMhkgkDU9rjn_64o67PT2Bgx2D9W0FvJxEbExTqsFDbAWQdrsKQUwUc-GKXR76yGPPlS3QZ7qK6Io-ra3YeErXGCl79lIifweUL9HiZgyJQnqqiJCKfwFj_so6buCV8JRFWF1LWwIR4qEjA53)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc8fc4ccab1f42e397ad24b1ac215a91&_e=Ly67bV_Go0XB9FDPIoMLMhcB_yZI__ESkaUtJiPR1h7OLbLDxTPXqWz1JVi0OG6_Yg3No03v7z87BgB_vMv_dtCjLSKeDW6RX0aGCmSNCbuIl5niwNkf8nffMAny2M6sU-Rn2KYddajr0rPmxsQuOT8CmelqEUQzJZO5-hiUsThQvqzjEy1LrNwMn_t0kRjqG6upomN_WRes2iSZRhZ-psVA8mHKO4S7S8UEo7HMqz66FiniaequPamHel1asc3gCiotMhvDXaqg90FO5dq2e_dQE5-qW72xIbiKqHiTrOuNwwR9KcPUNjNZEEIamvLc3Wmac0RcNgXWv6SLfhf8qPB8OZ-Jv0gBzYCe45pWlASFnVqA2Y0IcF96dZ3CbZsZVEplfDabzH04JPqxGA1gwm6D1zXEdZa1knXkxOSeO_gL8zvC4JE0DrkdQ_qlpylS) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a482ac79aae440f89bbf2f43818bbd3d&_e=IqELAFopizL0baDYxKgywiHButP9rh0ZBs90-LqSBj4Fmj59HySF58-7zt2zQve7ZAU6nmQPdD_tr3DCFPg07cZNRL-rxEED8kGH8CTaFf56tTeP4m_KQJ9_XZttggmfZsi1npka8RUHh3-9C5UqZK0h7mymf4MeFF_zKntzCljVJ9KnYBqZY1dtgQRbVvTuNdi0d0VM0U2oQwIm1GGyR9PGD6CfyfjMmY0b-wVBifGnPK9YeejHxu_ZjNulOrm7i7tfGWv5yRripFzVUkgi-u7L6psqD6sgjzL-sB2iPC7XcxmPjgl3mhi7BvbWAIStjAqc65KxHNWM2ItjIOhk2Yr7L9PEnQqeUxy8CXP0wT15PJLwgpUlR5_k-mUNrEvn5-8KoHOmgeMgSaTZgLGzjmgRcb6WjeWYPRKw7QKWlYAcFrWxHkqCRwvuTDT73dBM) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a482ac79aae440f89bbf2f43818bbd3d&_e=IqELAFopizL0baDYxKgywiHButP9rh0ZBs90-LqSBj4Fmj59HySF58-7zt2zQve7ZAU6nmQPdD_tr3DCFPg07cZNRL-rxEED8kGH8CTaFf56tTeP4m_KQJ9_XZttggmfZsi1npka8RUHh3-9C5UqZK0h7mymf4MeFF_zKntzCljVJ9KnYBqZY1dtgQRbVvTuNdi0d0VM0U2oQwIm1GGyR9PGD6CfyfjMmY0b-wVBifGnPK9YeejHxu_ZjNulOrm7i7tfGWv5yRripFzVUkgi-u7L6psqD6sgjzL-sB2iPC6E4XpFk9a22rNrGmU1t5ImTlTC8Ls7vnh7Z5pfSh6ble6F869HnLa5k7HBfThQ_TFLFq4ixgXO6-bED2sZWdy1-x4t3SRY-fS8lzR1BwMnJRa0Nbe_p0yYID8ryV6CaK0fMB-S5PX80kgvNSzgnpl-)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a482ac79aae440f89bbf2f43818bbd3d&_e=IqELAFopizL0baDYxKgywiHButP9rh0ZBs90-LqSBj4Fmj59HySF58-7zt2zQve7ZAU6nmQPdD_tr3DCFPg07cZNRL-rxEED8kGH8CTaFf56tTeP4m_KQJ9_XZttggmfZsi1npka8RUHh3-9C5UqZK0h7mymf4MeFF_zKntzCljVJ9KnYBqZY1dtgQRbVvTuNdi0d0VM0U2oQwIm1GGyR9PGD6CfyfjMmY0b-wVBifGnPK9YeejHxu_ZjNulOrm7i7tfGWv5yRripFzVUkgi-u7L6psqD6sgjzL-sB2iPC57brDQPsXrXS7NMoWHt9yniBKLF7B9tnGElxbVPFAkgDb7xK95WMkI10L2VQRZqCDoct8Wsb0RXgAjtEdfF6tNG5A5tTqB9dYJA-ozCV17M3DgS1FbLwr1SdTQtl25ZVqqYx42HhiEfUZu2xbdZY5c) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, "" has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching "," we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of "-" on DVD today. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates.
