name: 4Patriots
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37cf8bbe87324903b509c98b0eaa4911&_e=ISfjQE2XW9ZsfAwOzXTxCayJ4j-zzcK71rYcScuj1F2w4i4tA2jl7RrkZCygYdFat6tcdf4xTbx3Mx7CBhlg7NvFMTBjp9Yg5RIURO18oE0Jv-Ngr00paXK1Y3_hrM6ZW6FwY5vy-NzkiAJNDOd6OqNmfbBZCz07t2GA0zbtXenZktR4Gj4-ZqopVOBpWubM5-OSq-ln4AQxIFboe9aIb01I3oQULnV1BljoyLM7bVeumqKH6aIhfsES-bnx0ETaWG0A3jz7b5_qBuCmICsOjOzR-cU3dQdaSu12jJy3CY0ENc7zKWSqDOHrg6I52g1y5vYbCBdbeh-hWxSTeptiylUbm8G0vziCMu2Sn-IVVSxIpsBxtT7UqVFT0fuV-Ofs88PzHs9vQtqtBWGv-dK02g%3D%3D), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37cf8bbe87324903b509c98b0eaa4911&_e=ISfjQE2XW9ZsfAwOzXTxCayJ4j-zzcK71rYcScuj1F2w4i4tA2jl7RrkZCygYdFat6tcdf4xTbx3Mx7CBhlg7NvFMTBjp9Yg5RIURO18oE0Jv-Ngr00paXK1Y3_hrM6ZW6FwY5vy-NzkiAJNDOd6OqNmfbBZCz07t2GA0zbtXenZktR4Gj4-ZqopVOBpWubM5-OSq-ln4AQxIFboe9aIb01I3oQULnV1BljoyLM7bVfpfeze7U_tpzUsiPUhgz4wrMLqMt1faQQ0WozXsN22fBp52mgOaa7KuL-vLeyJIsINbA-LpC4HFdPjJyVOqBcnIUNmo6jdlhHbrwBQNQAfDwRsbEXvR8QcsSEIXPiUAVN7Xb7s2k0A-9DQDEJUPQY9Sub4z31RMpTq7Kb4kiLALQ%3D%3D) [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37cf8bbe87324903b509c98b0eaa4911&_e=ISfjQE2XW9ZsfAwOzXTxCayJ4j-zzcK71rYcScuj1F2w4i4tA2jl7RrkZCygYdFat6tcdf4xTbx3Mx7CBhlg7NvFMTBjp9Yg5RIURO18oE0Jv-Ngr00paXK1Y3_hrM6ZW6FwY5vy-NzkiAJNDOd6OqNmfbBZCz07t2GA0zbtXenZktR4Gj4-ZqopVOBpWubM5-OSq-ln4AQxIFboe9aIb01I3oQULnV1BljoyLM7bVfeWnynFfsQHhH1G_n4iWIGjqYTeG_KiFGRx1lzIokjNo7QAsLRrj6tc7XjeKj2Z2_HoY9Q3sQLAijI-CaNngJSp30xuTehYRyclqN3t-7aVa-pAgwBIu8flIWoEENRkJDGRxlmVx1upkj8gxQx-TOfaeUdxUChExFZIp0C15PZkQ%3D%3D) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37cf8bbe87324903b509c98b0eaa4911&_e=ISfjQE2XW9ZsfAwOzXTxCayJ4j-zzcK71rYcScuj1F2w4i4tA2jl7RrkZCygYdFat6tcdf4xTbx3Mx7CBhlg7NvFMTBjp9Yg5RIURO18oE0Jv-Ngr00paXK1Y3_hrM6ZW6FwY5vy-NzkiAJNDOd6OqNmfbBZCz07t2GA0zbtXenZktR4Gj4-ZqopVOBpWubM5-OSq-ln4AQxIFboe9aIb01I3oQULnV1BljoyLM7bVcekmsfmvk1XU-dWIakZMfL0DGiF18SVgb8nrwaPsXpbRKmGnpZbpa0rtxnXKzsZymGKKG0WFTAaOUKkava4FYKTVFfXz_D0sdUbUEAw2cYvf8ipcIx8EAHGx9rlQqnYh_L43YpyBg8mhyH3dBPUJglCdORj2--954bErUAvMCV-Q%3D%3D) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37cf8bbe87324903b509c98b0eaa4911&_e=ISfjQE2XW9ZsfAwOzXTxCayJ4j-zzcK71rYcScuj1F2w4i4tA2jl7RrkZCygYdFat6tcdf4xTbx3Mx7CBhlg7NvFMTBjp9Yg5RIURO18oE0Jv-Ngr00paXK1Y3_hrM6ZW6FwY5vy-NzkiAJNDOd6OqNmfbBZCz07t2GA0zbtXenZktR4Gj4-ZqopVOBpWubM5-OSq-ln4AQxIFboe9aIb01I3oQULnV1BljoyLM7bVcdFZlTIEXacMdomRUeADhJP-4dBWnKN0THGNOfw6CTtboTqwJGwSbW1PPcC-WgPMkrslqr1zsWbuU35xLCvet3W-pOuu8giRdFdQFoGMZJmOAhkEr2Cd_0-30_ZqRP9qjfjN895jDqURwrB0ObpufN9k5KU1qnS6G5_X_ZUNArXg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN! Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN! With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you , you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. # Sunday, January 5, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1933, construction began on the Golden Gate Bridge. Workers began excavating 3.25 million cubic feet of dirt for the bridge’s huge anchorages. ([See Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71u7CAQxfGngW4tBow_CoorXbnbVIkipbHADOuJ8LLxYhO_feT0ac-RftL__TpeLUW6317sgiaHNEoh9UXARejRW4rHWHNvAqJExdFAqxrRNj1oPhsVnBe28y7YyfWu76Rr3QRdD9Kh9oqTOTUBQgMokF3Vey10Y6fGdRhsAFYL9JTTWn0muucZQzzSjms1pYVHM-f8eDL1j8mByaGUUh1py5vD8z8Xm6eZqWFn6v_3XraPrzfaXxNfjX8UipGeTctqcVssxV8y_5W4G_kTAAD__0ZDVEw)) New Year's resolutions are easy to imagine and hard to execute—sort of like a massive construction project. How are you doing so far? Remember, you don't have to build the bridge in one day. Just take care of today! Turn resolutions into results with today's sponsor, [Babbel](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2q4zAQRp9G7mJmNJYUFyoWjLssLFtsaWR5lGiRf5CVmLz9JcltbztzOHycf5fh4mKKy_W3m9mWsA4SpDoBnkANk4vpOTTVZAOzZKrYoiENRreoqpttfOO5NQ7Y-THIFo3BxoMePQGFsa2ifdkAQSESynPdTgqUdl6PZw4uoGiAp1jWXP9f41JuHNJzfXCu_TpXyd5K2XZBv4TsheyP46hnjkvh7HkrL0bInkxL8o-QvVIX_fdFUn-Pk6AO6YxKSL3fRxTUfauHLcfZ5efnIQV1Cx974lI4f24kqAMcQL1bVNlO2xFTirs2ooHr7GJ67ys_9XpY-RUAAP__O_BpKw), the language learning software.
|
---
## Winter Storm Rolls Across America
One of the [strongest winter storms](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFygzAQRL9GdGIkgYQpVKShc9qUzCEd5hJhecQZ7L_PkD7NNrvzduZ9XccrUKL77RNW9Dzn0ShjpdJS2TECpffYVtHPiAabCr3uGqc612tbLb63xlmHE5imn4KLIeqp08E20HetM1NF_qQprazWjTaXuo9WWQfBTRecYdaiVRiJc6m_M915wTm9846lDnmtkl-YH5toPoQZhBmO46jhRXk7W2GGky3MoPQZ7TmgO2ORG-eyyoV4k89NQglMQeYnTwXhRz5ygiL3XBhfVfHxcVBKtLlOtOq2AqW_b_7Pxe7NbwAAAP__qjVguw) in a decade is making its way across the Midwest toward the East Coast. Fueled by the polar vortex, the storm is headed east from the Rocky Mountains and icing over roads with freezing rain and low temperatures, making travel dangerous and shutting down air traffic, including the Kansas City Chiefs' [team flight](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O5CAQBOCnwRkW4N8JCC5xNpdeaDXQjPsWgwVoLM_Tr7z5JhWVPpXq33N9AgWKr7-wo64-rUqogQvJxbA6oHCtfeO0R1TYNajl1I1iGh9yaDZtJocIc48orAJheyVn03s5TPBAg74hfWtCikHKTqq5fbhBDCPY0czowUvWC3RUU27_J4p1Qx-u9Mbc2rQ3QW-1HoV1f5hamFrO82ytKeVIuZa7wdQSfbgTz8LUYjdCX_gRICI3mW6Nl5ohOnQcKv-CWKBwS_XiQPmGOOzkONmL2xQdVUqxcBPo84Hs-Ak5UnwxtTRZu-OkEKiME-vFawcKPzPrb7e9tfoOAAD__zczc_I) to Denver, which was delayed for hours yesterday. In Nebraska, westbound lanes of [I-80 closed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0UD1vxCAU-zVkI3oP8jkwdMl2XTtGL-FxoSVwCtxF9--rdO9ie7Bsy1-3-UY--Hj_pJ1NcWlWoFoJKKGdLfnwnpvKGsesWFdssNcd9N2IbbWZAZUFpRdSGtk57BG6EaweUdPaA1beXGmA0CJqVEM92hbajtZuGdiRQ9EAW1_SUX8nH8vGLrzTi496TXsVzFbKIwv9IdQk1HSeZ_2T4xLSSqG5LEJNV4FQE-AFlzo5lyU9o5WBImfp5QByDSmzlZHpkPeDopU-h4vsk-V6UN6EmqrD2MfpQ_C560UD9518-FtS_nvmZdRvAAAA__8h82N-) yesterday after a crash, and snow continues to fall atop the ice formed by freezing mist. Winter storm and ice storm warnings are in effect across the central Plains and the Ohio Valley, and the Washington D.C. region [is braced](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAUAL8Gb1gP8IMwMHTxlq4dLQrPMRU2kUFB_vsq3TufdKf7ui93n3I6Hp9-J9fWskiQyEFwwCX6lK9lGqJbiSSpgZwwSoPRVuCwOZh8CIhRaTTaaGEp4GSjVWCtRjsNyb1tIACFUELeRhsRUPugv2-0-lWwCSimVs7xp6SjbbTmq7zoHEPZh-y21p6VqQ8mZybn3vt4-a2UN2VyPqhXJucYeD1K57WVc-drOSn42jhygUKBNeY2bm3Pw-nis6ecU9WGTfDYfcp_nfbf98vJ3wAAAP__09RYgw) for 5-10 inches of snow. ## New Orleans Attacker Planned to Detonate Bombs
Shamsud-Din Jabbar, who plowed into a crowded New Orleans street in an ISIS-inspired attack that killed 14 people on New Year’s Day, had [planned to detonate two explosive devices](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1u7CAUBOCnsTssfgx4C4rbuNvbprSO8WH3JBhWQOzs20cbpU33SSONRvN2Xa5AkdLtP-zoWsiL5FIzLhjXywYUn8vYby4gSlQ9OmGV4dZchO7vzkwgJ-RotTbCc6tsgJVbGIF7IZTsyb3auOBaCCXkNFw2zbUBb9YJAwTRjRw3arkM75lSu2OIz3xgGXze--jurT1qp_51cu7kfJ7nkFaf8KyvvJPzi52cPyv7VcKT5RIRUmXQGvgP1gqkulNrWBh-PWKudCDb8CCPlQUqyIDKmlYWVmLFJxCTkVL1xW2Pk2Kkamw38tsOFH92tb9-Opz8DgAA___YYGwf) on Bourbon Street, according to the FBI. Authorities say the U.S. Army veteran used [a very rare explosive compound](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu3CAQRb8Gd6wAG7wuKNK4e2lTrgYYdifCYAHPjv8-cvq090hHV-fX1-sLKFF-_4QNbY_lpYTSXEgu9CsApes1DcFGRIXjgFbOoxGzWaQePhajc8IFAy4CCh3VHME5ZfyyeP2cYCB724QUWspRqudjCVpoA964J0aIkk0CA_VSH78L5f7BmK5yYH34sg3JfnrfGxt_MLUytZ7n-cjOZzzbzZlaM70_PV38nphaDwpYmFo36FgJEv9uGDhljn_2VBodyAMe5LHxhLHfJOPJS00IuXFfcgfKGHiFityXbS_f-RYc2Dq9oZfaeIOLK_WctByX2Sg5VBv2k1KiZmY2ifcGlP797__reVj1NwAA__-JPnxH) in the two devices that has never been used in a U.S. terrorist attack. It remains unclear whether the failure was due to a malfunction, lack of activation, or another issue. Federal authorities searching Jabbar’s home in Houston found [bomb-making materials](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtu6zAQBb9G6mRwV3yIBYvbuPNtUwqr1dJiQosGxdjw3wdOn_LgADPAfFzmC6Wc9ut_ukloscyo0AwKBmXmlVJ-zbpfQxRBGXsJ4EarnPVg-i1M4BbQqBHYaw2WHJKGyQFFFxcwfQpvmgJlAEbA6eRXo4wltsskkSJ0WsmaWqmnz5L2tknMr_KQeuJy63PYWrsf3fivw3OHZ7rv8jze13vUljhLh-ddnkOpWWg_hla_-WvgSsc2gNFKrY40L-jZc2RBwMV7JrajW_oa1vsz5ZwO6zqtrjdK-Vfc_grxCPgTAAD__-mNXeY) and revealed that he reserved the vehicle used in the attack more than six weeks earlier. Jabbar, who flew a black Islamic State flag during the attack, is the latest example of [the extremist group’s ability to inspire violence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFurDAQAL_GdEa2wQYKF6-hu9emRHv2-tjEYIQ3h-7vo0ufeqQZaT5uyw0o0_74Dxt6TmUxyliptFR2iUD5tfRN9AnRYNeg10Pn1OAmbZvVA2CKwfX3oBCjUTqkEe9xsgn70LuxIf-2Ka2s1p02YztFq6yD4O4jJkha9AojcTnbz0I7r5jyqzzxbEPZmuxX5qOK7p8wszDzdV3tC9ZS3lSYecerCjOXMyPsVQIzhC95fHOV9Sic6bGypJphoyD11Ck7dMa1K2-5OX08LsqZqhtErx4bUP6N8l8Tnt78BAAA___YLWBK) despite suffering years of losses to a U.S.-led military coalition.
## Cases of Flu, Other Illnesses “Very High”
Emergency room visits with influenza are ["very high" nationwide](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvhSAURn8Nbhi4KOrA0MXtde1oUC96G4QX4Gnsr29e925f8iXnJOfrMT0seQrbpz3QFBcnENByIblop9WSv6emWo1DBFQVGtkpLTo9yLbazdBrBQMI3TgFtrd2dfMwuwFnJTqBuiLzpgkpWimVhL4e1la02i567tFZJ1kjcKUSU_0dKZQdnb_jiale4lF5s5fyzEx9MBgZjNd11cucA175_TMY35PBSMH5F4Yfy51_8Yw2x8DxwLRhWG6eYjz4SZlK5iemm--07QzGKpn1eZH3lHXHGrEdlvyfufxX4jTwGwAA____iWI-), according to a report from the CDC on Friday. The amount of acute respiratory illness causing people to seek health care continues to rise, including an increase of COVID-19 cases in most areas of the country. Norovirus, [known as the stomach flu](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OtCAUxvGrgU7DOXyoBcXb2M3bbmlQDiMblAmyGu9-M9Nv_STPP7-vx_RwMcX9-d9tZGvIEwrUjYBG6Mm7mO5JcW8DEZLkZKGTRnRmAM1XK4MyYQaYUQlnZsIZgu4lqWExQ7cAj_b9JkBoAAnYt4PXQhu3mLmn4AIwJcjHmkv7neNeVwrpzieVdskbT3at9XUw-Y_hyHC8rqut2bv7vTIcV3KprgxHHw9yBzEc91zyGcvP0XwYZdkd9HroDC_Wv66YUjxMx5R4bi6mT6X-pT4t_gYAAP__xY1YnA), is also surging across the United States. The highly contagious virus is causing a record number of outbreaks for this time of year. Norovirus is not related to influenza viruses, which cause respiratory illness.

Dear Friend, Gavin Newsom and radical leftist governors are not hiding their plans to wage lawfare against conservatives at a level we've never before seen before. They're proudly announcing their plans to "Trump proof" their states. The time for resting or taking a post-election victory lap is over. Now is the time to fight, fight, fight. **But I need to know in the next 24 hours if you're with us ...** ...because we've never had an opportunity like this one to protect the First Amendment, defend parental rights, and put a stop to the gender-industrial complex's mutilation of vulnerable children. I pray you're with us -- because the Center for American Liberty can't take on the radical left without you.

I'm the Executive Director and General Counsel for the Center for American Liberty -- a conservative non-profit law firm that protects your freedom to say what you want, to live according to your conscience, and to pass on your conservative values to the next generation. We will continue to lead the charge against the left's "lawfare" -- as it increases its efforts to leverage the legal system to force D.E.I. and "woke" nonsense upon us. But with more than 35 active cases -- including some of the most consequential of our time -- your support is more important than ever before as we close in on the end of 2024. Make no mistake, the left is plotting how to use the courts to ram its radical agenda down our throats. **But the Center for American Liberty can stop them --[which is why I need to know in the next 24 hours if you're with us.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=083c55841dbc42c28dfe17b3c16213e9&_e=aoCZaEd37P3CaDl4DTQ_wwfn9dU2dPW9NyaKUb3BgMd8PRQec-Tk5eV59-Kn1tQq8p5deypYDX783cMsw5c323NoazjKhSpo3yTwJ07tz1Qkdwd3_ZdXiWBA51RHLhJEbJwpaoTYf79QVSDVLNZq5KMiHCrZULXa271gLm8YPIBbgmIHskD1rduGkrsXvmi2xDmmwmN7ga3BfOa6NeDsAdqMmpjAQA7G5gW8JOCQ8w_XTiT2lXUnua6BHKJ5jfLage3fKAU5Oir4EpwbN2jHRY2XbmiEaKtwLP8vD1R-hxIgMxPHnGQP9_FZd6yHXhDVdVBBkbPK9VMX9G4WirkkVbAiVRcreGPSJz6q0rNSKEsWkiozjXi8Df4JWGC6Zqdid9g-Bz1NlNQS5JNuhJxE5w%3D%3D)** Friend, every freedom you cherish is on the line...
---
* Your right to free speech
* Your right to gather and peacefully protest
* Your right to post on social media without government censorship
* Your right to raise your children in accordance with your values
* For women, your right to privacy and safety in share spaces like locker rooms and restrooms
* For children, the right to grow up without being drugged and surgically mutilated by gender clinics

---
The left wants to erase these rights. They want to shred the Constitution. And worst of all, they want to remove God from every corner of American society. And the moment President Trump puts his hand on the Bible on January 20th, the stakes go up. If you think the left is actively working to silence you, brainwash your children, and force men into women's private spaces right now... just wait. This is why the Center for American Liberty must be prepared not only to fight back as legal battles arise... ...but to go on the offensive to defend freedom, protect families, and challenge government overreach whenever it arises. But to be effective, I'm counting on your support.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7698cb76b3fb46c9981827c97b869163&_e=bfqIQxeNyY2VZIkRoHQuXd73ckfxSz8KRN0_HMwt95glnbm5O8MOmuGML-ibpNlCNPslR9ynQxTEmLsb6SUHKnKNfuqdOg1vyx-RqdA84oM0POav_crGbWBxvKaIh-wMW_5FkHFBI0oG3HPlEGip75ftigaiUmEf1_nW692TTJ6HFWcqv6a42Uze_t05ypjFdypQV3RuP5-TzhMjhfipSq1otEukByo6fzt91v4gLvXd76kRPk9RrfFi9-TiOlKmswN8NVPjr3CdvmbW5UPnkBlH-g06VpBlRwww7fa3jkW0p7Wa-sXvZn9N20jlzVp9k4WUyuTMcG56KW2k6AMJXAjQfcLYTHKlM-Qx-O-q8qvmRLCtzyzvd9698hShlgo7qCKwAli_MgskuO76UCo5XMUN3O_ec-2-9Br_K_wNhe72oULWVC1lJi24p5n9MpC3) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7698cb76b3fb46c9981827c97b869163&_e=bfqIQxeNyY2VZIkRoHQuXd73ckfxSz8KRN0_HMwt95glnbm5O8MOmuGML-ibpNlCNPslR9ynQxTEmLsb6SUHKnKNfuqdOg1vyx-RqdA84oM0POav_crGbWBxvKaIh-wMW_5FkHFBI0oG3HPlEGip75ftigaiUmEf1_nW692TTJ6HFWcqv6a42Uze_t05ypjFdypQV3RuP5-TzhMjhfipSq1otEukByo6fzt91v4gLvXd76kRPk9RrfFi9-TiOlKmswN8NVPjr3CdvmbW5UPnkBlH-g06VpBlRwww7fa3jkWg4soeSQniW05vgFUYA6owf_SCuxaJbXxye1whYk4AeIbWLSX2Xi2iO0s0VSrO2j-TYv2fawCBcaD_HSIop1aWz8CIRoBc0ssXviGHF30MDz9A3gcF4kMhj9HplN29c41KkFN1vptfLwq7up8WSl-Y)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7698cb76b3fb46c9981827c97b869163&_e=bfqIQxeNyY2VZIkRoHQuXd73ckfxSz8KRN0_HMwt95glnbm5O8MOmuGML-ibpNlCNPslR9ynQxTEmLsb6SUHKnKNfuqdOg1vyx-RqdA84oM0POav_crGbWBxvKaIh-wMW_5FkHFBI0oG3HPlEGip75ftigaiUmEf1_nW692TTJ6HFWcqv6a42Uze_t05ypjFdypQV3RuP5-TzhMjhfipSq1otEukByo6fzt91v4gLvXd76kRPk9RrfFi9-TiOlKmswN8NVPjr3CdvmbW5UPnkBlH-g06VpBlRwww7fa3jkVAF0ilrBFQKNrEIo3QzrJ-o8g0-awphnAv13TuX0tV2syQa4SeC88cPdVP_2oH5TlektywDXRyEm-64LWbQ6cIf99280EXDz4u8YPxeUUoCDibHI-XKLXsPH8FHIxZxx0p0RUZnlnjrR-5g0b5iWrX),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7698cb76b3fb46c9981827c97b869163&_e=bfqIQxeNyY2VZIkRoHQuXd73ckfxSz8KRN0_HMwt95glnbm5O8MOmuGML-ibpNlCNPslR9ynQxTEmLsb6SUHKnKNfuqdOg1vyx-RqdA84oM0POav_crGbWBxvKaIh-wMW_5FkHFBI0oG3HPlEGip75ftigaiUmEf1_nW692TTJ6HFWcqv6a42Uze_t05ypjFdypQV3RuP5-TzhMjhfipSq1otEukByo6fzt91v4gLvXd76kRPk9RrfFi9-TiOlKmswN8NVPjr3CdvmbW5UPnkBlH-g06VpBlRwww7fa3jkUfrett1RcKdFI5D5me8kGmnR7Xgn-oCH-pvXRzW4PephTLAUnXx-XzaeNK0Q1beWKBcPYX-L5VHhAe_WnZiw2TazJH8zFPy1pJuv9eFDOduUMDt2CoAiKAI2eUmnLJsZOWKigvzGlLRZc10i39Znn4) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7698cb76b3fb46c9981827c97b869163&_e=bfqIQxeNyY2VZIkRoHQuXd73ckfxSz8KRN0_HMwt95glnbm5O8MOmuGML-ibpNlCNPslR9ynQxTEmLsb6SUHKnKNfuqdOg1vyx-RqdA84oM0POav_crGbWBxvKaIh-wMW_5FkHFBI0oG3HPlEGip75ftigaiUmEf1_nW692TTJ6HFWcqv6a42Uze_t05ypjFdypQV3RuP5-TzhMjhfipSq1otEukByo6fzt91v4gLvXd76kRPk9RrfFi9-TiOlKmswN8NVPjr3CdvmbW5UPnkBlH-g06VpBlRwww7fa3jkUJkJbaH7yHqzB6VD-jucbE4Qsd52TgvXnoHYZyz_QtrAvHsJkyi9qXTLvrB8wwvHWSmGdnv5gmrjmIn3atfEVXiEJPmOgTUtHZFQrFXxBulEwZSOnaEEdc-19BBr2hK62FFVnxe6Ee-zD7Td6tKj1L)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7698cb76b3fb46c9981827c97b869163&_e=bfqIQxeNyY2VZIkRoHQuXd73ckfxSz8KRN0_HMwt95glnbm5O8MOmuGML-ibpNlCNPslR9ynQxTEmLsb6SUHKnKNfuqdOg1vyx-RqdA84oM0POav_crGbWBxvKaIh-wMW_5FkHFBI0oG3HPlEGip75ftigaiUmEf1_nW692TTJ6HFWcqv6a42Uze_t05ypjFdypQV3RuP5-TzhMjhfipSq1otEukByo6fzt91v4gLvXd76kRPk9RrfFi9-TiOlKmswN8NVPjr3CdvmbW5UPnkBlH-g06VpBlRwww7fa3jkX2Q4G9_Gdqts2G2qoVDXGtcuKMVvucVYj_Rwy6sbPjMHpvTJoHAGc93tiTVEQtKpI_8zKzxF3uucnVw26UDttgvtPtfUaY-NI7t8a_lbSj3m1otG1Urz5tD4R8YbUMUAoo4q-y2wuzkkVATNkKgeeG) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

subject: Weekly Newsletter
body:
A New Year, a New Paradigm

| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250105_newlsetter&n=1)
---
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFkxSxZnuK4uv796ZDecXavKLLMo83-OvwmA33a3ROcAmmgRt8CoWdgrrwLJYDSj2kg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250105_newlsetter&n=2 "LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST") [LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFkxSxZnuK4uv796ZDecXavKLLMo83-OvwmA33a3ROcAmmgRt8CoWdgrrwLJYDSj2kg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250105_newlsetter&n=2)
---
Friend —
How is it that at the same time a New Paradigm is taking place in much of the world, an unspeakable genocide is taking place in Gaza right in front of our very eyes? How is it that two opposing processes—one of development and a noble view of mankind expressed in the nations of the BRICS versus the other one of total destruction and a bestial view of mankind expressed in the nations of the Trans-Atlantic—can seemingly coexist together on the same planet? It is because mankind is living through a profound and historic boundary condition where a new system has been born while another failed imperial system is in its death throes and is desperate to maintain dominance no matter the human cost.
What is clear is that these two systems cannot continue to coexist for very long. We are rapidly approaching a point of decision which in all probability will occur in the year 2025 when the world as a whole finally enters this New Paradigm, and ushers in the beginning of a Renaissance, or, failing to do so, destroys itself and goes extinct through nuclear warfare.
If we enter into a new beautiful era for mankind, we may in fact see what Pope Francis has called for as part of the official launching of the Jubilee year of 2025, namely the cancelation of debt of the poorer nations. The Schiller Institute has issued a [statement](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-27vZ7bAAmP821BtXamCEW8n3_pJtLqFOEi4oq6jaFB3ClrkJJuv83HmpW7v8Y3Gp7hBqLhdooShFAuKgRDtErms2jd1k2LNLp4Aur4BEuM3&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250105_newlsetter&n=3) in support of such a call, but addressing the necessity of a reorganization of the global system as a whole. The following is an excerpt from that statement:
> It is that approach — which also guided the 1648 Treaty of Westphalia, including its provisions for debt moratoria — which must now be applied globally this Jubilee year, to rid the world of the pestilence of usury once and for all, and with it the threat of war and genocide. That will then set the stage for organizing a New Paradigm based on a new international security and development architecture, to allow good credit to be issued for the worthy cause of global economic development.
The LaRouche Organization plays an indispensable role in bringing the United States into this new era. We must not be spectators waiting to see what will happen with the incoming Trump administration, we must shape it. There are openings with the new administration which did not exist with the previous administration, therefore it is up to us to take the opportunities given. For example, Trump’s nominees for Director of Intelligence, Tulsi Gabbard, and for FBI director, Kash Patel, is one such opportunity. We will be releasing a dossier which will make the case for these two picks, because despite their shortcomings, they would deliver a powerful blow to the “Deep State”, the same bureaucracy which targeted Lyndon LaRouche and his movement decades ago, and the same bureaucracy which generates never ending lies justifying never ending wars.
Don’t be a spectator! Future generations, if they exist, will ask what you did at such a profound moment as the one we are living in. Start by reading the [report](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-27vZ7bAAmP821BtXamCEW_WXgCr7vkqFZp2Ur4O2G5GCG1brQHm41eem_V6lMNB3OlctWu1tWMhLCMawtlNXcRbkS-4c2NJl7SOMLAOq2F7MRUa9lqh-qLHI9ItfXTB3SlgzVS_s9VjLOI6Rznbi-kMS6FKelpRlLuAgWIhLLBQ&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250105_newlsetter&n=4) of the most recent, incredibly powerful International Peace Coalition meeting, with speakers from the Doctors Against Genocide giving harrowing testimonies of what has happened in Gaza and how they are mobilizing to stop it. They will be lobbying Congress January 8-9th; call your Congressman and ask them to meet with this group.
* * *
## Starting At 10am EST! Sunday LaRouche Show:
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFkxSxZnuK4uv796ZDecXavKLLMo83-OvwmA33a3ROcAmmgRt8CoWdgrrwLJYDSj2kg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250105_newlsetter&n=5)

## International Peace Coalition 83: Professionals Must Lead the Fight Against Genocide
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-27vZ7bAAmP821BtXamCEW_WXgCr7vkqFZp2Ur4O2G5GCG1brQHm41eem_V6lMNB3OlctWu1tWMhLCMawtlNXcRbkS-4c2NJl7SOMLAOq2F7MRUa9lqh-qLHI9ItfXTB3SlgzVS_s9VjLOI6Rznbi-kMS6FKelpRlLuAgWIhLLBQ&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250105_newlsetter&n=7)
The 83rd meeting of the International Peace Coaltion included powerful comments from representatives of the Doctors Against Genocide who are mobilizing to stop the horrors in Gaza.
Among them was Dr. Karameh Hawash-Kuemmerle, co-founder of Doctors Against Genocide, who said that people are feeling sick from the genocide, not because we are fragile, but because it is an unnatural thing. “What is happening in Gaza is something beyond what we can imagine,” she said. We are disoriented and depressed, suffering from chronic fatigue, sleep disorders, and many other symptoms, because we are witnesses to genocide. We should honor doctors who fight for human life, not “doctors who say that if you speak of genocide you will be fired.” In response to a question, she replied, “The treatment for sickness from genocide is organizing to end the genocide.”
**[Read Here](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oofl1HGLX0JcKJlk0_5f-27vZ7bAAmP821BtXamCEW_WXgCr7vkqFZp2Ur4O2G5GCG1brQHm41eem_V6lMNB3OlctWu1tWMhLCMawtlNXcRbkS-4c2NJl7SOMLAOq2F7MRUa9lqh-qLHI9ItfXTB3SlgzVS_s9VjLOI6Rznbi-kMS6FKelpRlLuAgWIhLLBQ&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250105_newlsetter&n=8)**

## [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PK0H-ujDGVncp8z6iXFjsoQHU5Qc0Lp2m7uK2abgrVY1&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250105_newlsetter&n=9)Live Dialogue with Helga Zepp-LaRouche and Ray McGovern:
## [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PK0H-ujDGVncp8z6iXFjsoQHU5Qc0Lp2m7uK2abgrVY1&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250105_newlsetter&n=10)
A discussion with Schiller Institute Chairwoman Helga Zepp-LaRouche and former CIA analyst and VIPS co-founder Ray McGovern for the New Year featured a particularly powerful reflection on the need for empathy, especially as it relates to the horrific genocide in the Gaza Strip.
In the course of the dialogue, Ray McGovern asked, “How is it that western leaders cannot have empathy with what is going on in Gaza? I can only say that a lack of empathy in that case must be combined with sociopathy.” Ray went on, saying that it is stunning to see his own government and the Germans standing by and not condemning the genocide in Gaza. The indifference of the Collective West to human suffering and atrocities, Ray added, was codified by former U.S. Secretary of State Madeleine Albright, who remarked upon being asked if the deaths of 500,000 Iraqi children from U.S. sanctions was “worth it,” responded that the price was, indeed, worth it.
How many thousands of Palestinians are dead now because of the inaction of our governments? Ray concluded, “We need to gather those of us who think with empathy and make sure that this does not continue and whatever government comes into Washington or Berlin shows a human face, a face which has not been there for too many years.”
**[Watch Here](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PK0H-ujDGVncp8z6iXFjsoQHU5Qc0Lp2m7uK2abgrVY1&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250105_newlsetter&n=11)**

## Friday Symposium: Why Henry Kissinger Hated Lyndon LaRouche:
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PDO6NBSOUC5MRQNhnMgrSmMpXvCL2ehQHIAHL4D2FisWqIvq3AzyTFaJsiTlMmQ_kg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250105_newlsetter&n=12)
It is clear that the British Empire and its associated American intelligence agencies (known by many as the "Deep State") are in panic mode about the potential for the incoming Trump Administration to change course. They are particularly terrified of two of Trump's nominees: Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel who have both expressed an intent to stop making policy based on lies and manipulation of the American people. There is a precedent for the targeting of American political leaders, and it was the case of former U.S. presidential candidate Lyndon LaRouche.
In 1982, Henry Kissinger wrote a letter to then-FBI Director William Webster urging that something must be done about “these [LaRouche] people...especially with respect to security”—and so the infamous "Get LaRouche" Task force began.
Diane Sare was joined by renowned election integrity expert and social media influencer Craig "Pasta" Jardula to explore this crucial issue which has huge implications in the current drive to finally bring down the entire "lawfare" apparatus that has been terrorizing Americans ever since.
**[Watch Here](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PDO6NBSOUC5MRQNhnMgrSmMpXvCL2ehQHIAHL4D2FisWqIvq3AzyTFaJsiTlMmQ_kg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250105_newlsetter&n=13)**

Ray concluded, “We need to gather those of us who think with empathy and make sure that this does not continue and whatever government comes into Washington or Berlin shows a human face, a face which has not been there for too many years.” Friday Symposium: Why Henry Kissinger Hated Lyndon LaRouche: It is clear that the British Empire and its associated American intelligence agencies (known by many as the "Deep State") are in panic mode about the potential for the incoming Trump Administration to change course. They are particularly terrified of two of Trump's nominees: Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel who have both expressed an intent to stop making policy based on lies and manipulation of the American people. There is a precedent for the targeting of American political leaders, and it was the case of former U.S. presidential candidate Lyndon LaRouche. In 1982, Henry Kissinger wrote a letter to then-FBI Director William Webster urging that something must be done about “these [LaRouche] people...especially with respect to security”—and so the infamous "Get LaRouche" Task force began. Diane Sare was joined by renowned election integrity expert and social media influencer Craig "Pasta" Jardula to explore this crucial issue which has huge implications in the current drive to finally bring down the entire "lawfare" apparatus that has been terrorizing Americans ever since. name: History Facts
subject: Why people used to use X-rays to try on shoes
body:
There’s a reason we typically receive X-rays only in a medical setting: Without the proper precautions, radiation is extremely dangerous. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cf4lm5tr9azsl5lp722x0hqdedcm2dytesi86darilkaa9o5r85fdmz3yz9o9st6ntdml3vn0n0aei98u6yro5xtxd6d6rzcqey5vweauzexom0tdzqfe4jlhs8iccxqrpc996oisla4rtm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spm6yc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [After World War I, people used X-rays to try on shoes.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spm6yc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spm6yc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spm6yc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T here’s a reason we typically receive X-rays only in a medical setting: Without the proper precautions, radiation is extremely dangerous. But for several decades following the discovery of X-rays in 1895, most people didn’t think twice about sticking their feet inside unregulated X-ray machines [at the shoe store](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spm6yc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Shoe-fitting fluoroscopes, which show moving images in real time, were developed [during World War I](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spm6yc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to examine injured soldiers’ feet without removing their boots. After the war, they were adapted for commercial use to help fit people for shoes, and they became staples at shoe stores in many countries, including the United States.
---
The machines were tall wooden or metal cabinets with an X-ray tube encased in lead at the base, and an alcove for the customer’s feet just above. When the fluoroscope was turned on, X-ray beams created an image on a fluorescent screen above the feet, which could be viewed through eyepieces on top of the cabinet. The devices were heavily marketed to mothers and children, and some machines had three eyepieces: one for the seller, one for the customer, and one for the parent.
While some experts raised alarms about the potential dangers of the machines in the 1920s and ’30s, the public became more acutely aware of the effects of radiation after World War II. States started regulating and testing shoe-fitting fluoroscopes in the late 1940s. At least one shoe store employee suffered radiation burns on her foot from a leaky machine, and medical experts [warned](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spm6yc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that radiation exposure could damage kids’ growing bones. However, it’s impossible to determine how many people were hurt, since radiation injuries come on slowly and nobody at the time was keeping track of who was using the machines or for how long.
In 1957, Pennsylvania became the first state to ban the shoe-fitting X-rays altogether, and most other states followed suit over the next few years, effectively wiping out their use in the United States.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spm6yc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spm6yc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Radium water was initially considered a cure-all.
Nobel Prize-winning scientists Marie Curie and Pierre Curie discovered radium in 1898, and it was immediately heralded as a miracle substance; people used it to make toys, makeup, toothpaste, and even condoms. Some doctors claimed that a little radium in the water could cure just about anything, from anemia to impotence to arthritis. Customers had a few options for getting radium (or radon) into their water: They could fill a radioactive jar or water crock, place a radioactive bar or stone into a nonradioactive water bottle, or take a shot of [Radithor](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=spm6yc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), an ounce of triple-distilled water with at least 1 microcurie each of radium and mesothorium. One can safely say that it was actually the opposite of a cure-all. Radithor in particular caused one of the first high-profile deaths by radium poisoning. Athlete and businessman Eben Byers championed the drink and consumed around three bottles a day, which ultimately led to his death just a few years later in 1932. Around the same time, the case of the Radium Girls, factory workers who were killed by exposure to radioactive paint, was making headlines, and the world’s love affair with all things radium started to fizzle out.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. subject: Radicals cancel grandmother for protecting little girls
body:
The radical left is rallying to cancel an 82-year-old grandmother for protecting two little girls from a man

| |
---
| | The radical left is rallying to cancel an 82-year-old grandmother
---
| |
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4d2b9ffb1fb64bc28cf5a0b437a277a2&_e=C5tLnKO0P_KD1Vb6rPxf55iRt2Eh_o4Jif0R5P00wFxYiJNKxl_ZpRffPZEwhJj3wSwFzMMf9Sh1Qwiy2X1aYaUGW8YcF383WumeDNiCTJtmrRlDNI4i7gRiNDN7nXvhFNP_pVM3eJu-YvLKfPp1_XpjODjKlRoxJG3xVF6Edjm2D_Q5FRC6XCBtwjJP2pfPx5ziRXUoex30rapQM-IsVUIiN-9OhP-78u_e5ZVO2BWPUuBAPNUDY0p2oQ7TiCuIR8GLWQG3KxEA3Ducj--UAFJTaYtlaua6V7_li1-Zt84Eqqt1QY39LfzBuBswSX-XzpGkrWZavd47Qj-cpDXXuiqdk90MPb1j0YZtESs3lZN0iu3eYUE5Lm6Bvw7SbS8SMDhp6jFTs7jirfze_Lr1mQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, The radical left is rallying to cancel an 82-year-old grandmother for protecting two little girls from a man--who was pretending to be a woman--in the women's locker room. **[**Will you help defend this courageous grandmother today?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4d2b9ffb1fb64bc28cf5a0b437a277a2&_e=C5tLnKO0P_KD1Vb6rPxf55iRt2Eh_o4Jif0R5P00wFxYiJNKxl_ZpRffPZEwhJj3wSwFzMMf9Sh1Qwiy2X1aYaUGW8YcF383WumeDNiCTJtmrRlDNI4i7gRiNDN7nXvhFNP_pVM3eJu-YvLKfPp1_XpjODjKlRoxJG3xVF6Edjm2D_Q5FRC6XCBtwjJP2pfPx5ziRXUoex30rapQM-IsVUIiN-9OhP-78u_e5ZVO2BVE2Sn1MsoDtfsJeZuXM_j6utb3w9o7OlTynTU-TWkasfim9ywTQwdqaFlJttdKsS94T9J2T1qckZg08EDi6fpmjN-8icwLO7-ZwUVKPUmYPRJlJsJIVT50a4AEXq6a6fKQRPgFMZwWq6DEUKen8S26FmvrsamlY34vA5ssrv5u8w%3D%3D)** Julie Jaman is an 82-year-old grandmother who's lived in Port Townsend, Washington, for almost forty years. Julie regularly used her local swimming pool that is owned by the City of Port Townsend and operated by the YMCA. After a typical swim at the YMCA pool, Julie went to the women's locker room to shower like she always does. But Julie was surprised to hear a male's voice while she was showering. To her shock, she saw a fully grown man wearing a woman's bathing suit and watching two little girls undress! | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4d2b9ffb1fb64bc28cf5a0b437a277a2&_e=C5tLnKO0P_KD1Vb6rPxf55iRt2Eh_o4Jif0R5P00wFxYiJNKxl_ZpRffPZEwhJj3wSwFzMMf9Sh1Qwiy2X1aYaUGW8YcF383WumeDNiCTJtmrRlDNI4i7gRiNDN7nXvhFNP_pVM3eJu-YvLKfPp1_XpjODjKlRoxJG3xVF6Edjm2D_Q5FRC6XCBtwjJP2pfPx5ziRXUoex30rapQM-IsVUIiN-9OhP-78u_e5ZVO2BVSZEwHWfhVuFZDFpJmRCW5b6_s6WHkBxfwU3S0NP2t8wjWc2NEwmyVDTSKVnad_sAfV9AGFz_OmLuGcx2n9MzCnY_BKq-6Wq0COK1-cLHh3oJXiUj4xugA8wPk3UH_boFsK6TEKWv2oZwRTtEkjhJ64JmTlwac8jf4KT79_LcaBA%3D%3D)
---

**Now the radical left is trying to ruin Julie's future because she stood up for those two little girls -- and Julie is relying on your help.**
The two little girls appeared to be about 4 and 6 years old. Julie believed she was witnessing a predator take advantage of these innocent girls!
So Julie did what any grandmother in that situation would do -- she confronted the man and asked him to leave the bathroom!
But instead of thanking Julie for looking out for those innocent girls, the staff at the YMCA rushed in and began berating Julie for her "_discriminatory"_ response to the predator.
_It gets worse . . ._
Not only did the YMCA attack Julie for protecting two innocent children, it also permanently banned Julie from swimming at that pool!
_. . . then they launched a sophisticated smear campaign to paint Julie as a bigot and a transphobe in her community._
And without your help, Julie will live the rest of her life banned from the pool she used almost daily to stay active. **[**Will you help Julie today by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $25 or more to help us fight Julie's legal battle against the YMCA and the City of Port Townsend in court?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4d2b9ffb1fb64bc28cf5a0b437a277a2&_e=C5tLnKO0P_KD1Vb6rPxf55iRt2Eh_o4Jif0R5P00wFxYiJNKxl_ZpRffPZEwhJj3wSwFzMMf9Sh1Qwiy2X1aYaUGW8YcF383WumeDNiCTJtmrRlDNI4i7gRiNDN7nXvhFNP_pVM3eJu-YvLKfPp1_XpjODjKlRoxJG3xVF6Edjm2D_Q5FRC6XCBtwjJP2pfPx5ziRXUoex30rapQM-IsVUIiN-9OhP-78u_e5ZVO2BW9LCwxRMetyWErxxOeo0WAQHTixWO54-yR3G7KJOfSQyAzgn9b4f61Hn9IYO6tp_O5NCP-Q_pVpG82qhh6CgBfz4W5lvzew_OrG2cOeTuvrm9YUBmvva-7iO5SsU-lHBE35L8V5EpBxkE8MWsd0w3FQJ8O6gOv6Jl43cuCTloNuA%3D%3D)**
If Americans like you don't stand with Julie today, truth and justice in our country will be gone forever.
That's why the Center for American Liberty is doing everything it can to fight for justice for Julie!
Together with patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty helps everyday citizens beat the radical Left in court!
And now we are taking on the radicals at the YMCA and the City of Port Townsend.
[**Will you help us send a message to the radical YMCA and City of Port Townsend that they can't get away with punishing Julie for speaking out against a man being allowed in the ladies' locker room?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4d2b9ffb1fb64bc28cf5a0b437a277a2&_e=C5tLnKO0P_KD1Vb6rPxf55iRt2Eh_o4Jif0R5P00wFxYiJNKxl_ZpRffPZEwhJj3wSwFzMMf9Sh1Qwiy2X1aYaUGW8YcF383WumeDNiCTJtmrRlDNI4i7gRiNDN7nXvhFNP_pVM3eJu-YvLKfPp1_XpjODjKlRoxJG3xVF6Edjm2D_Q5FRC6XCBtwjJP2pfPx5ziRXUoex30rapQM-IsVUIiN-9OhP-78u_e5ZVO2BVoV6iQ0SIWy0YIWjYNWQPKtfAVxk93mvzm4vyUQb88rEz1C7SBaRU2V3sefy0wvUAKR19Nnpi8VVskAY8hYRFa3TBplGiuEJSGcgLK3tfAB9zP7Pql-57TD9qFsO4_q0WbRGZOcC2WEPGm5YePvW4VIiofvQ-F69s88vj0bq-F4Q%3D%3D)
**Your donation today will send a strong message that we will not be silenced. . . we will not allow the left to erase women and endanger children!** **[**Will you give a donation for Julie's defense today?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4d2b9ffb1fb64bc28cf5a0b437a277a2&_e=C5tLnKO0P_KD1Vb6rPxf55iRt2Eh_o4Jif0R5P00wFxYiJNKxl_ZpRffPZEwhJj3wSwFzMMf9Sh1Qwiy2X1aYaUGW8YcF383WumeDNiCTJtmrRlDNI4i7gRiNDN7nXvhFNP_pVM3eJu-YvLKfPp1_XpjODjKlRoxJG3xVF6Edjm2D_Q5FRC6XCBtwjJP2pfPx5ziRXUoex30rapQM-IsVUIiN-9OhP-78u_e5ZVO2BVBE3tK-FbC78joLol-1TTC8N8kZPDNC3oZy_Bb42_asw27tI4xzIaBms6ksPcgeNXu3TSyP-nEpHt97TvT7oYwOcqwKmLhPX4VID8r6EYhfVkH6fUOowyi2jgt8tQtdzP5tEGRsQ5DlFIcZ8imFzxPpqqHyAMuxWqVuoQlVS9utw%3D%3D)**
Sadly, the well-funded ACLU and other dark left money groups will join the YMCA's side, undoubtedly. With their deep pockets, they can threaten to ruin Julie's life . . . and bully others into silence.
But today, you can **[help Julie Jaman](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4d2b9ffb1fb64bc28cf5a0b437a277a2&_e=C5tLnKO0P_KD1Vb6rPxf55iRt2Eh_o4Jif0R5P00wFxYiJNKxl_ZpRffPZEwhJj3wSwFzMMf9Sh1Qwiy2X1aYaUGW8YcF383WumeDNiCTJtmrRlDNI4i7gRiNDN7nXvhFNP_pVM3eJu-YvLKfPp1_XpjODjKlRoxJG3xVF6Edjm2D_Q5FRC6XCBtwjJP2pfPx5ziRXUoex30rapQM-IsVUIiN-9OhP-78u_e5ZVO2BXATthowZSOOqBFdVV3NBh00Qsh_GeTzqqUtT7WhDMVKdcFAwiyzUktIGzq1cLwkfDn_tQIl2J2QYETN-trGQUsE3SAb5sW3M0uvxXZ_XsREeXtiYu8XHrvrDCncBM1Sw7bySNDVjnnbEovkBEwBo65oJ-bfyhCF5k-IxNBdFsczg%3D%3D) **inspire others to continue sticking up for the most vulnerable and fighting back against the left's derangement.
Too many children have been victims of the left's evil and radical ideology. Enough is enough. **[**Will you stand with Julie today?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4d2b9ffb1fb64bc28cf5a0b437a277a2&_e=C5tLnKO0P_KD1Vb6rPxf55iRt2Eh_o4Jif0R5P00wFxYiJNKxl_ZpRffPZEwhJj3wSwFzMMf9Sh1Qwiy2X1aYaUGW8YcF383WumeDNiCTJtmrRlDNI4i7gRiNDN7nXvhFNP_pVM3eJu-YvLKfPp1_XpjODjKlRoxJG3xVF6Edjm2D_Q5FRC6XCBtwjJP2pfPx5ziRXUoex30rapQM-IsVUIiN-9OhP-78u_e5ZVO2BXHVHzvFa0yItp-qPhIbpeyqT0mZWwg_Nf_BhDlJzapDkrCL5O3AArwlE5pkXgPTIY12yiEVPhK27rnjekLhOSc7qfsJs1dlww3dqBQTeiKU1oHxTsERqWaKEPPytJPDQArIAkqZWm24Q9ii0QVdVvL0Rk3rd0ry6a8O7fk9e7XUw%3D%3D)**
Thank you for your support. With your help, I know the Center for American Liberty can win this case.
|

subject: Big lessons for Republicans from 2024
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to the first _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads of 2025. The candidates who won in November’s red wave are now taking office. New issues are developing and old ones remain. There are local elections coming up across the commonwealth. And the Eagles are in the playoffs!

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2836300364&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Republicans will learn that governing is harder than winning](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eafc658cc6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
Governing is harder than winning an election. Governing effectively is even harder. We’re watching this in real time for Trump and congressional Republicans.

Governing is even more difficult for Republicans who have to contend with opposition from Democrats — and their multiple deep-pocketed and confrontational allies. This includes governors, mayors, and school boards pledging to block presidential policies. Plus, they must overcome the legacy media, many already criticizing GOP policies, politicians and priorities—and, highlighting and supporting criticisms leveled by the Left. But Team Trump knows how to overcome all of that.

However, governing effectively gets even harder for Republicans when they beat each other up, questioning the policies or motives of their “friends,” or when they put egos or personalities above success. Various segments of the Trump coalition have gone so far as to call others traitors — suggesting that they want to kick out some members of the coalition, or that things would be better without some members. If this continues, governing could become almost impossible.

**Why It Matters**. Trump’s decisive victory was due in part to building a broad and diverse coalition, and even receiving the votes of people who decided that the Biden/Harris administration had failed them. Some Trump voters and even supporters voted for Biden in 2020. The coalition’s breadth was its electoral strength — now it could be its governing challenge.

They all agreed that Biden’s America was going in the wrong direction, that America and Americans were not better off than four years ago. But, they have varied priorities, and while many goals or values overlap, some do not.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=89d9a47532&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[2024 in review](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4e188f7670&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Richard Koenig_
You think we don’t know there was an election? Actually, we do. Each side saw darkness and ruin if the other prevailed. Yet here we venture only to make a few observations with one eyebrow cocked. There will be time enough in the New Year to decry or applaud the course of the nation, a job we cede to the heavy lifters in the opinion business. Besides, we must leave room for other news. The national debt, to say nothing of the number of genders, grew still further beyond comprehension. Ever more imaginative ways were contrived to salvage the planet. And smart-alecky AI made bloopers of its own—what a consolation to Homo sapiens! Some highlights**. ** The[ debt](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5a90850d09&e=b7b3eddce2) of the federal government passed $36 trillion; interest on the debt exceeded spending on[ national defense](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=37ec70204e&e=b7b3eddce2).
The[ college-loan forgiveness program](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0ecfe8fb66&e=b7b3eddce2) relieved a 49-year-old musician of debt amounting to $249,255. The beneficiary said he could now consider studying with a meditation teacher in India.

After threatening Canada with[ tariffs](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=274b3e6f90&e=b7b3eddce2), then meeting with Prime Minister Justin Trudeau, Trump wise-cracked: “It was a pleasure to have dinner the other night with Governor Justin Trudeau of the Great State of Canada.”

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=711148d45d&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Thom Nickels: Theosophists in Philadelphia](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=770f72705d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stephen F. Gambescia: The changing place of the thoughtful op-ed](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a9975ce8c4&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: Biden’s December surprise](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=061b9cce5f&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
We, like many of you, were consuming less news than usual over the holiday break, but we did enjoy this piece from our friend Salena Zito on [how Republican Dave McCormick did what many thought was impossible](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dcd9e27164&e=b7b3eddce2): defeating three-term incumbent Senator Bob Casey, Jr. He did it, through a combination of effective communication, good fundraising, and an opponent whom no one hated but few truly loved. That, along with Trump’s coattails, were just enough to get it done.********
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded exclusively by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

---
| | | [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJViqSOAPtdfRJrzMKtRCwblAFi1CRNoRtwi87SEAR83EvaMunWEA5K6iW7PNtdPNgCAOcw7gPG27v47rbQVDT8a-JGN97SQT8N03lsfVmwn0pVas6woL04Gmwu_ND3cnJnvax0F8sZLmBQ24677LpVRvmccNgGu0dQCeeZpYFBTM5GRIthPfn7HjHheoHxiD3ZxFTohECoVc71km1I_A--HDOz9EMw98StXbyHBAvV6C69nJ3XPToo9v91HDxa2WgS1MvUHdFATpFIpuaXSOSyj3AKWei05IaYnI14cKcuPV1_-3Me3XICAKEOGUJwFItUWKztSi7Ucll74yKh5a5FumR_vmo70OVmJxrJxxicixg11h32FM2KXmAuY80ZyoRLguD2E00sVVxQPlFwWRh0EX/4cw/YVsocAGQRBKBYjiAKvK_cQ/h0/h001.Ry1W7ftaQPl6NmyM7kFqOV0GbbFQQ6gbAL0AoS3aqwY)

1️⃣ **_Virginia:_ Democrats prepare for Tuesday’s special elections **
Democrats are preparing for three special elections this coming Tuesday. These races are one of our first opportunities to combat the MAGA agenda since Trump’s victory in November. [Read more about Virginia’s special elections here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.SEgofQhSb9pGg8bz5XQG3XQ6QQ9AGEEMz_7YC6wQDQXRCh_6K3iqBCJuHf4RCrIy4UidL9WZtRTV27IGX9m1D6MprCS47it_kNlmRul06NLdCJiBzSaJB_xstCSX4vE6b6uSsWttd13WysZj8NyCGJUnUe-kycxeF7_oxMx2Y-XqC27gKRDCwOPh9zbho-sug5lFCnwGP7J4xD-wZ7xjk2TdhopeY6HJhK-NK1Ltn0T71m7SVLTcXAolRZOKYLUblzLC0TCj24ZS1URJUBiH1sj0XQXE7ZP4Au3EewCUAPj6A8jC5b8LlM_cXjcroVrGSHmvy5MNlTS7parZeKug3-_7g8UfdRi9wRXXfkO60A9RRvgvG5htEh23FHs5Lw1Io8bZKeSY8DwJ9dFEmsFXjvYG2UI-HZeJlGgKQ0zriF0iTL3Z7HnE98n0qQedfL4tJ4hiSfNtFGTJPHXMkY2_iNkijhS92m89Ob5Rp3j2UYZZVfsqTJsihaEbE3exqhxTv-Rl8ze6uz2ornunmcTqG-Pi4M7Bme96xGRx6AS8JklQKz6LUl53dSiP_0WBzdiN3ulP2g7UK5ZUPVOVjcIZe6IOV6F5-dv8lh9Zy8HpbZc/4cw/YVsocAGQRBKBYjiAKvK_cQ/h1/h001.Z6YBYqqTxCNU2a6A_C8NTJGKw_5qDpwIeVMwSgime6w)
2️⃣ **_DLCC Investments:_ Team DLCC announces a six-figure investment **
Ahead of majority-defining elections in Virginia, our team invested six figures to help power state Democrats to victory. [This investment will make a difference on Tuesday, and for cycles to come → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pDan6rIk1n2Em0yBbScWCiIKJ1ZoLFEE8sdXltBtrS8r1rR9Yu73N9S-fnjptaHMB81g29O7hgRPEbp7W3lXdKHngnv0d5eNO7KLkM4OKenoCWDmAoDTn4xIkHL-1yklKQE0P2_0mKQbmpWLIAlOWNV0fX3pJPABs7Mo35c74WsNP_cf09J_cLmR_pWmuCrlZxrZA1SpMtWMmvszETUPHZKRphXOkiy33PAdyk0Zq2v9DOI-6Qa9eEcc-qG3Zj4U5AXJRevJf4olJZ5LQTj-G2pzlr8eZPK-isnQM7VGcZannVwFcnrRy1J0eDCGE4_EC7oBLQZFoOGAZLhQ4Zc4x2o2f2iYru5fUHbS4UyYdw90gUhjZJt9JEiMqROzF5-EO_FKaFrfc_Bbj9gdw8dDH65_5NUf7xSjoK8V356tJIkp3fUVmnjhOHXbBX6NruzorJXgILu9HCZED51rqD8hpB00_UxZN1wgUgKWgcbHB7ZwdoG51TIvh1CXnWkusij4szeIJlZIFJiSn4RLHCeYlwK5Ab2nFDFfqXVPP3DzRfjqXKVf79rymkz0V9uHc0keWvzCeXbnwFcT8-tL6uIBfYT/4cw/YVsocAGQRBKBYjiAKvK_cQ/h2/h001.JSSH-fXtqrcfOSXaVQBzserdvk6YH0Zi8xrgP3Girnk)
3️⃣ **_Anti-Trump Firewalls:_ How the states are playing a major role in 2025 and beyond **
In 2024, Democrats’ wins in state legislatures were a bright spot in an election where Republicans secured a federal trifecta. While we brace ourselves for the implications of a second Trump term, [**state Dems are building Anti-Trump firewalls across the country→**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.jKO93QIJgh5wgOzMsxCi-MaiwN6mMluykSOezSxhoyYUjl9ZDE3OuqUbHPhti8S4fJeXGcFLdbsL6iwvFEliuztWWBhThEKpRvpzADpg2B1hUlPhcd2AiqX2Y0W0BtXVOfF1t4T16kp7aic3O1rmfaTxQseDZ3WTmyP4igh0UrmYKlQup2lsssgwc7_rgGB_6PA3bi3JfVqVtANxFWfW06n0bo89i6RYKrJ2hpdRBKXqEDdi1TV2stYZw3DFa-siwQCAr1SaAKV4BPDDVcgJ2TBsUDbbQWgHSDtT9VZrr29fUDvXS837E5ggEe2-mdo4XyqxHYWPnL8rLZhr1qdz0ILbJeE1J2EgLP54SJb_BsxCKcoKnS9pN682K_2OyRq8WKoRmiLIxCOiHvAn2OLsKvaKS5-aUTUbMpR2Nlh3_5LFvS7sv-B-H2hVBvqb1khFHvVHm-5zTsJklIvSmo0k2E4lBAL-Q37uDUwDu-DEArew7hUCR4l_fdo6WldokUpKQ4Athf9WvUPQ_XaPRtLt3TfI2DgFFoL4jFgd1FWrkKgYNqf_D3Bl6fCJvsntsKgfLEwxAHczXRiwR5iiJDMNbQ/4cw/YVsocAGQRBKBYjiAKvK_cQ/h3/h001.aNmVNRsVNltO0Oo1gN2R9JIxeF9RK5Co9Pif4nM_Pk8)
📖 **_Read:_ Maybe Democrats Didn’t Do So Badly After All **
For the _Atlantic_ , DLCC President Heather Willams debriefs the 2024 cycle and outlines how state Democrats held their own and made major gains worth celebrating. [**Learn more about state Dems’ power building →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMUTRxRm4ihuUrzTh66uearbtzaaFhLYO_I9IdYhJMXQyvParX5V1wqtFNWj9rAp4Pygb3EISVXmiHet-9a5aPCPGm8mz-vwYFhWvlsjjeCZvU3MuquAoF-kOB70d1gStB9oi2fqBSHHu6Il4Abuvc2cfyHlBE-zRL2v2Dp067-3585CpPj_bodXmZW7zZV-sKFNKvFvJHjqncbF5u_ZUjynmi7vJZIIncODxA69JHg_Z_tlS00XUEcY_QQ6q7NpsN4_wwZOxxazLklqLP1fXvkkwH18KkIXXTbmC2NMGoH1_2Q-Y4gx6xAN8Kl9gETtlY3mVL9eKJg_SMgQPozH1g6eg-NzjCFmV_X_U_C0rpOig-VG9Tsg_FhZboxw9qVXU31imKHzEvmvqfnusNpw91OcTh8HZpiskHf4t9vtod3pWsyxjIluPyNvAG4lHG6-qsrG0o00i3F1EU1b7BHdBHqA9WwPpsUJ5W73D81Poxf7067Z85Bhsn7DIMIoJ8uU6XSEDkM75WvTqHRFZ-p74ysXZ9Hi-JqWFzieVIxdMK_RvLDJT4ixl1RXk9VwhQuDMSoQlgOW_WM3NPEuAvr0hUdY/4cw/YVsocAGQRBKBYjiAKvK_cQ/h4/h001.0IsssB867pZOapNA4595qJnf3mLbYz_5lFHekQN7AWs)
🫏 **_Join the fight:_ Become an Official DLCC Member **
If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. [**Join our team today →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPfBWbVijREBzh7AVmTpWy3nMz174EAGjmJ7syLoV0MSmsXbgUEs8Un32oF_Of_x_OXS8jP3NKKJBMns4BRi1Wxt2SwD4M41ZpD_wzeoKtQm8LiklauevV0sGyBplIj8USZ_s8DHANgd5mSQKTTaq5WoKTfbRMatiuCR7cDn7XtlCb7FRNree3GrYClGqCmWmkcXvlOKiok6owO9GKjRykcuo1YcyRyhXjw6iX3sDtkP5Rp79sJTUHM97th9uPEHwv8UEgBXk3_d2mTgAuJ-KbKDIl9iOjpJ5iD10OVkI6i6D3RFG7Q5hBRzcHjIz8jAQi3I17tD3UbrIr57OoN0RJlEoBXJ_Eh-wtNPWhLWbH57gngaAE7vXepPOBapT6WqIbAd-zj0jgVWCmyFViiOu-KiB5I86LfABSBBspq5cnZMvicyOFao8HRsVCtJ8nL3GyKl-UqYoeaHWnUPytonXUsFlCzrcOwTMX1bxJOviIUf2O4EdbSbkVFewVrvEF9MRcUNP0ZEknXkHl_F1mIDt2cQQ/4cw/YVsocAGQRBKBYjiAKvK_cQ/h5/h001.mFXP24yFF6RO72B1xUs1xaRdGpHJwbMWvPFPc_gnHmU)
**🗳️ _Looking to upcoming races:_ Democrats work to build progressive power **
State Democrats are facing nearly a dozen special elections in the coming months – including _three_ races in Virginia this Tuesday. clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, January 5th, 2025. | | | | | | 1️⃣ Virginia: Democrats prepare for Tuesday’s special elections Democrats are preparing for three special elections this coming Tuesday. These races are one of our first opportunities to combat the MAGA agenda since Trump’s victory in November. 2️⃣ DLCC Investments: Team DLCC announces a six-figure investment Ahead of majority-defining elections in Virginia, our team invested six figures to help power state Democrats to victory. 3️⃣ Anti-Trump Firewalls: How the states are playing a major role in 2025 and beyond In 2024, Democrats’ wins in state legislatures were a bright spot in an election where Republicans secured a federal trifecta. While we brace ourselves for the implications of a second Trump term, 📖 Read: Maybe Democrats Didn’t Do So Badly After All For the Atlantic , DLCC President Heather Willams debriefs the 2024 cycle and outlines how state Democrats held their own and made major gains worth celebrating. 🫏 Join the fight: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Looking to upcoming races: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing nearly a dozen special elections in the coming months – including three races in Virginia this Tuesday. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc.org. # [Washington Post kills cartoon critical of Trump and Bezos. Demand it reverse the self-censorship](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9eeed63f-7937-4341-b9fc-b34ca9d681b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7caa27fa-7e9c-4820-904c-60d74104e46e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | A Pulitzer-prize winning Washington Post cartoonist has quit her job after the paper killed a cartoon critical of Trump and Post owner Jeff Bezos. The move appears to be an act of self-censorship, and comes after a pre-election move in which Bezos reportedly killed a Post endorsement of Kamala Harris. [**Add your name, and tell the Post to reverse this move.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c6fd09f-a325-49ba-8b5a-024fd54ab5ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) America needs journalists to stand up to Trump, and tell the truth -- not stand by helplessly as the nation slides towards dictatorship. [**Add your name, tell the Post to reverse its self censorship and print the cartoon.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84032222-b391-478f-89ca-f6050f941536/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

## Why It Will No Longer Be So Easy to Oust the Speaker of the House – RedState
Mike Johnson wrapped up the Speaker of the House vote on Friday on the first vote, but he also won something else: a new rules package that will make it more difficult for detractors (and Democrats) to engineer his ouster from the position. We saw what happened in 2023 [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=a261fb66d4de4aa1904b28dba25c5516&_e=vQZIml2hnsxJUWuYGiz7ztKaIGKF0fFd4jmyfTtAMj7ZCft8ypYskOSj6PaXD2jH-3WI_0Ez69j3fUybRmEnnivR6StplvwYfFnnLXRn9djinTrBoPZed9FYFTE39OQa1b8JkyfQrHABJExrQXvRKbvyYNgDpiWfyGR-LUpTbxv9hFzrigLvsTDZCG7EA2lQ_ZKJJ1s0QEcpMfdFVr1RleGTgAXV9pHsYD30zL9mH1nj9Jbw6-s3q5Q0j6Gnh21vPR9v7wCFmWSctEqpuNXzVvnkov9VprxFj7U6tILjiinWL5Jt27WgKYAau_0P5N21)

## Italian PM Giorgia Meloni’s Visit to Mar-a-Lago Has People Speculating on a Surprise Guest – RedState
World leaders seem to be flocking in ever-greater numbers to Mar-a-Lago, otherwise known in some circles as the South White House, to visit the President-elect (Acting President?) Donald Trump. Dinosaurs are cool. Little kids love them – I did, and do today, just as much. My grandson Bubba does, too, and we have spent many hours bonding over dinosaur videos. subject: Please don’t scroll past this one-minute read →
body:
It’s Sunday, January 5.
---
️☀️️To all Democrats: 🇺🇸 ️Please don’t scroll past this one-minute read. ️It’s Sunday, January 5. In a few weeks, Trump will be sworn in as our next president — with a Republican Congress to do his bidding.
We have to be prepared for _anything_ coming our way — from destructive legislation and executive orders to Republican attempts to weaken our democracy. And we have to be prepared on day one.
But the truth is that less than 1 percent of the people receiving these messages pitch in. We’re counting on all Democrats who know how important this moment is to step up right now.
[**If fighting back against Trump and electing Democrats at all levels of government matters to you, then we’re asking you to pitch in $3 to help us be the strong Democratic Party we need. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=9762%2E3935704%2El7YdFW) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: We know it may not seem like it has the power to make a difference, but when everyone chips in, it makes a HUGE impact. $1. That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today. Yes, $1. $1 because our new Congress was just sworn in on Friday. $1 because in just over two weeks, Donald Trump will be president of the United States. $1 because in partnership with the MAGA-right, the gun lobby will say, spend, and do anything to reverse the progress we’ve made in our gun violence prevention movement. We know it may not seem like $1 has the power to make a difference. But when everyone contributes their $1, it all adds up and makes a HUGE impact on our work to save lives. So please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | ** \- The team at GIFFORDS PAC Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Hey, it's Alexandria here!
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250105-1175-foote&t=1001&akid=1175%2E342411%2ESB1t1a ]Squad Victory Fund

Hey Peter, it's
Alexandria!

I wanted to reach out personally today to talk about something very near
and dear to my heart: our Squad.

When I first teamed up with my incredible sisters in service — Ilhan,
Ayanna, and Rashida — it was clear that we were building more than just a
social network. We are a movement. Together, we’ve fought tooth and nail
for the progressive values that matter most to the communities we
represent.

Of course, we’ve faced big challenges. We’ve been up against the most
powerful corporate interests in the world, seeking to buy their way into
our politics and silence the voices of everyday people. But we’re still
here. Time and again, we’ve demonstrated that with your support, our Squad
is a resilient force. No matter what obstacles we face, our commitment to
fighting for a future that benefits us all remains unwavering.

Now it’s 2025 and it’s crucial that we have the resources and finances to
keep our focus on real issues that need our help. So I wanted to
personally ask you to help our Squad kick off the New Year.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250105-movement.Ei8adR&refcode=em20250105-1175&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1175%2E342411%2ESB1t1a ]Will you chip in $5 or more today to ensure our strategy to push back
against Trump and his administration is strong, clear, and effective?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250105-movement.Ei8adR&refcode=em20250105-1175&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1175%2E342411%2ESB1t1a ]Contribute ››

Thank you for standing with our movement.

Pa’lante,

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1175%2E342411%2ESB1t1a

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

subject: We’re heating things up
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99898287/521151679/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjkzMGQ0OS03ZWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=46tyb30fZmQWRssVMKyZErT8TV551S3TXACCEqwkmjg=&emci=21930d49-7ecb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2b930d49-7ecb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=24635485)
Friend, do you feel it? There’s something chilly in the air and it’s not just the weather. The fundraising freeze is fast approaching, and it’s a cold front. It’s _**three whole months of zero fundraising**_ , meaning our team has to rely exclusively on the trove of resources we currently have. We need to heat things up over the next few days before we have to put things on pause. **That’s why we’re setting a $17,000 goal before the start of the legislative session on January 8th to ensure that we are set for the next three months.** One of the key methods we use to fundraise is through digital, such as emails like this one. [**If every person who clicks on this email donates $5, we’ll be able to continue fighting for progress in Maryland. Will you donate today so we can keep things heated up during the freeze?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99898290/521151696/-1354668774?refcode=em20250105-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjkzMGQ0OS03ZWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=46tyb30fZmQWRssVMKyZErT8TV551S3TXACCEqwkmjg=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
