clean_body: Friend, do you feel it? There’s something chilly in the air and it’s not just the weather. The fundraising freeze is fast approaching, and it’s a cold front. It’s three whole months of zero fundraising , meaning our team has to rely exclusively on the trove of resources we currently have. We need to heat things up over the next few days before we have to put things on pause. That’s why we’re setting a $17,000 goal before the start of the legislative session on January 8th to ensure that we are set for the next three months. One of the key methods we use to fundraise is through digital, such as emails like this one. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for all of your support. — Team Moore

A Vietnam War veteran asked Donald Trump **[a big question](https://substack.com/redirect/81bba432-eadc-488b-99a0-07ec7a77c868?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on stage during his North Carolina rally right before election day.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/81bba432-eadc-488b-99a0-07ec7a77c868?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/81bba432-eadc-488b-99a0-07ec7a77c868?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Must-see MAGA moments the media FAILED to cover.
"When I came back from the service, we didn't get quite the greatest greeting," the veteran began as Trump nodded in agreement. "A lot of the veterans nowadays are homeless. Seven percent before Biden and Harris took over were homeless, now it's fourteen percent."
"I would like to know what are you going to do to prevent this from getting any larger, and also, kicking these illegal aliens out of the hotels and providing them with money before we do for our homeless vets?"
The Department of Housing and Urban Development reported a **[7.4% increase](https://substack.com/redirect/cba74c81-7887-40f8-a38a-13cdf8c90ade?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in veteran homelessness in 2023. This as sanctuary cities like NYC spend **[billions of tax dollars sheltering illegal migrants in hotels.](https://substack.com/redirect/fd97223a-5027-433f-8d59-e0056f34ada6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Trump grabbed his mic and gave an answer that left nothing to the imagination...
"You have veterans on the street in front of the hotel, and you have illegal immigrants, some of them are serious killers and drug dealers,... and terrorists, and those people are walking into a hotel, and they walk by veterans who are sleeping on the street."
"If we close our walls we're going to be able to handle it!" Trump explained. "They are spending so much money taking care of the illegal migrants,... they're not supposed to be here!"
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/81bba432-eadc-488b-99a0-07ec7a77c868?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Megyn Kelly PUTS AN END to ridiculous Tulsi Gabbard HOAX once and for all**
Megyn Kelly **[SOUNDED OFF on Hillary Clinton](https://substack.com/redirect/31c411d8-a1fe-4601-a1c6-25d647c59667?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for lying about her political rivals being Russian assets; not just Donald Trump but Tulsi Gabbard too!
"Those were lies made up by the Clinton campaign!" Kelly said. "Tulsi, an independent thinker, winds up leaving the party, and then she says 'this was between Russia and Ukraine doesn't have the happen',... this whole thing could have potentially been avoided.'"
**["That is really what is used against her,](https://substack.com/redirect/31c411d8-a1fe-4601-a1c6-25d647c59667?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that's it!" Kelly exclaimed.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/31c411d8-a1fe-4601-a1c6-25d647c59667?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/31c411d8-a1fe-4601-a1c6-25d647c59667?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **The NYC migrant hotel problem is ridiculous ...**
Watch PolitiBrawl editor Matt Miller try to book a room at The Roosevelt Hotel in NYC, now a migrant shelter closed to the public and reportedly an epicenter of crime.
Miller confronted security guards outside the hotel as an experiment to see what would happen. He was told no one was allowed in or out of the hotel, but we caught migrants entering and exiting the building right in front of us...
**[Watch what happened below:](https://substack.com/redirect/fd97223a-5027-433f-8d59-e0056f34ada6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fd97223a-5027-433f-8d59-e0056f34ada6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fd97223a-5027-433f-8d59-e0056f34ada6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
| | POLL
---
How much money should U.S. cities spend on housing people who came here illegally?
| [Zero dollars](https://substack..jW3i-BrczMqCM3UWrB564431vqZylLJ9x6iKVTCHWyY?)
---
[Some but less than we currently are](https://substack..knL9KaffLUnhFMFxGi58dqiUZ3QLxX8j9MVX1WRtDzU?)
[Keep same spending, they need help](https://substack..kCmXvL9di2MpdGpnWUVLlyNRhh5m1cWipoq4rnXfF00?)
[Spend more on shelters](https://substack..YuIcmKEKQHj-MvbYpjsRcXHJzw_0rNv3xA7XyRFIMf0?)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Friend, Elon and Vivek are starting a Department of Government Efficiency podcast!

What better way to help hold the government accountable than to bring the public along to see all of the wasteful spending, unnecessary regulations and fraud that goes on.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99908455/521160051/-664527026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjVkN2U3Yi04NWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duXY3_sHq84PxlideQTEwbTZDSPYA9cqM4yiXNNCVE8=)
Friend, Donald Trump has put forth one dangerous pick for his cabinet after another, but his pick for Attorney General stood out to us. **Meet Pam Bondi:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99908456/521160052/38783912?refcode=em-1.5.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjVkN2U3Yi04NWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duXY3_sHq84PxlideQTEwbTZDSPYA9cqM4yiXNNCVE8=) – She was a central lawyer for Trump during his 2019 impeachment. – She provided counsel to Trump on his first term’s pardons. – She fought for Trump in court to falsely prove 2020 election was stolen. – And she even challenged ballots in Pennsylvania after the 2020 election and actively spread disinformation about alleged election fraud. **It’s clear, friend: Bondi’s loyalties lie with Trump, and Trump ONLY.** [**Trump and his allies are counting on us to stay silent. We’re fighting back with everything we’ve got, and we need YOU in with us. Please chip in $3 to help us protect our democracy and stand as a firewall against his dangerous agenda.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99908457/521160053/38783912?refcode=em-1.5.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjVkN2U3Yi04NWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duXY3_sHq84PxlideQTEwbTZDSPYA9cqM4yiXNNCVE8=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99908458/521160054/38783912?refcode=em-1.5.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjVkN2U3Yi04NWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=duXY3_sHq84PxlideQTEwbTZDSPYA9cqM4yiXNNCVE8=)**

name: Ryoko Wifi
subject: Never lose signal again with portable Wi-Fi
body:
Did you know that it's now possible to take the internet with you wherever you go this summer?...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19618/6374453/cd114755df8797fb87d179501cfa2f3b0e3db753/b2cc0c460db9c7a6b16bdf53f1ff79006299a0e9)
---
| | |
---
_January 5th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
Hey, Did you know that it's now possible to take the internet with you wherever you go this summer? **Muama Ryoko is a pocket sized router that gives you insanely fast Wi-Fi** connection anywhere you travel. This amazing device acts as a wireless modem by creating a Wi-Fi network around itself using 4G LTE. **[YES, I WANT TO ORDER MY MUAMA RYOKO TODAY](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19618/6374453/cd114755df8797fb87d179501cfa2f3b0e3db753/b2cc0c460db9c7a6b16bdf53f1ff79006299a0e9)** No more paying high fees for internet usage or not having internet at all. Now your family can enjoy the benefits of wireless internet wherever they go. **The Muama Ryoko** lets you stay connected to the internet even in the mountains. ⟩Connect up to 10 devices to extremely fast Wi-Fi wherever you travel. ⟩No contract needed and No hidden charges just an amazing deal. ⟩Superfast internet speeds up to 150Mbs. **[SEND ME MY MUAMA RYOKO PORTABLE WIRELESS MODEM](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19618/6374453/cd114755df8797fb87d179501cfa2f3b0e3db753/b2cc0c460db9c7a6b16bdf53f1ff79006299a0e9)** With summer quickly approaching, there's no better time to start forming your travel plans. But don’t wait too long, this is a limited time offer as supplies are running low. **Get your Muama Ryoko portable internet today.**

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Meet the Whips Event Moved to Tuesday, January 7 @ 2pm
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Dear Friend,
A winter storm warning is in effect for Sunday night and Monday, so we’re moving our “Meet the Whips” Happy Hour at Federal House to Tuesday, January 7, 2025, from 2 to 4 p.m. We want everyone to be safe in the New Year!
I’ll still be joined by Chief Deputy Whips Vaughn Stewart and Melissa Wells , but we’ll gather at a new time one day later. Together, we’ll fight for what matters most to you and those you care about .
If you’d like to join us, visit bit.ly/JazzJan6 [http://bit.ly/JazzJan6] (this link still works for the Tuesday event). If you prefer to contribute by check or money order, please bring your donation to the door so we can deposit it before Session convenes on January 8 at noon.
If you have any questions, please contact Rachael Rice at 410-218-1964 or rachaelrice@riceconsultingllc.com.
Please take care in the cold weather.
Jazz
bit.ly/JazzJan6 [bit.ly/JazzJan6]
By Authority: Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

I’ve been trying to reach you for weeks! My team has been tasked with collecting one million responses to our survey to assess Republican support in 2024 so that we can start 2025 off strong. And your response appears to be LOST! name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The Power of Attitude: A Life-Changing Message
body:
Attitude Matters—Here’s How It Can Change Your Life
It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon’s report on my father.
| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1ac17b41362b4bce92f6bd10e47725a3&_e=H4yG7DTFUrbH76Xe1QVfy861whBSOL1BMXVPV8xEDMZ8i359A9FO7J2d48Z5Lb51JCbVjaHh5K3UqTLLZFmxQNVJA_5VlQxww0Mcds7xKC_u7GK6irMP0Sf9MRi_nCoBCcXs8Th3cPa-jQilfhmwlRBNCtTZSoXX7uBugUvouRCBRsGRss_Ml5lsadxxBAnHxZ0Snas1O7gpyeI2-3vFhDEUwXoVXOljhpBpoY6gkqprd2yy6qNH1wr7TFdwvrokEuJkiI1Kkb4m7-wLv_k2SQhFfqNCSELcb70einEq7qtTfjbm_erZURQQEfVwvZJceGqWamqKGuBjKlrho0oldgD3duzkyZ8iYq4xy7KO1Bs6zw702JGoa6s6WZCiY6ReDXQjgJtjUYRIKMrlq3FSODNUSgKAJvYNyYrti06uN4tg_PbHI32GYGj2lONFXUDA)
---
Hello Friend

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perserverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1ac17b41362b4bce92f6bd10e47725a3&_e=H4yG7DTFUrbH76Xe1QVfy861whBSOL1BMXVPV8xEDMZ8i359A9FO7J2d48Z5Lb51JCbVjaHh5K3UqTLLZFmxQNVJA_5VlQxww0Mcds7xKC_u7GK6irMP0Sf9MRi_nCoBCcXs8Th3cPa-jQilfhmwlRBNCtTZSoXX7uBugUvouRCBRsGRss_Ml5lsadxxBAnHxZ0Snas1O7gpyeI2-3vFhDEUwXoVXOljhpBpoY6gkqprd2yy6qNH1wr7TFdwvrokEuJkiI1Kkb4m7-wLv_k2ScWYBgm_TTGNtd65RdaULoZ38MZW1lf9IV9EJnfSP3MCsx0fFx6OmZfMOaJurqlTBQodHRg93JqnyGeY4GfCwU2Eg70x4ocALx9nnWXUDIiGgYJgihO8jBwccpTL0LhGDqU3P-LL9UqNkIBaucEPmBEPaoExSAWGVyMtF6SpjNGz)
---
To get your copy of _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , you can give a gift of any amount here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-generous-gift-1](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1ac17b41362b4bce92f6bd10e47725a3&_e=H4yG7DTFUrbH76Xe1QVfy861whBSOL1BMXVPV8xEDMZ8i359A9FO7J2d48Z5Lb51JCbVjaHh5K3UqTLLZFmxQNVJA_5VlQxww0Mcds7xKC_u7GK6irMP0Sf9MRi_nCoBCcXs8Th3cPa-jQilfhmwlRBNCtTZSoXX7uBugUvouRCBRsGRss_Ml5lsadxxBAnHxZ0Snas1O7gpyeI2-3vFhDEUwXoVXOljhpBpoY6gkqprd2yy6qNH1wr7TFdwvrokEuJkiI1Kkb4m7-wLv_k2SZ4QuvwFz02C8Wq3MeKApjn0Q-9kZ2hcO9CSlGJRRvT6Rzz68n1clz01fMD5rOZbtgMi9iVbkxUtIzBTDs18FH5kELM6NuzZwAkrdCYVQqWtdKBjU7wkZNuoEeIjGNRSgJFylurzItR9WXuCgNvAtt6wzs3dEn5aWidp346dKfJH)

I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer!

Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. Request the bundle here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-large-gift-kit-1](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1ac17b41362b4bce92f6bd10e47725a3&_e=H4yG7DTFUrbH76Xe1QVfy861whBSOL1BMXVPV8xEDMZ8i359A9FO7J2d48Z5Lb51JCbVjaHh5K3UqTLLZFmxQDqnas-bDHFV6eyP4alHwGuobdu_HHsS6xunC37RK1mg7YqWS5q_fV1iFji1ro8zVMsv5JArR7TvqeGphoMj_Hkj6FzzBgsAYydMp4kvo6M0N2v2tG5GuwT43phLDznyCGTRKdt9pEs4SUHkcOUMQ7PfUzvnfGXDiyye3_KiXC-9WBB07QeDcTUYKeWgi3ECUIzvMyg3szCDt9F1SabOhn9CqfPKI0FXp4Eq4xiCtgMUdzfkBKUu--yEaNO9yC8gI40oeXYL6_NoULSbZWiKVdZBybTMuqs34VP1X9eRQhHGzoCfBMeXTWBXX1It8kOzWTY1YBSWcVr8gVdKm3QWSxRw3vprsrk8XILX69GQseVo)

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything." That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life." That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like: Purpose over aimlessness Perserverance over defeat * Faith over worry My book, Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to Pathway to Victory's ministry work this month. Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices. | | To get your copy of Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life , you can give a gift of any amount here: I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer! Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. Request the bundle here:

name: Don't Privatize USPS via Our Revolution
subject: Petition: Save USPS from privatization
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Trump’s latest victim in his relentless push for privatization? USPS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20729?t=1011&akid=7478%2E5885482%2Ee5DODN ][IMG]

Trump recently confirmed developing plans to privatize USPS as soon as he
gets into the White House. And all of us will pay the price.

Privatizing this essential service would be a direct attack on a public
good we all rely on – especially rural communities. USPS’s “universal
service obligation” requires it to deliver mail regardless of distance or
profitability concerns, which means it is often the only carrier that will
deliver to rural parts of the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20729?source=email-20250105&t=1012&akid=7478%2E5885482%2Ee5DODN ]That’s why Our Revolution is fighting tooth and nail to save USPS. But
it’s going to take a massive outcry from the public to do it. Will you
join this urgent call to save USPS NOW?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20729?source=email-20250105&t=1013&akid=7478%2E5885482%2Ee5DODN ]ADD YOUR NAME

Privatizing the U.S. Postal Service would send an earthquake through the
systems we all rely on to get vital medication, Social Security checks,
and so much more. It would completely alter consumer shipping and business
supply chains, all while pushing hundreds of thousands of federal workers
out of the government. Not to mention adding a profit tax on a public
good.

There’s no question it would be a disaster for our communities. But one of
Trump's top economic advisers made their plans clear, telling the press
“We didn’t finish the job in the first term, but we should finish it now.”

Already, Elon Musk’s “Department of Government Efficiency” is having
secret conversations about how to gut the Postal Service. Our Revolution
is fighting back, ready to overwhelm Congress with a MASSIVE call to save
USPS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20729?source=email-20250105&t=1014&akid=7478%2E5885482%2Ee5DODN ]We won’t let up until privatization plans are off the table, but it
could be a long fight ahead and we need your support to make this huge.
Will you add your name?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Royce White
subject: Crisis Mode
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
I MISSED my 2024 fundraising deadline
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6bb034a449dc4187a0c44ab7343d32d3&_e=mtIc14hyFElMvJsDVzSqmi-2uU7ppHMEkUAbU6QfSmaxlZUqYTRoYfL6KfDEH-Jlkd3MVX42jjVOjpy3h5ZZ9ceKJZ5Jbiv2qeSOb2fKP1ucFmkC0aBAVpU8YjcQ-wdHkpf18H7x6xAw0fUFFRWnJXxaQvMHlO-1VXcdO1t4v2ik6hWOVLuHgMRkbbI5Es5jta-y3R7Znpiew081ZUPEXodG_if_rsg_R1lsqGC0yW2_uoX4ipTqWLlkLdedssSo1KlKeLVwGwYaZk28SA0rQXlDsXjbjZ0aYf6hBqwkByVz6aBAyEacJwiJ_oyYJMb6S7WhqY7F2bO5LHEHZ8stig%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

**I MISSED my 2024 fundraising deadline and now I 'm off to a BAD START to 2025!**

I get it's early to ask you to help me in my Senate Campaign for 2026, but Tina Smith already has a huge election war chest and is spending millions against me. If I don't catch up now, I won't have a chance to win when it's time.

**I 'm EXTENDING my 2024 yearly deadline UNTIL MIDNIGHT, and I'm calling on you to help me out.**

**[Can you chip in $10 before midnight to help me catch up?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6bb034a449dc4187a0c44ab7343d32d3&_e=mtIc14hyFElMvJsDVzSqmi-2uU7ppHMEkUAbU6QfSmaxlZUqYTRoYfL6KfDEH-Jlkd3MVX42jjVOjpy3h5ZZ9ceKJZ5Jbiv2qeSOb2fKP1ucFmkC0aBAVpU8YjcQ-wdHkpf18H7x6xAw0fUFFRWnJXxaQvMHlO-1VXcdO1t4v2ik6hWOVLuHgMRkbbI5Es5jitupOObP8k8_QhU-FJYW8HMmN_e7H-wAEKU49azEMlrT9ubCbBWGCNoE1ze8x8C3oKVAB76gF7WdPa7F_jqelOPZvRz8lqnfL5btCbkBeB_LCSX526BvuFnvWJB2CW6xJmLsisXLrH21PNeVhTkOig%3D%3D)**

Getting a head start in 2025 is CRUCIAL to my success. I've been through two elections so far, and I've gotten better and better each time. The 2026 Midterm Election is when I'll FINALLY become Minnesota's first Black Republican Senator.

**[Please, I'm humbly asking you to donate just $10 to give me the head start I need to win.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6bb034a449dc4187a0c44ab7343d32d3&_e=mtIc14hyFElMvJsDVzSqmi-2uU7ppHMEkUAbU6QfSmaxlZUqYTRoYfL6KfDEH-Jlkd3MVX42jjVOjpy3h5ZZ9ceKJZ5Jbiv2qeSOb2fKP1ucFmkC0aBAVpU8YjcQ-wdHkpf18H7x6xAw0fUFFRWnJXxaQvMHlO-1VXcdO1t4v2ik6hWOVLuHgMRkbbI5Es5jDvKfe2RshnjOY2dVWFVSyQfrMaNaYrmz1E7EUvwijbERh3V_b7uwTYXbKNFoenp47LuSIdnpuYluy2iiMQF87iCB0zCfSJD185yC9LRQ-e_FaNWNOkqMjHedNUdwrdryOgfcuEbRujr2oPwqDj5chA%3D%3D)**

Thank you,
Royce White

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6bb034a449dc4187a0c44ab7343d32d3&_e=mtIc14hyFElMvJsDVzSqmi-2uU7ppHMEkUAbU6QfSmaxlZUqYTRoYfL6KfDEH-Jlkd3MVX42jjVOjpy3h5ZZ9ceKJZ5Jbiv2qeSOb2fKP1ucFmkC0aBAVpU8YjcQ-wdHkpf18H7x6xAw0fUFFRWnJXxaQvMHlO-1VXcdO1t4v2ik6hWOVLuHgMRkbbI5Es5j5Wi7zg2f_a24FjUGnT7gYq5lrjd61MzTfcXh_iXpvv_WmtHhtCofoygx8cCFCAA5pPtXsV3QpGE1igwmoMYS9Zq0RWbRvxfEL0av5z_cexXXXl2rooex7Ofu-_hzp5iQtVww7BLbfoiis_kSLEiarA%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6bb034a449dc4187a0c44ab7343d32d3&_e=mtIc14hyFElMvJsDVzSqmi-2uU7ppHMEkUAbU6QfSmaxlZUqYTRoYfL6KfDEH-Jlkd3MVX42jjVOjpy3h5ZZ9ceKJZ5Jbiv2qeSOb2fKP1ucFmkC0aBAVpU8YjcQ-wdHkpf18H7x6xAw0fUFFRWnJXxaQvMHlO-1VXcdO1t4v2ik6hWOVLuHgMRkbbI5Es5j1Dm3myxjK9BPpqEU7kDDNpq8VTMD29S7PPchxg8lXZO3z6YyRk4Zgze7N3G6NLJnd7o0RQtDxdvMlH4eAkWW_VxpbrRDDytyb-JQzdRMetC_t9T0GW6TVO2ASJ8Ppuulqcro2C2Q2K2Ujye0izXLtw%3D%3D)

---

PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

---
Copyright (C) 2024 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you are interested in updates from Royce White, Senate Candidate in Minnesota.

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](https://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_s=6bb034a449dc4187a0c44ab7343d32d3&_t=DdvffVcs1bln46iPoxaH2FzdDgoSH0LHDpqPiiNrCAyE6g3z8sYIt_VxkP5-5JBL6bbMEzGhRODgsOf4b2EIIHxcR6WvGouqGmfph3vmBHBBBONsI9WO-S_a5JIp0HgJ)

[ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6bb034a449dc4187a0c44ab7343d32d3&_e=mtIc14hyFElMvJsDVzSqmm7uxP5Rqq5SwB2fafaf60g9gZDGUqmkojAuqXtr4NTIscKS9IMb5E6nj6uFfyxJkK2OHhxXrpmHv1HMMpBtBieoo9i9WSNYC4uzPc7TuZ-FKj7rXKbvN_xkimY1XG_xmBp-CpVvyvIEUONQcya-s2Cx8lC0QB_mOsr5wtOcjDmMRFR7S8ge-f8_hduCB3f6m-mCVe06N07Yfjcbok7JAn7XdOCABMZlsUpvvRI4TE4a)

---
Hello,

Last month, we sent you our urgent poll asking if President Biden should preemptively pardon Dr. Fauci.

**But our records indicate that you didn’t respond to our poll.** We know you don’t want Donald Trump to jail Dr. Fauci!

**[_So we’re giving you one last chance to complete our urgent poll »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/biden-pardon-fauci?source=FFR_20250105_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=7&akid=22711%2E4449941%2EnHXaNI)** | [COMPLETE YOUR POLL NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/biden-pardon-fauci?source=FFR_20250105_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=8&akid=22711%2E4449941%2EnHXaNI)
---
We’ve attached our original message below for your records.

Fight for Reform

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: BREAKING UPDATE (via FFR)
Subject: President Biden might PARDON Dr. Fauci?!
TO: TOP DEMOCRATS
**BREAKING: Biden team reportedly considering preemptive pardons for Fauci, Schiff, other Trump 'targets'**

---
Trump and the MAGA GOP are HELLBENT on punishing Dr. Fauci.

❌ _They refuse to call him a doctor!_
❌ _They’re calling him a _mass murderer_!_
❌ _They’re even saying he should be in prison!!!_

With just over a month until Trump’s in office, pardoning Fauci could be the best bet to save him from going to prison!

**We need 10,000 local Democrats to respond to our urgent poll by midnight tonight to confirm their support for pardoning Dr. Fauci:**

**[_Should President Biden preemptively pardon Dr. Anthony Fauci?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/biden-pardon-fauci?source=FFR_20250105_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=10&akid=22711%2E4449941%2EnHXaNI)** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/biden-pardon-fauci?source=FFR_20250105_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=11&akid=22711%2E4449941%2EnHXaNI) | [YES »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/biden-pardon-fauci?source=FFR_20250105_EMPOLL_E2_T0_NS&t=12&akid=22711%2E4449941%2EnHXaNI)

Contributions to End Citizens United Non-federal will be used in End Citizens United Non-federal’s sole discretion and are not being earmarked for use in any particular state or election. fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives. Please, consider making a . | Swearing In Day Jan 3, 2025
---
| |
---
| Friends,
January 3, we began with prayer. I had the honor of being sworn in as a member of the 119th Congress. We would not be here without you. Thank you for your prayers and your vote. This experience was 10 times better because so many of you made the drive to be with us in Washington DC on a very special day.
We look forward to certifying President Trump on Monday.
[Click here for 94 photos from Swearing in Day](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kCmsb9BBO1aUiPdcDmF4G6wMlMTK_hvp9dL6AXAUxzqWlGwQS4wBXcpuemKDaK7CFBld1KiovO1svaOJvXBlpyC1c__VJmVTwjIXhGoBMa8QBHxr6Lvk6Js2Ws5hC6oH-9csXY6SmZLxpBmNbJ9adPiCKKTHQ2f2j5SakZ9MJre8RrzDPk7hcxOkxlNBurgkCDKI7_KGmTuQpju9G6siUzsqSfxcXWUW&c=YadclfzQMn4_33L8R6fzNj0RWL6saUnBQJZLi2cT27Or6rO9lO8g8Q==&ch=JSd842Aig0_vRNujzG6L953s3VsFpEKFRuiwEYxMjQHVYmXPAMWIbA==).

I'm happy we agree Mike Johnson" [Speaker Mike Johnson](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kCmsb9BBO1aUiPdcDmF4G6wMlMTK_hvp9dL6AXAUxzqWlGwQS4wBXcpuemKDaK7CtPDrxbzR-kUtnpFegh4Xxnn5gbyCfKQ-9j3-qZfEc1aCaz779gRYoUzXsF-8AYMt7HWNQcBawfDOSCnmfLzA2GUpCqfAPFd7Y-0TZ3WRxzVqpPmq8m7BzR8kFiGN_wo5J-wuUyiqKxcZjV617NvSIC3PGTWTRLT970C6T9Rx2Pxo8B4j83emSYIhIRFXrSCSh7HWlH1i8k0aKWWgw1CjzDxoG-6BUu_jkIZMpWsFelIQR-oNG8370RCh2xQvqGyvBOGQB6djxjj6kAmrmJOXPfzawGEuiuhpKyYHIeOMLAhqL23K9I5pTl-Q6yIkBStfa4gCyfI3Wc7y687J89lULhwkG6kiFBxOss6HKZq5zzIpsTuGcKJKipyNnmKYOwpZT2kbtB3qcwqT_DdgktjnCrka0c45L7hKWr2dazD9BB4=&c=YadclfzQMn4_33L8R6fzNj0RWL6saUnBQJZLi2cT27Or6rO9lO8g8Q==&ch=JSd842Aig0_vRNujzG6L953s3VsFpEKFRuiwEYxMjQHVYmXPAMWIbA==) was endorsed by Trump and defeated the democrat speaker candidate 218 to 215. Unlike the 15 rounds of voting last year, fellow Republicans stuck together and elected Speaker Johnson on the first vote.
---
| 2025
---
| Our plan for 2025 is to continue the teamwork, efforts to unite Virginians, and do our part to advance President Trump's America First Agenda. We have a country to save!
This year Virginia must elect a republican Governor, Lieutenant Governor, Attorney General, and regain the majority in the House of Delegates.
---
| January 7 Special Election for State Senate D10
---
| Please ask friends to vote for our Republican nominee for State Senate District 10 Luther Cifers. He is a Christian Conservative, a family man, and businessman.
Election Day is Tuesday, January 7 at your normal voting precinct. We must ensure this seat remains in Republican hands. Please spread the word.

body:
I’ve been fighting for public education for 40 years:

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99917018/521172364/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGUxNTNlOC04ZWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgyw8Zya5vWH3EBtNiHRVGg1xig6-vCvbtsL89wDpnM=)
---
Hey Peter, it’s Mark.

I recently sent over a petition asking engaged Democrats to add their name to stand with the Department of Education against attempts to abolish it — and I’m still waiting on your response.

[**We have limited time to act before Trump takes office and his media circus completely distracts from any public action — but we need massive support: If you could take 1 minute to add your signature, I would be deeply appreciative »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99917019/521172365/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20250105_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGUxNTNlOC04ZWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgyw8Zya5vWH3EBtNiHRVGg1xig6-vCvbtsL89wDpnM=&emci=461d9f09-0fca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&emdi=88e153e8-8ecb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18839602) | [ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99917020/521172366/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20250105_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGUxNTNlOC04ZWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgyw8Zya5vWH3EBtNiHRVGg1xig6-vCvbtsL89wDpnM=&emci=461d9f09-0fca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&emdi=88e153e8-8ecb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18839602)
---
Thank you so much,

Mark

**P.S. You can read my original message below.**
**Before running for Congress I was an English teacher for 20 years.** Here I am in the classroom back in 1994. Simpler times.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99917021/521172368/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20250105_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGUxNTNlOC04ZWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgyw8Zya5vWH3EBtNiHRVGg1xig6-vCvbtsL89wDpnM=&emci=461d9f09-0fca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&emdi=88e153e8-8ecb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18839602)
Working with students and their parents has still been the most rewarding part of my decades in public service.

**Looking back, it would be unconscionable to think that just 30 years after that picture was taken, the very foundation of public education in this country – the Department of Education – would be under attack.**

**_Let me be as abundantly clear_ : abolishing the Department of Education would be a disaster– for our students, for our teachers, for parents, for our economy, and for our future.**

Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies want to dismantle public education in this country. Top to bottom, inside and out, they want to gut education and force working families to pay more taxes for less.

I know this seems like a losing fight, Peter. But that’s exactly what Donald Trump wants you to feel. He wants you to feel defeated. He wants you to give up and acquiesce to his extreme agenda. **We cannot let him win.**

We have to fight back, Peter. For students, for parents, for teachers, and for our future. This is one of the most important fights we’ll take on in the New Year.

[**If you’re willing to stand with me, can you add your name to the growing list of Democrats defending the Department of Education from MAGA Republicans? I am hoping to see at least 150 new signatures from PA tonight. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99917022/521172369/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20250105_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGUxNTNlOC04ZWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgyw8Zya5vWH3EBtNiHRVGg1xig6-vCvbtsL89wDpnM=&emci=461d9f09-0fca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&emdi=88e153e8-8ecb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18839602)
[ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99917025/521172371/892807758?refcode=MTFC_20250105_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGUxNTNlOC04ZWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgyw8Zya5vWH3EBtNiHRVGg1xig6-vCvbtsL89wDpnM=&emci=461d9f09-0fca-ef11-88d0-0022482a9b45&emdi=88e153e8-8ecb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18839602)

Mark Takano

subject: Jack Smith has DAYS to release his report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
|
---
**Peter, as of 1/05/25 your signature is missing from the “Release the Jack Smith Report” petition.**

**Donald Trump will be inaugurated in 15 days, that leaves almost no time left for Jack Smith to release his report!**

If he doesn’t make his report public, the record of Trump’s crimes will be destroyed forever and he may NEVER be held accountable!

Trump and his MAGA cronies have been intimidating Smith for months, _so it’s critical that we show a massive amount of support to ensure he finishes the job._

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Life in prison for saving a cop’s life
body:
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.
Dear Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e9ffb8d5da3a4d4f9d7c8c4d4f777146&_e=yjiNe5yUvrnqQcwwtbjEIqrYHD-tOJ04sa9uaR-dKekwDc-44AsaS585yQJhfJBGCP3QsXtRrueG_ARvnyyETT2DfY9XjcXiw63WJhneqiEm6DDD_gh-SsSNLw4pJs6juoWzdq6OepuTN5s5ZS7eTlSZLpgbGk719-kcOwVHqyU__wofNtjeqaYus4aGojmd1eNqNOJzj5kjte8kklmG419GZ7zqgHoP_e2q6KA7bdRZJzgtZswIZo68J74WpGPGaRZZGk39Ti0P3uNNXBQGam_VKfyRZrBtC8VbpfrGX2eAVrGAus_Q62G3l2ZNUgOyKIiPAHWyMCBFLsk1q1A7QXxhNRmRshIRCicMGHLxA2ufDh89RQ-PcRVDyJfB_b9Y)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e9ffb8d5da3a4d4f9d7c8c4d4f777146&_e=yjiNe5yUvrnqQcwwtbjEIqrYHD-tOJ04sa9uaR-dKekwDc-44AsaS585yQJhfJBGCP3QsXtRrueG_ARvnyyETT2DfY9XjcXiw63WJhneqiEm6DDD_gh-SsSNLw4pJs6juoWzdq6OepuTN5s5ZS7eTlSZLpgbGk719-kcOwVHqyU__wofNtjeqaYus4aGojmd1eNqNOJzj5kjte8kklmG419GZ7zqgHoP_e2q6KA7bdSROIyvcMa5jd1gDMyfm45JPSgJ-g1-syJ1o-LXgeH8iUdnQStAWDWZX9vwLzmsZpevH4nkgHNb3N_qei_5-1naf7KPPIIwjjQ0c9kOfNkTxABJvIPKjwTEoa0dC8uKT4fAPbWysAKOTqocj5FPLN58)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e9ffb8d5da3a4d4f9d7c8c4d4f777146&_e=yjiNe5yUvrnqQcwwtbjEIqrYHD-tOJ04sa9uaR-dKekwDc-44AsaS585yQJhfJBGCP3QsXtRrueG_ARvnyyETT2DfY9XjcXiw63WJhneqiEm6DDD_gh-SsSNLw4pJs6juoWzdq6OepuTN5s5ZS7eTlSZLpgbGk719-kcOwVHqyU__wofNtjeqaYus4aGojmd1eNqNOJzj5kjte8kklmG419GZ7zqgHoP_e2q6KA7bdTOZDqWP39NSyLFK7yEFM8d9eMriciauIfWjw6wlMVUOz_M2odr59MAMV3_Oj_FlWibWOnDDGROnxy4peQrUdymNU9Z7f1FHmFUPmS4HboLgqX8M6Z92Qw4tUa-wG2KxOIcGRE_Fb39cu0L1fXxXpXh)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e9ffb8d5da3a4d4f9d7c8c4d4f777146&_e=yjiNe5yUvrnqQcwwtbjEIqrYHD-tOJ04sa9uaR-dKekwDc-44AsaS585yQJhfJBGCP3QsXtRrueG_ARvnyyETT2DfY9XjcXiw63WJhneqiEm6DDD_gh-SsSNLw4pJs6juoWzdq6OepuTN5s5ZS7eTlSZLpgbGk719-kcOwVHqyU__wofNtjeqaYus4aGojmd1eNqNOJzj5kjte8kklmG419GZ7zqgHoP_e2q6KA7bdRnm2qcDewBYbyME-5ty7z1Uad8XiQABxElUtOHCmcOlPJc10yRvYoO8WWH4e8p4KMhCg617_9SbP7YMHULU3VtRARX5mjJHrbs46kk9LXMR2-OuuIEVWNJTwfbofBFPXQcoxQ5j9KXaqMl50bB6Yh-)**

His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e9ffb8d5da3a4d4f9d7c8c4d4f777146&_e=yjiNe5yUvrnqQcwwtbjEIqrYHD-tOJ04sa9uaR-dKekwDc-44AsaS585yQJhfJBGCP3QsXtRrueG_ARvnyyETT2DfY9XjcXiw63WJhneqiEm6DDD_gh-SsSNLw4pJs6juoWzdq6OepuTN5s5ZS7eTlSZLpgbGk719-kcOwVHqyU__wofNtjeqaYus4aGojmd1eNqNOJzj5kjte8kklmG419GZ7zqgHoP_e2q6KA7bdTvRzEw8s4AlDI1Z3sTxSJQNzo4LlJCLAnCgomyzCbGAorLRa_hxnMlFBydaSWWD4cR36-MhryHMoMs9CbMcfGHpYZlhb-C52UB7VKr9Mv-EQyiAbcKbZ7in41yyY0kmC1hG6cq-Zew_1TrlRWuU-pe)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

clean_body: Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Dear Patriot, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... - His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! You’ve heard us say it before: The stakes in 2025 couldn’t be higher — _and it's still true._ In just a few weeks, Donald Trump will return to the White House. Big Oil is celebrating as Trump fills his cabinet with fossil fuel loyalists who will gut climate regulations, roll back every ounce of progress we’ve made, and push for unchecked drilling. To make matters worse, Republicans will control Congress — and they’re ready to do Donald Trump’s bidding and unleash their anti-climate agenda. As we prepare for the critical challenges ahead, we’re counting on you. This movement thrives because it’s shaped by grassroots activists like you, and your voice helps guide our work. **[Will you take a moment to fill out our 2025 Priority Issues Survey? It’s quick, and your input will guide our strategy to elect leaders who truly represent your interests.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99919618/521180527/658572669?refcode=ea.94482d66-98cb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.94482d66-98cb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0NDgyZDY2LTk4Y2ItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8eAiyR4w7FFKY4RgySzGokTo7b329xvkauqC0Sn85EY=&emci=90482d66-98cb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=94482d66-98cb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)** There’s no right or wrong answer here — what matters most to YOU? clean_body: Your voice will shape our priorities this year. | You’ve heard us say it before: The stakes in 2025 couldn’t be higher — and it's still true. In just a few weeks, Donald Trump will return to the White House. Big Oil is celebrating as Trump fills his cabinet with fossil fuel loyalists who will gut climate regulations, roll back every ounce of progress we’ve made, and push for unchecked drilling. To make matters worse, Republicans will control Congress — and they’re ready to do Donald Trump’s bidding and unleash their anti-climate agenda. As we prepare for the critical challenges ahead, we’re counting on you. This movement thrives because it’s shaped by grassroots activists like you, and your voice helps guide our work. There’s no right or wrong answer here — what matters most to YOU? Environmental justice? Extreme heat? A just transition to clean energy? We want to know. | With gratitude and hope, Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010525_1&amount=25]
Politico: Foreign influence efforts are circling the presidential election. Again. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Politico_ForeignInterference.png]
The Department of Justice has previously seized websites linked to Russian disinformation campaigns. Federal authorities separately accused two employees of the Moscow-controlled media organization RT of being a part of a scheme to spread Russian propaganda, bolstered by millions of dollars.
That comes on the heels of a Beltway think tank revealing that a network of pro-Iranian sites have been circulating disinformation around the election, not long after the intelligence community linked Iran to a hacking of a presidential campaign. U.S. officials have said that Russia, Iran, and China were all trying to influence our elections.
We want to hear from voters in your area on this issue. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Are you worried about foreign interference in our elections?

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=010525_1&amount=25]

name: David Horowitz
subject: I’m not saying this to scare you
body:
I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=981269eee66a414783bb463fc2144c4b&_e=HuDhzW610NzSK-913c4FQRfrsAKcUB3hb7LMXbun7eihtld6T0w9P4_rqBhy2XHl3JDv5LU1CKD-QJtjK02LB_TW3MtTaERBZzXk7DYf67yoCa7LEH0ntppZE7LYhFW-DxVRJbsFCAzfTfYFAintghO78vA4tRB_OtyW9jWkIbFkPDjYPqrWZJ7iyCuGn_Ya5HU8XfVygMVWnbC-afhkEu9QgUKNWEq7-MuClZiJu43k7DqP1yM3svpzhwvdbJJ9kiz-DbuR78KpymTNNm3QfDnySROUImrmiMg8ceDMfoTOCp-OA_loooFhUuO4tvj0Rq80JUxpjGY8tldMoHtmMbQ9OnDexwAKKOy6Twgxb_QD9ZkTOJcDIdTdGR5dBWgryAFG47pv_oEWfMGmJjuyEQ%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=981269eee66a414783bb463fc2144c4b&_e=HuDhzW610NzSK-913c4FQRfrsAKcUB3hb7LMXbun7eihtld6T0w9P4_rqBhy2XHl3JDv5LU1CKD-QJtjK02LB_TW3MtTaERBZzXk7DYf67yoCa7LEH0ntppZE7LYhFW-DxVRJbsFCAzfTfYFAintghO78vA4tRB_OtyW9jWkIbFkPDjYPqrWZJ7iyCuGn_Ya5HU8XfVygMVWnbC-afhkEu9QgUKNWEq7-MuClZiJu43k7DqP1yM3svpzhwvdbJJ9m3OnCaymTeB9c8j5WGnPLx87UVs47VyhC9kebeVBKaaqU5NpHK4emH06qzSb2vASgpqGhNvOxV8IiPLKiO9hBlmvcWuDapVY2OZFXEzv5lQDRA8G7DArqkbsmVS0sgAcM_1XGISsjBeL7G4Ftu2uug%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=981269eee66a414783bb463fc2144c4b&_e=HuDhzW610NzSK-913c4FQRfrsAKcUB3hb7LMXbun7eihtld6T0w9P4_rqBhy2XHl3JDv5LU1CKD-QJtjK02LB_TW3MtTaERBZzXk7DYf67yoCa7LEH0ntppZE7LYhFW-DxVRJbsFCAzfTfYFAintghO78vA4tRB_OtyW9jWkIbFkPDjYPqrWZJ7iyCuGn_Ya5HU8XfVygMVWnbC-afhkEu9QgUKNWEq7-MuClZiJu43k7DqP1yM3svpzhwvdbJJ9gDB9JwEI6PT2Kq_bWEZ7cn1xXXHOqSLZpHGLNHATYV2BiOp9J8OJj_WONBX0YmTM8YRkZwcExnUkzdrfvTa91x6J3VvE34YKeCVQtSjMKTH0flgwLxLdcUVEW1qMK9-hvAT7iCIGT-ku_DgIQAHSrA%3D%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=981269eee66a414783bb463fc2144c4b&_e=HuDhzW610NzSK-913c4FQRfrsAKcUB3hb7LMXbun7eihtld6T0w9P4_rqBhy2XHl3JDv5LU1CKD-QJtjK02LB_TW3MtTaERBZzXk7DYf67yoCa7LEH0ntppZE7LYhFW-DxVRJbsFCAzfTfYFAintghO78vA4tRB_OtyW9jWkIbFkPDjYPqrWZJ7iyCuGn_Ya5HU8XfVygMVWnbC-afhkEu9QgUKNWEq7-MuClZiJu43k7DqP1yM3svpzhwvdbJJ9CvfOYB2AmSEQx2JvS9t_wneVDMWZgrILTyImVBxmonJUIAXhaDry33G6TP3KpsQ9L3cOWItgVRGaID2UUutepGIS89NJDMumwG-zG9Ig9z_N8ymVp18gpWR4ZnVmv6IWlBNLkbiU6w1Zje4rYHgoeg%3D%3D)

When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.orgP.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | |

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: My New Year’s resolution:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=22%2E181023%2EVlOjha)
My New Year’s Resolution is simple: **protect and defend our democracy.**
Michigan is a great state because our democracy has prevailed -- but that takes all of us putting in effort to ensure that continues. >From public servants to election workers and clerks to community members, we all have a part to play.
Our democracy works best when everyone can participate and all voices are heard. That’s the work I am bringing into 2025 and beyond. I’m glad you’re part of this team.
Thank you,
Jocelyn

* * *
Before you go... we need your help. Since her 2018 election, Secretary Benson has fought for free and fair elections. She’s on the front lines of defending and strengthening our democracy. **[Will you contribute today to show your support?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250105-1?refcode=em20250105-1&refcode2=22_181023_VlOjha&akid=22%2E181023%2EVlOjha)** **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250105-1?refcode=em20250105-1&refcode2=22_181023_VlOjha&akid=22%2E181023%2EVlOjha)**
---

* * *

Detroit, MI 48221
