name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
As a successful College Football coach, I want you to understand why I entered into politics | [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f8b28e7c25074171a08037af2592eed5&_e=GrGpaURx4ndAsBS2MOT2uCw-chlHuG8_Tvpicu2CtCFriQ1RKbppD-8r9ZpWUgO5vd372uAfzW9-xELPwyOU-4_pTXhZ8eKCprBh5cK6VhRI6zeDEX8PrhPPZ4p-Dz4kOi8w_gG7i-xxtuUYPZJK5OpVm5ow1ndoSvHhfFpMXyH8QPq3PwCOX2itrjVA_2NCb68dd9I5m1HGLW0ONnrDMR23IS3H_J3mrytbovES3Jmy9r66AwwFq67CiMSUxYQui2qvQ-KTX7QgV2C8ll3jR9mSf0qLN0EwccVcY5Xcr9yd7Pgn0yz19VQi3DZpCdciB7y0j62fxdDwUuyz7P5B_Q%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

It’s me, Tommy Tuberville.

Throughout my life, I’ve been called many names. Whether it’s Coach, Dad, Husband, or Senator, I’ve always led by example for the people who depend on me.

**This email is a little longer.** [**I’m humbly asking you to read it through and consider donating to my re-election campaign for the United States Senate when you’re finished.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f8b28e7c25074171a08037af2592eed5&_e=GrGpaURx4ndAsBS2MOT2uCw-chlHuG8_Tvpicu2CtCFriQ1RKbppD-8r9ZpWUgO5vd372uAfzW9-xELPwyOU-4_pTXhZ8eKCprBh5cK6VhRI6zeDEX8PrhPPZ4p-Dz4kOi8w_gG7i-xxtuUYPZJK5OpVm5ow1ndoSvHhfFpMXyH8QPq3PwCOX2itrjVA_2NCPzFr51589CrZBEOG6SdTo0GVdjdUlVKjr56zOOoleBiNhY5VE0j8AUvnHyZ9tZPfKbEuQ2dFDxpllxLSGtCGGrPxh1jl5i9N3W4sax-bvkb4k-hQl3r_Uxxp0Kve_3Xr9ZuSRgVGh3UB0VBU_3b0hg%3D%3D)

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f8b28e7c25074171a08037af2592eed5&_e=GrGpaURx4ndAsBS2MOT2uCw-chlHuG8_Tvpicu2CtCFriQ1RKbppD-8r9ZpWUgO5vd372uAfzW9-xELPwyOU-4_pTXhZ8eKCprBh5cK6VhRI6zeDEX8PrhPPZ4p-Dz4kOi8w_gG7i-xxtuUYPZJK5OpVm5ow1ndoSvHhfFpMXyH8QPq3PwCOX2itrjVA_2NCkegbjrjdSKUNLYRWZ9lxxtU4vZ5VMtFO2Ax7H6sGm2_Yo_cGdtD3b2qAarL7JZbyVfiNMfXVXwJQ5miALM5m4pHRFFjNonIVwY_zDcQLMbYmJWkwL59YlsZ-zTtzMdoBbGTbYYg2SZvt-wvnq8fGVg%3D%3D)
I was born in Camden, Arkansas as the third of three children to my parents, Olive and Charles Tuberville. They raised me to always work hard and stand on principle, which I’ve brought with me in every step of my life.

I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married just three years later and have two amazing children together, Tucker and Troy. They continue to make me proud every single day.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f8b28e7c25074171a08037af2592eed5&_e=GrGpaURx4ndAsBS2MOT2uCw-chlHuG8_Tvpicu2CtCFriQ1RKbppD-8r9ZpWUgO5vd372uAfzW9-xELPwyOU-4_pTXhZ8eKCprBh5cK6VhRI6zeDEX8PrhPPZ4p-Dz4kOi8w_gG7i-xxtuUYPZJK5OpVm5ow1ndoSvHhfFpMXyH8QPq3PwCOX2itrjVA_2NC3moArtVigWvm_n44dUS73vlgBoz8nlV8h9t2lCv0np7vHDEi87GmkYXgLHbzaqvhpUrX-8LBe4XXzSO9eeGDYtIFS68pheujpY0gwhQyQI-4ckEnHIyY2DSPjKhfPexdV_030oHeEl4BDv9LESXidQ%3D%3D)
After graduating from SAU, I took my first coaching job at Hermitage High School before graduating to the college level as an assistant coach at Arkansas State University.

Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f8b28e7c25074171a08037af2592eed5&_e=GrGpaURx4ndAsBS2MOT2uCw-chlHuG8_Tvpicu2CtCFriQ1RKbppD-8r9ZpWUgO5vd372uAfzW9-xELPwyOU-4_pTXhZ8eKCprBh5cK6VhRI6zeDEX8PrhPPZ4p-Dz4kOi8w_gG7i-xxtuUYPZJK5OpVm5ow1ndoSvHhfFpMXyH8QPq3PwCOX2itrjVA_2NCffxymlzveOeLS92U3NkRW6F7zTYZtFu0j-0AvFG_oLNB7Odyk5SOhsqHq4GK3-i-HDiW55oVLy9Ino0MJp0IcPKzYgeY8HD_uvrboVCU9l-y4rcJuZ51rM5T5Gn3-Pt7DQPjuMfG0nOp-ntMBdvKHg%3D%3D)
I spent a short stint as the head coach for Ole Miss before becoming the head coach for the Auburn Tigers in 1998. I solidified my career there, making eight consecutive bowl appearances, winning five SEC Western Division Titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004 when I was named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year, among other awards.

I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn’t done winning just yet.

**In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. After talking to my fellow Alabamians, I was enlightened by President Trump's concerns about the direction of our country, and I decided to do something about it. I ran for the United States Senate and won.**

Throughout my first term in office, I’ve been fighting non-stop on President Trump’s behalf. Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts or challenging the Biden-Harris Administration’s Radical and harmful policies, I always worked hard and stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f8b28e7c25074171a08037af2592eed5&_e=GrGpaURx4ndAsBS2MOT2uCw-chlHuG8_Tvpicu2CtCFriQ1RKbppD-8r9ZpWUgO5vd372uAfzW9-xELPwyOU-4_pTXhZ8eKCprBh5cK6VhRI6zeDEX8PrhPPZ4p-Dz4kOi8w_gG7i-xxtuUYPZJK5OpVm5ow1ndoSvHhfFpMXyH8QPq3PwCOX2itrjVA_2NCJ8pZqntNadfJSZaCICnd6vpHUddxg8OB27qtfi6FxaWKNT45zgWC5NRwBC0PPN39sV9SYmMEWy5jj2x1q5zNmcfp6Jfgkh49BVicEVWwoRE_euQBnwzLLW6AS1l-ee29hc-1aXt9t1qx_HqBWMWA_g%3D%3D)
**Now, I’m running for re-election in the 2026 Midterm Elections.**

The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top targets to defeat in 2026. They’re going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it’s this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0.

**I’m looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a Senate candidate, and I need your help.**

[**Peter, can you chip in just $10 before midnight to give my campaign the resources we need to defeat the Radical Left and retain President Trump’s Senate Majority?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f8b28e7c25074171a08037af2592eed5&_e=GrGpaURx4ndAsBS2MOT2uCw-chlHuG8_Tvpicu2CtCFriQ1RKbppD-8r9ZpWUgO5vd372uAfzW9-xELPwyOU-4_pTXhZ8eKCprBh5cK6VhRI6zeDEX8PrhPPZ4p-Dz4kOi8w_gG7i-xxtuUYPZJK5OpVm5ow1ndoSvHhfFpMXyH8QPq3PwCOX2itrjVA_2NCtjGSCCkmzYqVJf2qT7lGhoGNPhxgCEdC-Q1qRmBUtHK4yIS-H3xjFscEj7_KwN5MqBlKN1ahB-oduHd81RS-BbVWxlv6TklPANBC5PUFE_Nexq9hca3OrxBNQPtt8OqKBWaRR_gFGcpnB22aese_Iw%3D%3D)

I won’t take up more of your time.

[**Thank you for reading this all the way through, and please consider donating any amount to help!**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f8b28e7c25074171a08037af2592eed5&_e=GrGpaURx4ndAsBS2MOT2uCw-chlHuG8_Tvpicu2CtCFriQ1RKbppD-8r9ZpWUgO5vd372uAfzW9-xELPwyOU-4_pTXhZ8eKCprBh5cK6VhRI6zeDEX8PrhPPZ4p-Dz4kOi8w_gG7i-xxtuUYPZJK5OpVm5ow1ndoSvHhfFpMXyH8QPq3PwCOX2itrjVA_2NCtU-Sf4AKtzXLTgXKcfjhpGjlDltZfYqrUJCOcxW9vV-YVMrXSX57YxmaZ-1dPDuY7g08P0uHqIBcvbOSrJcO0aEL2FxqJl0OTuvv6Yr_G5lXN5fc1yh61Vp3CciorrtvpEBJqtZ33oQRuFt1PueVpA%3D%3D)

Best,
Coach Tuberville

| [](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f8b28e7c25074171a08037af2592eed5&_e=GrGpaURx4ndAsBS2MOT2uCw-chlHuG8_Tvpicu2CtCFriQ1RKbppD-8r9ZpWUgO5vd372uAfzW9-xELPwyOU-4_pTXhZ8eKCprBh5cK6VhRI6zeDEX8PrhPPZ4p-Dz4kOi8w_gG7i-xxtuUYPZJK5OpVm5ow1ndoSvHhfFpMXyH8QPq3PwCOX2itrjVA_2NCbdNgfenFcghf1hYAr0QjMh74bGa1WVWxMDmiSOirOW9PGtsPVM5NI91EhpboqUfck8i5EyDlLCC8-OaqGaCB-ZRyulY_FrQqj_ukOOZreu0_v3ZCFAk_SaHa8Dc8V6xRDZQhHQCPaJSZinIOe55rwg%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f8b28e7c25074171a08037af2592eed5&_e=GrGpaURx4ndAsBS2MOT2uCw-chlHuG8_Tvpicu2CtCFriQ1RKbppD-8r9ZpWUgO5vd372uAfzW9-xELPwyOU-4_pTXhZ8eKCprBh5cK6VhRI6zeDEX8PrhPPZ4p-Dz4kOi8w_gG7i-xxtuUYPZJK5OpVm5ow1ndoSvHhfFpMXyH8QPq3PwCOX2itrjVA_2NCsZ0nmbitH70sK4xQpKY_Z6jXW6FdCKv1fU6wSE03Fxxdh9iBm_UZtlw--zB69SsaZ7EpLnviGS7_9eHW1MVQZheoY5ame3EqLgwXmivZqEhaZzC9vGePcAfg57EZ_25xKly8iYyD101-V4w2-zvMMw%3D%3D)

---

PO Box 590012, Birmingham, Alabama 35259

---

[ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f8b28e7c25074171a08037af2592eed5&_e=GrGpaURx4ndAsBS2MOT2uJ2orfXa7kCOQcy4yYFafVBDOKUAExnamoA2O3g-z6QyTqIfgvR2rmPiFxaq3-hWesPOPuCJNHwrCo5EacJ-wnTC-r4LLHFi-aH6iJm51Vl30sPE6qb2q6r7z_iLPySi4dp_hXcJzLqcjOAY3uMww_JqxiZXc8mhYl9krhdSoCpU2t4AT6cu4nwfVP6D7Ds3Bkbk4XEA2x5fTt4RdyufIeAeBZ3CuzhUvoChsl6ofUnR)

body:
We’ve got a lot of work ahead, but I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work. In Congress, I’ve built a record of bringing people together — Republicans and Democrats alike — to get things done.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99919990/521181380/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzM5OTUyMmYtOWNjYi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R1tj6H8faEvwR3Gs5D_rbsww-fSS_VNdQPqaasec0-s=)

| Peter,

I’m running for Governor of Virginia, because I believe in the promise of this Commonwealth — a place where every family can thrive, every child can reach their potential, and every community can be safe, healthy, and prosperous.

From the Shenandoah Valley to Hampton Roads, I’ve heard from Virginians who want the same things. They want strong schools, affordable housing, and good jobs. That’s why I’m running for Governor — to make sure we build a Virginia where everyone has the chance to succeed. **As Governor, I’ll work to:**

**✅ ****Strengthen our public schools** so every child can get the education they deserve.
**✅ ****Prevent gun violence** to keep our kids safe.
**✅ ****Lower costs** and make the essentials Virginians need more affordable.
**✅ ****Protect reproductive rights** so every Virginian can make decisions about their own healthcare.

We’ve got a lot of work ahead, but I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work. In Congress, I built a record of bringing people together — Republicans and Democrats alike — to get things done.

That’s the same approach I’ll bring to Richmond, where **we need real leadership, not division.**

[_**But I can’t do it alone. To win, I need your support. Every dollar you contribute helps us reach more Virginians and build a strong campaign. clean_body: We’ve got a lot of work ahead, but I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work. In Congress, I’ve built a record of bringing people together — Republicans and Democrats alike — to get things done. | = | Peter, I’m running for Governor of Virginia, because I believe in the promise of this Commonwealth — a place where every family can thrive, every child can reach their potential, and every community can be safe, healthy, and prosperous. From the Shenandoah Valley to Hampton Roads, I’ve heard from Virginians who want the same things. They want strong schools, affordable housing, and good jobs. That’s why I’m running for Governor — to make sure we build a Virginia where everyone has the chance to succeed. As Governor, I’ll work to: ✅ Strengthen our public schools so every child can get the education they deserve. ✅ Prevent gun violence to keep our kids safe. ✅ Lower costs and make the essentials Virginians need more affordable. ✅ Protect reproductive rights so every Virginian can make decisions about their own healthcare. We’ve got a lot of work ahead, but I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work. In Congress, I built a record of bringing people together — Republicans and Democrats alike — to get things done. That’s the same approach I’ll bring to Richmond, where we need real leadership, not division. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

clean_body: | | | Is it time to MOVE OUT of California? Peter, we knew it was bad. But it just got WORSE. Homelessness, drugs, and crime have TAKEN OVER California cities because of Democrats' RADICAL policies. Is anyone surprised that California is now ranked DEAD LAST as the WORST state to raise a family in? Under Gavin Newsom's leadership, the Golden State isn't golden anymore -- it's in COMPLETE CHAOS. But this wasn't done by mistake. It 's all part of Newsom's plan to DESTROY President Trump and his MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN agenda. NEWSOM wants to BLOCK the America First agenda by: DEFUNDING the police and SLASHING public safety budgets across the state. RAISING TAXES on businesses and hardworking families. BLOCKING parents from having a say in their CHILD'S EDUCATION. If we don't fight back, what's to stop RADICAL Democrats from making EVERY STATE California? We're counting on patriots like YOU to rise up and kick Newsom to the CURB. ** California's decline is Newsom's legacy, but he's not going to stop running the once-golden state into the GROUND. And neither will his DEMOCRAT CRONIES. Let's show Newsom that patriots like YOU will NEVER surrender. Are you willing to chip in and help TRUMP and the CAGOP fix this mess? body:
Peter, I’ll cut right to it: I’m reaching out to 100 supporters from Cresco to help me raise $742 before midnight. Will you chip in an immediate $14 to help flip THREE seats from red to blue in these upcoming special elections, rendering Mike Johnson’s narrow majority useless? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

I won’t mince words, Peter.

— We just handed Republicans one of the smallest House majorities in history.

— We’re heading into three special elections that could flip critical seats from red to blue.

— If we win them, we’ll render Mike Johnson’s narrow majority USELESS.

Peter, that’s why we must build an unbeatable foundation of grassroots support, prove to everyone watching that we are a united front against Trump and his Republicans, and win historic victories in these special elections. Can I count on you to rush in $14? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter, I need you to make a critical choice in this moment:

You can either let Republicans raise millions of dollars and win these special elections...

...Or you can stand up, do something bold, and help build a historic victory. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Will you stand with me and help flip these three critical seats? Even a donation of $14 on your part will make a difference. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Chip in $19 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=19]
Chip in $24 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=24]
Chip in $50 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=50]
Chip in $100 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=100]
Or chip in another amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=25]

Thank you,

RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?

name: Team McBride
subject: Can you sign the card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
It’s official!
#
It’s official! 🎉
On Friday, Sarah was sworn in to serve her first term representing Delaware in the U.S. House of Representatives making history as the first trans member of Congress.
[**To celebrate, we’re sending a card to Sarah to congratulate her, and we’d love for you to personally sign it.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-sworin-in-congrats-card/1?source=em20250105-1667&akid=1667%2E21716%2EAue3RN)
[**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-sworin-in-congrats-card/1?source=em20250105-1667&akid=1667%2E21716%2EAue3RN)**
In the face of a GOP trifecta, we need champions who will lead with optimism, courage, and a service-first mindset to take on the important fights and roll up their sleeves to deliver for working people. That’s exactly what Sarah will do.
**As Sarah takes her seat in Congress, let’s show her how much her leadership inspires us.[Will you take a moment to sign our card and share your words of support?](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-sworin-in-congrats-card/1?source=em20250105-1667&akid=1667%2E21716%2EAue3RN)**
**[Sign The Card »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-sworin-in-congrats-card/1?source=em20250105-1667&akid=1667%2E21716%2EAue3RN)**
This is a huge moment for our movement, and it wouldn’t have happened without your support. Thank you for always having Sarah’s back and inspiring progress in our democracy.
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250105-1&t=1&refcode2=1667_21716_Aue3RN&akid=1667%2E21716%2EAue3RN)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1667%2E21716%2EAue3RN)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1667%2E21716%2EAue3RN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1667%2E21716%2EAue3RN)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood groomers
body:
We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=18a1f6603e8040f1a00b7456016d3c1e&_e=XOweNlzc_kQsTw0taK5FUEJVWjZSjE5gk0EI2jVhMZKTmsgIVBEqF_TlATR8HvZD6soUXINfSfB6kBXyY0XjWmRD4ch1Idv51QaRbI1B_811s6Lg57x-DaWhYxhKkx1rp3blRWC0NspmlUX0DEqZZbk3OMNm8DjUAvMOgPbmVdoP-GRb30NTsg20Dm2ZbiKLQuXy8c-ms_mZTViyqOuoxPAD0zHZcwJ1I2CSgA5dWvniMShaZtCxu-ISUF-OPzgcxKY9bDfWMsxnn55OrToUZEV1s-LhzgNJB8j_4dbYfXikGrAc-IqOcvDCUXBZUivlp3WZtZ2sGWh0wj3xXuLwdENdM6fDJ1Xs4y66oKu_C9ZliOpFG5qXG6-rK87GOH4gl8q1y6FljSkSoTBTyKqPQden2RI_1X5oe1eqGVxedu0%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=18a1f6603e8040f1a00b7456016d3c1e&_e=XOweNlzc_kQsTw0taK5FUEJVWjZSjE5gk0EI2jVhMZKTmsgIVBEqF_TlATR8HvZD6soUXINfSfB6kBXyY0XjWmRD4ch1Idv51QaRbI1B_811s6Lg57x-DaWhYxhKkx1rp3blRWC0NspmlUX0DEqZZbk3OMNm8DjUAvMOgPbmVdoP-GRb30NTsg20Dm2ZbiKLQuXy8c-ms_mZTViyqOuoxPAD0zHZcwJ1I2CSgA5dWvniMShaZtCxu-ISUF-OPzgcfehf0qWYQI7Sx8_uVXHBIgYawOBJZ0e3JbdWxIro_Zh6tser82k24Lk-yanXiUwGws_QStSqS3SZbKbtXH_wNv33ipE5fSZb4ANOUnNO-onFj-ISAderwUDebTfwj2jMqM6zbLdHjcyGPNEpu5O5PgslhU3Wx1g2sMXgfLEqRso%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=18a1f6603e8040f1a00b7456016d3c1e&_e=XOweNlzc_kQsTw0taK5FUEJVWjZSjE5gk0EI2jVhMZKTmsgIVBEqF_TlATR8HvZD6soUXINfSfB6kBXyY0XjWmRD4ch1Idv51QaRbI1B_811s6Lg57x-DaWhYxhKkx1rp3blRWC0NspmlUX0DEqZZbk3OMNm8DjUAvMOgPbmVdoP-GRb30NTsg20Dm2ZbiKLQuXy8c-ms_mZTViyqOuoxPAD0zHZcwJ1I2CSgA5dWvniMShaZtCxu-ISUF-OPzgcAml2h138cWLW4xMbtUKPgFgdF0CASSPKM4YwdpOhQrbCBYEZ-cd9p4_xEUyOxq4jYqs_Y_ADH7mAHB8mN4hU3DTT5nO53wPHugC1C4EROKydvCJn8I6_grPcRHnPh0fe_R9kdlgqHMoHSKk3nszrdyZMLXbfr26Si0zQOm1v1ko%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=18a1f6603e8040f1a00b7456016d3c1e&_e=XOweNlzc_kQsTw0taK5FUEJVWjZSjE5gk0EI2jVhMZKTmsgIVBEqF_TlATR8HvZD6soUXINfSfB6kBXyY0XjWmRD4ch1Idv51QaRbI1B_811s6Lg57x-DaWhYxhKkx1rp3blRWC0NspmlUX0DEqZZbk3OMNm8DjUAvMOgPbmVdoP-GRb30NTsg20Dm2ZbiKLQuXy8c-ms_mZTViyqOuoxPAD0zHZcwJ1I2CSgA5dWvniMShaZtCxu-ISUF-OPzgcxFggWP6f3MTvv_wzLnDnYNJHOQbYg1-yByqTJUGIbvmVHBlT6_77YhdBWmiw9wnJ8kCCp6nT3F6r9L6Ztmk5vzsPJuXe_-LxI4fEAueZELrkFIq0VuSPfr_Oxa7JKbVToZPvRkoUfUbvDIGbaIapWhVIvfZuPruDoN5__aFqgKA%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=18a1f6603e8040f1a00b7456016d3c1e&_e=XOweNlzc_kQsTw0taK5FUEJVWjZSjE5gk0EI2jVhMZKTmsgIVBEqF_TlATR8HvZD6soUXINfSfB6kBXyY0XjWmRD4ch1Idv51QaRbI1B_811s6Lg57x-DaWhYxhKkx1rp3blRWC0NspmlUX0DEqZZbk3OMNm8DjUAvMOgPbmVdoP-GRb30NTsg20Dm2ZbiKLQuXy8c-ms_mZTViyqOuoxPAD0zHZcwJ1I2CSgA5dWvniMShaZtCxu-ISUF-OPzgcTYJhbUQ755nIMO0DrDTTgl2oR3vGLY1m9WMAPocH8n_G2Hj4UrAZ_XOh7R4BM9YN7kjh2vzBoq3LQXwlSG4AUBajDvAKFPpDyQ5nwYZbzs9LTJXBMx-5BzXiFBn2uP8ZKgWBWhCgnBcl7kVGbme8pFoguFZrgLcMZs8LFW0BTxI%3D)

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Elon Musk Just Attacked Me and Wants Me Gone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
But I'm not going anywhere
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99921416/521185916/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTk5Yjk4Yy1hYWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ogajZj3045TBm7R5D3PzAbxrZ7RAVbOcypTMKmjDVME=)
Team,
This morning, Elon Musk tweeted, calling for me to be voted out of office. Once again, he’s trying to show that he and his billions should control not just the government but the future of our democracy.
Elon Musk said that I need to be "voted out, either in the primaries or the general election" and he has the resources to try to do it.
I was elected by the people in my district to represent _their_ interests—not the interests of billionaire oligarchs. That’s why I refuse to back down from doing what’s right for working families, even as Elon uses his wealth to spread misinformation and attack those who stand in his way.
[Please contribute to my campaign today to help me push back against Elon Musk's attempts to remove me from Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99921417/521185917/-1908375243?refcode2=5999b98c-aacb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&refcode=em250105&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTk5Yjk4Yy1hYWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ogajZj3045TBm7R5D3PzAbxrZ7RAVbOcypTMKmjDVME=)
Let me be clear: I’m not afraid of Elon Musk or his attempts to weaponize his fortune. I’m proud to fight for Social Security, expand Medicare, and push for tax relief for working families—not billionaires. But standing up to billionaires like him takes resources.
Today, I’m asking for your help to push back against the lies and distortions he’ll undoubtedly continue to spread. Every dollar you contribute goes directly toward countering his misinformation, reaching voters with the truth, and ensuring we keep fighting for the people who sent me to Washington.
[Please contribute what you can so I can have the resources to fight back against Elon Musk's billions in his attempt to remove me from Congress](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99921418/521185918/-1908375243?refcode2=5999b98c-aacb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&refcode=em250105&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTk5Yjk4Yy1hYWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ogajZj3045TBm7R5D3PzAbxrZ7RAVbOcypTMKmjDVME=)[.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99921419/521185919/-1908375243?refcode2=5999b98c-aacb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&refcode=em250105&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTk5Yjk4Yy1hYWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ogajZj3045TBm7R5D3PzAbxrZ7RAVbOcypTMKmjDVME=)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99921420/521185920/-1908375243?refcode2=5999b98c-aacb-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&refcode=em250105&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTk5Yjk4Yy1hYWNiLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ogajZj3045TBm7R5D3PzAbxrZ7RAVbOcypTMKmjDVME=)
Elon Musk and his friends in the Trump Administration, are just getting started. But with your support, we can fight back harder, stand stronger, and win.
Thank you for being in my corner.
Let’s go,
Robert Garcia

name: Congressman Derek Tran
subject: Only in America:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Tran for Congress P
body:
It’s the honor of a lifetime to be reaching out to you, for the first time, as the official Congressman for California’s 45th Congressional District! I ran for Congress to give back to the country that gave so much to me. Decades ago, my parents fled the Communist regime in Vietnam and came to the United States in search of a better life — a life where everybody, no matter what their background, has the chance to succeed.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99921632/521186596/1943818218?amount=25&amounts=5,10,5,50,250,500&refcode=em_eng_2025.01.05_b1_dt_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWJkNjQ0N2MtYWVjYi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=plY6k259r7poFgMmtiUOirslGO5qpX3a9KJnw7meOLM=)
---
Team —

It’s the honor of a lifetime to be reaching out to you, for the first time, as the official Congressman for California’s 45th Congressional District!

I ran for Congress to give back to the country that gave so much to me.

Decades ago, my parents fled the Communist regime in Vietnam and came to the United States in search of a better life — a life where everybody, no matter what their background, has the chance to succeed.

**Only in America can you go from refugees with nothing but the clothes on your back to being a Member of Congress in just one generation.**

That’s the promise of the American Dream.

As your Congressman, my vow to you is to always fight to ensure families across California have access to the same Dream that mine did all those years ago.

Let’s get to work.

— Derek

P.S. **[With an _even narrower_ Republican House Majority, I know the GOP will try harder than ever to make me a one-term Congressman. To ensure I can keep up the fight in Congress, will you make a donation to my re-election campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99921633/521186597/1943818218?amount=25&refcode=em_eng_2025.01.05_b1_dt_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWJkNjQ0N2MtYWVjYi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=plY6k259r7poFgMmtiUOirslGO5qpX3a9KJnw7meOLM=)**

www.derektranforcongress.com

clean_body: It’s the honor of a lifetime to be reaching out to you, for the first time, as the official Congressman for California’s 45th Congressional District! I ran for Congress to give back to the country that gave so much to me. Decades ago, my parents fled the Communist regime in Vietnam and came to the United States in search of a better life — a life where everybody, no matter what their background, has the chance to succeed. | = Team — It’s the honor of a lifetime to be reaching out to you, for the first time, as the official Congressman for California’s 45th Congressional District! I ran for Congress to give back to the country that gave so much to me. Decades ago, my parents fled the Communist regime in Vietnam and came to the United States in search of a better life — a life where everybody, no matter what their background, has the chance to succeed. Only in America can you go from refugees with nothing but the clothes on your back to being a Member of Congress in just one generation. That’s the promise of the American Dream. As your Congressman, my vow to you is to always fight to ensure families across California have access to the same Dream that mine did all those years ago. Let’s get to work. — Derek P.S. = | | Paid for by Derek Tran for Congress P.O. Box 395, 10441 Stanford Ave, Garden Grove, CA 92842 www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. name: ELECTION INTEGRITY ALERT =?windows-1251?b?lg==?= From House Republicans
subject: READ NOW: Pres. Trump’s bold statement on our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Scalise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit Scalise For Congress and Eye Of The Tiger PAC
body:
| Not interested? [Unsubscribe here](https://links.house-republicans.org/unsubscribe?e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_8d4328b30f3216d1d2988d46238&n=1).
---
| **READ NOW:
President Trump’s bold statement on the future of our elections**

---
“I will be DEMANDING THAT VOTER ID, AND PROOF OF CITIZENSHIP, ARE A NECESSARY PART AND COMPONENT OF THE VOTING PROCESS!”

– President Donald J. Trump
---

All this comes after Gavin Newsom _outlawed_ voter ID in California, a Chinese student _illegally voted_ in Michigan, and the Biden Administration _sued_ key states to keep non-citizens on the voter rolls.

Do you support President Trump's plan to secure our elections? Sign our House GOP petition to endorse our agenda to make sure our elections are safe and secure once and for all.
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFI7po84LfkUTXXv92enjQcvMpRPGP3En1o3vokz2E11bRMaI-lNiC2SoNKJm8r-x6jOogM2naGEb_OxDhjR94HgWP79GM78UnTbdzGFnjVXfYZ35BCxSwOMSAB_5Jh_uWceXLugwjyvf95gMMtq6NmTwJ6X3oYe2V8RXxNxgeqhojom_3tRdWmysXjhMUBW7jVYMRMkNXw_Vz0T5SIb9XqB4w39fT_lw1gQEjKrh2J0BXY1_yAG8Bl3U_eQK-pSw5U&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_8d4328b30f3216d1d2988d46238&n=2 "SIGN THE PETITION")
---

Big change is coming to our elections.

**Under President Trump and House Republicans, we will:**

1) Mandate voter identification laws in every state
2) Require proof of citizenship when registering to vote

These protections are mission-critical to the security of our elections. If we can’t get this right, nothing else matters.

**_[If you want to help support President Trump and our Conservative House Majority in this endeavor – sign our NATIONWIDE PETITION to demand voter ID and proof of citizenship for every US voter>>](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFI7po84LfkUTXXv92enjQcvMpRPGP3En1o3vokz2E11bRMaI-lNiC2SoNKJm8r-x6jOogM2naGEb_OxDhjR94HgWP79GM78UnTbdzGFnjVXfYZ35BCxSwOMSAB_5Jh_uWceXLugwjyvf95gMMtq6NmTwJ6X3oYe2V8RXxNxgeqhojom_3tRdWmysXjhMUBW7jVYMRMkNXw_Vz0T5SIb9XqB4w39fT_lw1gQEjKrh2J0BXY1_yAG8Bl3U_eQK-pSw5U&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_8d4328b30f3216d1d2988d46238&n=3 "If you want to help support
President Trump and our Conservative House Majority in this endeavor –
sign our NATIONWIDE PETITION to demand voter ID and proof of
citizenship for every US voter >>")_**
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://links.house-republicans.org/r?u=-KKwfzWl7oK4gNPooZXuJ4Zn2xET82xeGk9Y43EVmFI7po84LfkUTXXv92enjQcvMpRPGP3En1o3vokz2E11bRMaI-lNiC2SoNKJm8r-x6jOogM2naGEb_OxDhjR94HgWP79GM78UnTbdzGFnjVXfYZ35BCxSwOMSAB_5Jh_uWceXLugwjyvf95gMMtq6NmTwJ6X3oYe2V8RXxNxgeqhojom_3tRdWmysXjhMUBW7jVYMRMkNXw_Vz0T5SIb9XqB4w39fT_lw1gQEjKrh2J0BXY1_yAG8Bl3U_eQK-pSw5U&e=998fa18fd50048d580e64d9cd10dc33f&utm_source=hdscalise&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em_8d4328b30f3216d1d2988d46238&n=4 "SIGN THE PETITION")
---

President Trump is preparing to take the Oath of Office, so time is of the essence.

_So we’re pleading with you to sign your name to help us hit the ground running on DAY ONE of complete Republican control._

We’ll be looking for your name.

Thank you.

– House Republicans

| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=09ff02c18a4a4f9384dd0b18083482a1&_e=5eCJzRGDDACsNnR0Tl7eCMZe8NUfaSVtp9Dd4Ehi0PsTThcTY7TMm5-w5HbLjeeViX2CqxI7EMHB1KnCdsG-BYnr1S9KWV0NPViu8jHqtelTnW3rQjwCpbzLbvFYM-CkC1_OCvJPbO1u8x8ayDisC-z1c37RGnASD6gqHFphb2Z-Hrp_D8nVbgj9Vc-41vO2WBXU-6O4Yokt7y83d1yFQ2Zc9fYRNfKQM0iYSTFPFNSp0sQE6wnn2nDwnJz4tiHCIZI7qCd6NYBeh2bnKY4c12F6tb7CkYM5txyfISDHIoKMkxYuYqqvgikl9RsARN4Qb0tExlzZtv9_5hU6hYifCQP0HCGdEqTrLlmZnygvJKsTEo8OBg4XEAAceiPXJKt1V5RRBeFqzw4uCyDQ3ZKkTA%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=09ff02c18a4a4f9384dd0b18083482a1&_e=5eCJzRGDDACsNnR0Tl7eCMZe8NUfaSVtp9Dd4Ehi0PsTThcTY7TMm5-w5HbLjeeViX2CqxI7EMHB1KnCdsG-BYnr1S9KWV0NPViu8jHqtelTnW3rQjwCpbzLbvFYM-CkC1_OCvJPbO1u8x8ayDisC-z1c37RGnASD6gqHFphb2Z-Hrp_D8nVbgj9Vc-41vO2WBXU-6O4Yokt7y83d1yFQ2Zc9fYRNfKQM0iYSTFPFNRiVXUEGyz2ZVHJaSvtUQ3fpS7sjKqEnqWqFzffW7RJjM6W0Qk4DGqrLdTPndJnophdvvYN6QvmOv5wsES6_IVQL6sc2W3gobSih8LdW0QofT1z3ZBkAunCDqAmQz6G_JtZS3hPrDK1Cnw8ieIi9vcajEwrCYAu9RJP6bX0ZXJtwA%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=09ff02c18a4a4f9384dd0b18083482a1&_e=5eCJzRGDDACsNnR0Tl7eCMZe8NUfaSVtp9Dd4Ehi0PsTThcTY7TMm5-w5HbLjeeViX2CqxI7EMHB1KnCdsG-BYnr1S9KWV0NPViu8jHqtelTnW3rQjwCpbzLbvFYM-CkC1_OCvJPbO1u8x8ayDisC-z1c37RGnASD6gqHFphb2Z-Hrp_D8nVbgj9Vc-41vO2WBXU-6O4Yokt7y83d1yFQ2Zc9fYRNfKQM0iYSTFPFNQ-ab6s33ABn5-mz5tlUWNDrnB1T0xDn0tA7FA_gih86c2Iu9W_8N-dbIzBdWE6qr-FMXf5sRCIC9Z2sewwntdOtHh6i-FUPCnZTPMPcmJ7JMI1cDKlMj3ePlAaWR96g7ijGhQyaDjBZVIuzFUcyI8UQp6a1R9GltJ3-c1E2OoDyg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

subject: Warning: The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner
body:
God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God.| |
---

---
| |
---
| |

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fb50901e9fac44848522d0c101e83084&_e=DGo2I5pQduLm1g7xNSme-r0Lptyf9PTbcm-rhiu1cqamlUdYdXIzsMi3UGYlrZ20hZiE6oAZZV0rbNhCFqUEKBF_C3EBVs0Ywo8qZ-Sw4DAz9LhM4ljdZDXxft0-KnKi-gGcNoAYgmSAjZL4-iTcmbz-AbbidYXOMXUv4j4GZK9ooS3ppiJxDwIR1trvfXMSMysQigVoTeIWPZnDfFGDwmf-SBKDdr8ocsovtoOWGRGDX5RBGWdFBwj5clugBlOdyy18D5WYaRuDlLg0h47olHd1vL_LwDHgieXxhL8nOr1C_9ObckaTukY_yjmKy4RB1qYfDqY_wjKm6KB-lbpuozcAArAcvXox2T9XMAseHVKWWa8jVoBc-Cy7U7qvcU53EqKzs8EF43fu2TXwQRbuGQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fb50901e9fac44848522d0c101e83084&_e=DGo2I5pQduLm1g7xNSme-r0Lptyf9PTbcm-rhiu1cqamlUdYdXIzsMi3UGYlrZ20hZiE6oAZZV0rbNhCFqUEKBF_C3EBVs0Ywo8qZ-Sw4DAz9LhM4ljdZDXxft0-KnKi-gGcNoAYgmSAjZL4-iTcmbz-AbbidYXOMXUv4j4GZK9ooS3ppiJxDwIR1trvfXMSMysQigVoTeIWPZnDfFGDwmf-SBKDdr8ocsovtoOWGRFqrkxapGV_XLrV7BllciT5E01baFI3P45VEGpbvTvhro46psLDpoZwFPwg4L_onloo0l-TqdDr6vo-I-f2DGK6aippiPkiYTxrSoTAYbsq-58Z-ZEUCMUD6u9iTbAPfsiwFWs8Uwqs_n9L8DUTJpOyGUm5tryr_lmKbHH7DCnRfQ%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fb50901e9fac44848522d0c101e83084&_e=DGo2I5pQduLm1g7xNSme-r0Lptyf9PTbcm-rhiu1cqamlUdYdXIzsMi3UGYlrZ20hZiE6oAZZV0rbNhCFqUEKBF_C3EBVs0Ywo8qZ-Sw4DAz9LhM4ljdZDXxft0-KnKi-gGcNoAYgmSAjZL4-iTcmbz-AbbidYXOMXUv4j4GZK9ooS3ppiJxDwIR1trvfXMSMysQigVoTeIWPZnDfFGDwmf-SBKDdr8ocsovtoOWGRFYpoplPqVuPDszSnl1kBan65ykGTjaXlm1HywihNeuPryA6Ds2mxZWWTBn6i3F7vzipiX-HQzAc735Nk5Mw31ajWAfC5YQ65EggPv33Hl4_7Qj7kOhninXFNWw47oxeheqODh39IxhYgDjJbL0G2NS2dk6Mk3IHpk-BiB9RgairQ%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fb50901e9fac44848522d0c101e83084&_e=DGo2I5pQduLm1g7xNSme-r0Lptyf9PTbcm-rhiu1cqamlUdYdXIzsMi3UGYlrZ20hZiE6oAZZV0rbNhCFqUEKBF_C3EBVs0Ywo8qZ-Sw4DAz9LhM4ljdZDXxft0-KnKi-gGcNoAYgmSAjZL4-iTcmbz-AbbidYXOMXUv4j4GZK9ooS3ppiJxDwIR1trvfXMSMysQigVoTeIWPZnDfFGDwmf-SBKDdr8ocsovtoOWGREyY_v0YmmK4KA9Vqdf5Dgt8LGDiYbrIsyDqBvRyN8i2EGIWy8fgKk-2iq3_qhV4ZkuYlupQ5rAMpzpOZSkNjhwUGJ8yQniep-JaW1bqN7Cni2djpPc__szYl0b79nK9X-gi7Lz9xL2eS952d0s5WgYKoiLP7pqH8_Q2MoJ92jvjw%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fb50901e9fac44848522d0c101e83084&_e=DGo2I5pQduLm1g7xNSme-r0Lptyf9PTbcm-rhiu1cqamlUdYdXIzsMi3UGYlrZ20hZiE6oAZZV0rbNhCFqUEKBF_C3EBVs0Ywo8qZ-Sw4DAz9LhM4ljdZDXxft0-KnKi-gGcNoAYgmSAjZL4-iTcmbz-AbbidYXOMXUv4j4GZK9ooS3ppiJxDwIR1trvfXMSMysQigVoTeIWPZnDfFGDwmf-SBKDdr8ocsovtoOWGREP-VfxzJjDxLFLteZxAM8U0rurbZcwMiwRJhm8UO4N3Wdq0n-KmR9-3VGxoxccUkcWIQmdqXmAjsGtCRuP-V8u8foXpd2Ds94MunIFrNflxsOrW97FKWaMleEKq-j1kjiTfalNrnrckgn-2V_U5mmQNKetRdQIVpCMp761BDTDFQ%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fb50901e9fac44848522d0c101e83084&_e=DGo2I5pQduLm1g7xNSme-r0Lptyf9PTbcm-rhiu1cqamlUdYdXIzsMi3UGYlrZ20hZiE6oAZZV0rbNhCFqUEKBF_C3EBVs0Ywo8qZ-Sw4DAz9LhM4ljdZDXxft0-KnKi-gGcNoAYgmSAjZL4-iTcmbz-AbbidYXOMXUv4j4GZK9ooS3ppiJxDwIR1trvfXMSMysQigVoTeIWPZnDfFGDwmf-SBKDdr8ocsovtoOWGREAlB1QGNOj4AN51RWtu4zxE5tTdUiMNeq_pnfEEMM3nWEQiDfq5j-RcmlguLKEuA8BEa-gP_k9cYsdZ-DFVjiI-FhXNwOucTu23gUkY393DlW-ECDMByCyg4oquEgDppvPuJsznu6BvfaOayEqli8AN5b4O2GEBtsoG7f4If6eFw%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. **#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**

Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fb50901e9fac44848522d0c101e83084&_e=DGo2I5pQduLm1g7xNSme-r0Lptyf9PTbcm-rhiu1cqamlUdYdXIzsMi3UGYlrZ20hZiE6oAZZV0rbNhCFqUEKBF_C3EBVs0Ywo8qZ-Sw4DAz9LhM4ljdZDXxft0-KnKi-gGcNoAYgmSAjZL4-iTcmbz-AbbidYXOMXUv4j4GZK9ooS3ppiJxDwIR1trvfXMSMysQigVoTeIWPZnDfFGDwmf-SBKDdr8ocsovtoOWGRF9wRR9fmE0jW9DKgHbBAK7_donSuHAw0uyQQinXUBKr-eIW8VV6v9cQi8jNY65BaVr-BKbsj6qeZE3IuxB1M89BApcAZ8mAimwXMQmiaDJe4Dp2PX_B37Dxcx7940HPwgIsLiAYu8e7EkssdsKQt_w4udAT5aPzYQMieUfuYJrjg%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fb50901e9fac44848522d0c101e83084&_e=DGo2I5pQduLm1g7xNSme-r0Lptyf9PTbcm-rhiu1cqamlUdYdXIzsMi3UGYlrZ20hZiE6oAZZV0rbNhCFqUEKBF_C3EBVs0Ywo8qZ-Sw4DAz9LhM4ljdZDXxft0-KnKi-gGcNoAYgmSAjZL4-iTcmbz-AbbidYXOMXUv4j4GZK9ooS3ppiJxDwIR1trvfXMSMysQigVoTeIWPZnDfFGDwmf-SBKDdr8ocsovtoOWGRHiCkp5pAw8CGaWeYLDoAh0pX7YShM6qTMClvkg3KNfjSXxrXU0ZkAdxyiee4C3vsFaI5KwNe-vn4BjvifHhwnmNRl_1OeiappOZCyMDogL2bTM4uuQZ1oCJ3m9LQkY_N4JI8MxtaRYryz2dVWzt0HhgyEFApHTk125Zm4a8lknqQ%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=fb50901e9fac44848522d0c101e83084&_e=DGo2I5pQduLm1g7xNSme-r0Lptyf9PTbcm-rhiu1cqamlUdYdXIzsMi3UGYlrZ20hZiE6oAZZV0rbNhCFqUEKBF_C3EBVs0Ywo8qZ-Sw4DAz9LhM4ljdZDXxft0-KnKi-gGcNoAYgmSAjZL4-iTcmbz-AbbidYXOMXUv4j4GZK9ooS3ppiJxDwIR1trvfXMSMysQigVoTeIWPZnDfFGDwmf-SBKDdr8ocsovtoOWGRHzgU_BiOC_24faVRlk3wq0ElHU7h0T2ywN3pF_X4ofgF5YeZpZB5D1RO9hM25MSwH7RqqarjxYQvLm6rgcKAaLfxgMBTqxQ8EOyaWPOlDls6W2MZiOCwp9N3nl3Ps_olFmGxyIzIC7AlpnjgwyKyzOrfjVBTmRq2f8vjE9MaTNpQ%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,

| | Riley Gaines

My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. [_Where do you stand?_

# [What it means to thank a veteran; from a veteran](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=154217457&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MjE3NDU3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYxMTgzMTgsImV4cCI6MTczODcxMDMxOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8Oz1c9tESN8BwH5l6fw50U1VH5w3-N_1qBUbv6p4_OU)
### What do soldiers get for their sacrifice? They give America a chance to be great...
Jan 5
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=154217457&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MjE3NDU3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNjExODMxOCwiZXhwIjoxNzM4NzEwMzE4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ZwVc2MxCVmO3oNe8dqK2qxW5s5uEuCIZCQA-4ELQFvc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=154217457&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MjE3NDU3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYxMTgzMTgsImV4cCI6MTczODcxMDMxOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8Oz1c9tESN8BwH5l6fw50U1VH5w3-N_1qBUbv6p4_OU&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=154217457&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0MjE3NDU3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzYxMTgzMTgsImV4cCI6MTczODcxMDMxOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8Oz1c9tESN8BwH5l6fw50U1VH5w3-N_1qBUbv6p4_OU)
---
| | [](https://substack..MW8lZaIRXs30AiPVTifTMqiW-cv6bMBhSPvA-3GfSAo?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/what-it-means-to-thank-a-veteran?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ad1ab07-b121-4588-bd2c-ad32280564a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Dale Hartt, former U.S. Navy and UFC fighter**
I grew up on a farm in Dixmont, Maine, in the 1980s. Dixmont had a population of 800 people and lots of trees. My parents were often at work or traveling. Fortunately, I wasn't the only kid in the neighborhood left unsupervised. We had a great group of kids that all loved to play rough. Many of the kids I played with were 4 years older than me and much further along in puberty-sadly. Since most of our games were outside and involved battling; I took frequent and hardy beatings. I was lucky to have them as friends, and they prepared me well for the military.
At 19, my grandfather David was diagnosed with lung cancer. He was my patron saint. When he died, I felt very alone in a scary world. A few days later, my friend Tom and I were watching a Discovery Channel special about BUD/S class 234. Ten minutes into the episode I decided it looked like so much fun, I was going to join the military. I looked at Tom and told him I was going to go blow some shit up.

Three weeks later, I was flying to Chicago for Navy bootcamp.

The Navy gave me a crash course in being an adult. I loved the pushups but hated:
1. Sleep deprivation.
2. Showering with 89 men with only 30 shower heads. After 3 minutes, the water would shut off. Sometimes when the drill sergeants were mad at us, they shut off the hot water.
3. Having 4 toilets and zero stall walls. I hated trying to poop with some dude letting it rip next to me. I would have almost preferred someone pulled my fingernails out with pliers.

Being a good soldier is often about embracing the suck.

I got in trouble at the end of advanced training and was sent to the fleet. Instead of heading to BUD/S, a school to become a Navy SEAL, I was stationed on the USS Gettysburg. Being in the fleet on a Navy ship was much safer/better than what most soldiers got. Forward-deployed Marines spent 3 months in hell-zones in Iraq, Afghanistan, Haiti, Syria. Many of those Marines were in near-constant harm. People shot bullets, rockets, and mortars at them constantly. Some were being threatened with chemical weapons. Many Americans don't understand just how bad some places in the world are. Our military is often asked to go to the most dangerous environments on the planet.
The Penobscot natives give people a new name when they come back from war because they are now a new person. One of my dearest friends was a forward-deployed Marine stationed in Iraq and Haiti. He commonly has shortness of breath, severe anxiety, and goes running out of places randomly. We were watching Indian Jones once, and he told me he was going to the bathroom. Instead of going to the bathroom, he sprinted home. It was not easy for him to get his head right. It was not easy for many of us.

What do those service members get for their sacrifice? They give America a chance to be great. They give us a chance to be safe and prosperous. The world is full of nasty people that will kill to take our stuff and freedoms. All the things I love most - our safety, property rights, free markets, and the opportunities to live a great life, are all possible because of soldiers. I thank every American troop I see, and you should too.

**P.S. - One of the ways I say thank you is by supporting** _**[Beyond the Brotherhood](https://substack.com/redirect/663c8406-0633-4645-bfc8-e634d2c7388e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_[, ](https://substack.com/redirect/663c8406-0633-4645-bfc8-e634d2c7388e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)a charity supporting Navy SEAL veterans. Many special operations soldiers do incredible and dangerous stuff, often at great cost to themselves and family, for America. _Beyond the Brotherhood_ empowers Navy SEALs transitioning to civilian life "Empowering Navy SEALs to CONTINUE leveraging their skills FOR GOOD".

I love what Jimmy May, and his team are doing. Check them out and donate if you can at: [www.beyondthebrotherhood.org/](https://substack.com/redirect/eb508a6a-53fe-4808-9086-599e3b55d2de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_Dale served as an interior communications man in the U.S. Navy for 4 years and was deployed on the USS Gettysburg. Afterwards, he began a professional MMA fighting career which lead him to the UFC._
* * *
# Help our Navy SEALS reenter society: Beyond the Brotherhood
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/663c8406-0633-4645-bfc8-e634d2c7388e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Navy SEALs have a vast array of marketable skillsets and expertise, **[there is little to no guidance, support or network](https://substack.com/redirect/663c8406-0633-4645-bfc8-e634d2c7388e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when they transition out of the SEAL Teams and into the private sector.
For SEALs with entrepreneurial aspirations, there is even less guidance. The operational tempo and clandestine nature of their work prevents them from building the social fabric that most of the world enjoys.
Navy SEALs are forged in a crucible of service, their exceptional skills honed for a unique mission. As they transition to civilian life, a new chapter beckons - a chance to leverage their strengths in a supportive community.
**Through personalized career guidance and mentorship,[we help SEALs](https://substack.com/redirect/663c8406-0633-4645-bfc8-e634d2c7388e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** translate their remarkable experiences into fulfilling goals. BTB empowers them to find purpose and camaraderie beyond the battlefield.
Even a small donation goes a long way to helping those who gave everything for us.
[Help our heroes today](https://substack.com/redirect/663c8406-0633-4645-bfc8-e634d2c7388e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Four years have passed since the attack on our Capitol
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter —
Four years ago this evening, I was looking forward to certifying the results of a fair, free election.
But as I stood on the floor of the House of Representatives on January 6th, 2021, I had to be ready to fight. A lot of people have asked me what that day was like, so I’ll share some of my thoughts with you here.
First, as a Marine Corps veteran, I never imagined having to use my training to protect myself and my colleagues on the House floor.
I never imagined teaching my House colleagues how to put on a gas mask and regulate their breathing.
I never imagined I’d be helping frightened colleagues move to safety as insurrectionists started streaming into the Capitol.
I never imagined I’d stay behind after the Capitol security came in to do one more sweep for colleagues who might have frozen and gone to cocoon somewhere hard to find.
I never imagined I would ever have to teach my staff how to knock on the door of our office a certain way to signal it was them and not some attacker — something we did in the Marine Corps when surrounded by insurgents and you didn’t know who was good and who was bad.
And I never imagined I’d have to text members of the House and urge them not to get on buses ready to evacuate us from the Capitol because if we left we’d lose the building to the coup.
The truth is, I was ready to fight that day to protect our democracy.
Reflecting on that day, I’m proud that my party has done what we could to further protect and strengthen our democracy after January 6th. But that fight will have to continue.
And as someone who joined the United States Marine Corps to defend this country and protect our democracy, you can count on me to be on the front lines of that battle.
Thanks for reading,
Ruben Gallego

* * *

**Wait — before you go:**
**America needs fighters now, more than ever. As Ruben continues to defend our democracy, can you please make a contribution to his campaign? Please chip in $5, $10 or whatever you can today. Ruben’s going to need a big team behind him, and these donations add up FAST when tons of people chip in.**

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: Why I’m running for Elise Stefanik’s seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots
body:
I’m a husband, father, dairy farmer, and business owner who was born and raised in the North Country. Now, I'm running for NY-21.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84784?refcode=em20250105-8706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8706%2E614464%2E9Spu8v)
Hi Peter, I’m Blake Gendebien.
I’m a husband, father, dairy farmer, and business owner who was born and raised in the North Country.
**I’m excited to announce that I’m running for Congress here in New York’s 21st District.**
**[Will you split $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today to help us kickstart our campaign and flip this seat in the special election?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84784?refcode=em20250105-8706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8706%2E614464%2E9Spu8v)**
**[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84784?refcode=em20250105-8706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8706%2E614464%2E9Spu8v)**
After serving in the Peace Corps, my parents moved to the North Country and started a dairy farm. I grew up working on the farm, earned a degree in agriculture, and later worked for a farm equipment manufacturer. For the past 22 years, with my family, I have owned and operated Twin Mill Farms, which currently has over 1,000 acres of land, 500 cows, and 12 employees.
Now, I’ve decided to run for Congress because the North Country is a national treasure and has been overlooked for far too long. It’s time for us to get the representation we deserve in Washington.
My experience as a farm owner, serving as Vice Chair on the Agri-Mark Board of Directors, and co-founding the Jules of Life Foundation – a nonprofit that assists patients and families battling cancer – has given me deep roots in our community.
**But this campaign isn’t about me; it’s about all of us.** It’s about all of the farmers, business owners, workers, families, teachers, coaches, and community members here in the North Country. I’m not running for Congress as a stepping stone to political power. I’m running because this is an opportunity to fight for the North Country, and I understand the challenges that folks here are facing.
**[Will you split $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today to join us?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84784?refcode=em20250105-8706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8706%2E614464%2E9Spu8v)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84785?refcode=em20250105-8706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=8706%2E614464%2E9Spu8v) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84785?refcode=em20250105-8706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=8706%2E614464%2E9Spu8v) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84785?refcode=em20250105-8706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=8706%2E614464%2E9Spu8v) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84785?refcode=em20250105-8706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=8706%2E614464%2E9Spu8v) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84785?refcode=em20250105-8706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=8706%2E614464%2E9Spu8v) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84785?refcode=em20250105-8706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=8706%2E614464%2E9Spu8v) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84784?refcode=em20250105-8706&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=8706%2E614464%2E9Spu8v)
---
Thank you,
Blake
